These are a really comfortable pair of jeans. They are in the more current style, being on the shorter side and flared. I have to say I really like the fit. They have a good bit of stretch to them, so the size 18 fit me fine, and that's my usual size for most jeans. I like the color, which is a bit lighter, but it is still what I would consider a standard jean color. They are relatively high-waisted, but due to all the stretch, they are not going to "hold" you in the way jeans with stiff material will. I like the length on me, I'm 5'6 for reference, and they hit just at my ankle. My only pet peeve is that, basically, the entire pair of jeans is standard with no distressing, except for a random tiny spot on one of the back pockets. I think because this is the only spot for any distressing, it looks more like an actual tear or rip than intentional distressing. It's not a big deal, but that's the only thing I don't like about these jeans.

These are cute shorts. They have a dressier style yet somehow can still be casual depending on what you wear with it. They are very comfortable and lightweight. For reference I am 116 pounds my measurements are 34–26-38. I ordered the size small and they fit well. I like that the back has elastic at the waist which gives it a snug fit around your torso instead of there being a gap. I also like the belt loops so I can wear it with a belt for extra style. All in all, these are a cute pair of shorts for summer that can be dressed up or down.

These are cute, but I wouldn't consider them dress pants. They are a dressy casual. Like airplane travel, beachside dining in the evening, but not the office - my personal opinion. They are light and comfortable. The side pockets are a little smaller, but still fit a phone. They are a waffle jersey type weave. The faux front zipper does look a little fakey. The there was a pulled thread on the front of my pants, not a big deal but it makes me think that it could easily happen and then they do start to look in poor condition. I am 5'6" and weigh 120lbs. 28"waist and 35" hips, I ordered a Small.

These are cute, but my daughter isn’t crazy about the fit. She feels the material is a little scratchy (but no so bad she won’t wear them, but they are not comfy soft). Also she doesn’t like how they crotch area hangs low, there the legs come together rub on the thighs. Last,, these are a little short, just reach the tops of her feet (She is around 5’4”). Overall , she like them for sleep pants, but they aren’t her favorite pair.

These are cute, stretchy and comfortable. My only qualm is that they aren’t super high waisted. My torso is a bit on the long side, and if I pull them up to the smallest part of my waist, where they’re most flattering with a crop top, I get camel toe lol. They’re cute with a bigger shirt on top though. I’m 5’6” and 170 pounds and I got a large.

These are cute, stretchy and flattering. The waist and hips are very stretchy but not too much they'll become baggy. It allows for easy putting on and taking off. I'm 5'4", 174 lbs, waist 32, hips 45. I got a Large and it fits nicely. I recommend.

These are cute, they are stretchy. A little longer than i thought. Somewhat low-rise, definitely not high waisted. Since they are stretchy the leg openings are quite open. I have a wide waist so i ordered a Large. Im 5’4”, 140lbs. About 31.5” where the waist of the shorts fit. I dont have a muffin top in these shorts. Just wish they were a little bit shorter and more of a stiff denim. I havent worn them yet. And i will keep them.

These are cute! I wish they were a bit tighter, but I tend to like my jeans ‘jump off the roof to get in them’ kind of tight. They have a nice stretch to denim ratio, love the cut, very flattering. The color is a nice classic blue. I’m 5’4” 121 lbs. and got the small, I probably could have gone with the x-small. I haven’t washed them yet, so maybe they will shrink up a bit.

These are cuter than I expected. They fit great too... Usually I wear a. Size 0/2 so I was hesitant about them but they fit well. Must run small. They length is perfect for me. Cropped fit is hard to find when you're 5'1". They're stretchy and I love the look.

These are definitely work pants, not fashion pants. They are a thicker than average material so they should last a long time. Straight leg. They are fairly soft. They don’t have any stretch to them, so beware of sizing. I would recommend sizing up a full size. Mine didn’t fit and that’s before I even washed them. I am 5’4”. They are a little long on me, but not too bad - with shoes on, they won’t drag on the floor. They are well-made.

These are exactly as pictured! First of all, the packaging was pretty impressive. Once opened I expected that bad denim smell, people described, but had none. I held the jeans up and thought ‘no way are these going to fit me!’. Wrong! They fit like a glove. Just the right amount of stretch to be comfy and hold their shape for 2 or 3 wearings. I’m 5’8”, 153 lb., and have thick calves and butt, so bought size 8, after reading reviews. Normally I’d never buy an 8. I’ll be wearing a tailed top to cover the butt because the pockets don’t flatter mine at all. Pockets are too far from the seam, which bugs me. Otherwise I’m excited to wear these with many different style shoes, boots and sandals.

These are exactly what I was looking for. Most come in flare but these are wide straight leg which is what I wanted. I’m 5’6” 125 lbs and usually wear 2-4. These are excellent pant. Can be pulled off as a dress pant with a cute loafer, or bootie. Or can be worn for casual with a sneaker. They are so so comfortable. I’ve worn them for work and for a full day of outings chasing my two toddlers around. They don’t get baggy throughout the day. they are lightweight so perfect for spring and summer. I’m size 12-14 5’9” and the XL fit great!

These are extremely amazing stretch jean capris. This is only my second pair I’ve even bought since I’m so short. They are true to size. I purchased an XL, I’m 5’2 and I weigh 165-170. They are so cute and so comfortable. I can’t wait until Spring to break out my flip flops. The color I ordered was your basic denim color. I sent picture to my 28 yr old daughter and she thought they looked so cute on me. I’m very pleased and very impressed. If you are looking for a pair of denim capris, I would highly recommend this brand. You won’t be disappointed! Thank you for a excellent product.

These are extremely comfortable and cute. I can wear them all day. Great fit too. I’m 5’3, 145 pounds. The size I bought is 14 short. I usually have difficulty buying jeans online because of their poor fit but not with these. I will be buying another pair. I highly recommend them.

These are extremely comfortable and cute. I can wear them all day. Great fit too. I’m 5’3, 145 pounds. The size I bought is 14 short. I usually have difficulty buying jeans online because of their poor fit but not with these. I will be buying another pair. I highly recommend them.
These are extremely comfortable, has stretch and form fitting. I got size small. I'm 5'5 135pds. The great thing is they don't lose stretch or fall down. Highly recommend 👌

These are fine. They fit my human body. The material is not particularly soft or special. Nothing is special. I'm 5'3" and they are about three inches too long on me, but no biggie. I'll just cut the bottoms off since I'll just be wearing these around the house. You can probably find better ones for the same price if you look around.

These are flattering in the right places and hide my little mom pooch. they are also long enough for my long legs so if you’re shorter than i’d say 5’9 these may be a little too long. so comfortable though and hug my waist perfectly.

These are fun pants, my wife is really happy with them. For reference she is 5’4 and about 125lbs and likes how the medium fits her. These are gorgeous and very flattering. I wasn’t sure what size to get but I went with my instinct and got a small. Since they are in women sizing and I am usually a size 4-6. They stretch and fit very comfortable and the quality feels high end. For reference I am 145lbs, 28” waist 5’4.

These are great comfy flow pants, they look professional with the right top of brunch ready. I took one star off because I don’t love them…I have an pear shape body (5’1FT/132LBS/most weight on lower abdomen area and hips). These are great for an outside event, if you like to keep your house cold or if you are just a cold blooded creature. They are warm, have a good length, fit around the waist nicely, hug your curves. Great quality. 5'4", 26.5" waist, 36.5" hips

These are great for red white and blue spirit day at school. Not super high quality, the fabric is thin but they aren't see through on the white parts. Trust the other reviews and order about 1 size up. I won't be drying these because they'd be too short for me, I'm 5ft 8in and these are just the right length as is.

These are great jeans if you're a curvy girl like me. If you are hourglass or pear shaped... these jeans check all the boxes....relaxed fit in the hip and thighs and super stretchy. I'm 5'4 and the length is about perfect for me. The funny thing is they are advertised as having a rise of 9.5" (mid rise), however I knew that couldn't be true because the waistband came up above my belly button. So I measured the rise and it was 12"! I wasn't mad about it because I love high rise jeans. The only negative I could find about these jeans is they are quite a thin denim material and I question how long they will last, especially after seeing some of the other reviews. But for the low price I paid I'm sure I'll get my money's worth.

These are great jeans, my wife is really happy wi them. The material is comfortable and has a good amount for stretch to it. She likes the button details on the front and they are all functional. These are great jeans! They are not Levi's but they are not the super cheap thin jeans material. It has a nice thickness and stretch to it. I'm so happy for the length as they fall right where they should. I've always had issues with jeans flooding my short stature. I ordered in a size 2 and the fit is perfect. For reference, I am 5ft 2 in, 120-125 lbs, athletic build, and size small/x-small, 0-2, 25-26 inch waist fits me best. So, do order to size. All the stitching and sewing is done well with no open seams, overlapping of material or loose hanging thread. There was a slight chemical smell which I corrected with a very hot wash cycle. I do recommend these jeans!

These are great quality, just as you would expect from Levi. They are more mid-rise, not low rise and they fir nicely on the waist/hips. I have knocked a point off the star rating because of the poor sizing communication. I ordered a '27 Regular' to fit my 5'4" and 125lb frame. The sizing chart indicated that the inseam of a 27 - which is considered an Alpha 'Small' - would be 30 inches. Unfortunately, what was delivered was a 32 inseam so they are 2 inches too long for me. I'm so frustrated! They need to change the description to exactly match the jeans you're getting. So, instead of labeling them '27 Regular' why don't they label them '27 x 32' just like the Levi's label does on the back of the jeans! I would love these jeans if it wasn't for the 'too-long' issue. Ugh!

These are great quality! Nice & thick. Baggy & oversized just how I like them. Although I did have to fold them over because they’re a bit long on me. For reference I’m 5’3 120 lbs and I got a size small. They were also the perfect shade of pink. Will be buying more <3

These are great quality. I wanted jeans that would be comfy, good quality, flattering, and fit well. These check all the boxes. They also passed the crack test, which is very important to me. I have a mom tummy, and hips, and they still fit perfectly at the waist. I'm 5'6", 121.5 pounds. Waist is 31", hips are 37". These do not fit like "skinny jeans". They have a little extra fabric at the knee and ankles. I got a size 7 and maybe could have even sized down, because they have a little stretch. However, I didn't see a size 6 and didn't want to chance them being too tight. These are really good and will work for casual outfits.

These are great, fashionable pants. The fabric feely like silky pajamas and they seem really dressy to me. I purchased these in the color nude, which reads a champagne to me. Love it! I was pleasantly surprised that the length was perfect on me. That could mean they'll be too short if you're taller. I'm 5'4" and long-waisted. I normally need petite pants. I weigh about 152. These are size 10 and a bit snug. I'm right between a 10 and 12 so they probably fit pretty true to size.

These are great, I read the reviews and they said to go up a size and I definitely would recommend that. I tend to go between size small and medium but I wanted the oversize look and went with a large and it fits great exactly the way I wanted it to. I have quite large hips and booty for my size so it can be difficult to judge sizing in jeans, these do have a bit of a stretch as well. They are a little bit long on me but I am only 5 foot so that is to be expected nothing a bit of cuffing can’t fix lol

These are great! Cuffs are stitched down all the way around so when you wash them, you don’t have to worry about it!!! Real button fly, real pockets BUT skin doesn’t show or come through distressed areas!! I got #3 light wash in a L And I’m 5”4, 164 lbs. curvy / athletic build and the fit perfect, now I don’t like my clothes tight, so they are slightly loose! I’m guessing a M would work fine but WHY, I’m keeping the L!! Great Jean short, gonna get another pair!! Super comfy too!!

These are great! I'm about 165ish lbs and 5''2" I got the 11/30. They fit pretty good! Only tight in the belly a bit but lossen after wearing little bit, but very well made and comfortable everywhere else. I got the antique wash. They have a little stretch but they are a heavy jean. Overall I think worth it.
These are great! Very soft. Got a lot of compliments on them. I’m 5ft.6in 159. Got a large.

These are great. I got a large with a 32 inseam. I’m 5-8 170lbs and they fit perfect. I originally ordered a 34 inseam but they were too long. The fabric is thick and stretchy but I feel like it holds me in a little. Hopefully doesn’t stretch out as I wear them.
These are great. I've had them for about two months. Ordered a second color. Both fit perfect. Have been washed a few times and held up. I'm 5'5 189 and got xl.

These are great. I’ve worn them several times already. So versatile. Pockets in the front and back, drawstring elastic waist. I’m 5’5.5” and I can wear them with flats. I got a size small. Material feels like a polyester linen, but the tag says 100% cotton.
These are heavy.. like denim. Front and back pockets, very comfortable and look AWESOME!!! I'm 5'1, 128lb.
These are higher rise, just over my belly button. I’m 5’2 145lbs and got a medium a little loose. They are very short in the back if that’s something your concerned about.

These are horrible. Some of the wrinkliest pants I've owned. They attract lint easily. Texture is weird and velvety. Not flattering because they're baggy in the legs and a little tight in the waist. They bunch up very easily and make folds. I'm 5'8" 158 lbs and ordered a size 6. The crotch is so long that I have to wear them way up high, and now they're basically capris. Only positive is that they have good pockets. Also they're not even a good, rich black, and clash with all of my other blacks because of this. Photos to illustrate bunching, wrinkles, and lint.

These are huge! The size they sent was indeed labeled xxs...but what the heck?! I fit the given measurements, but they must all be totally wrong. These are falling off, as you can see I have to hold them on my actual waist where they are supposed to sit. They are nice, but just comically large, I am short, only 4"11, but the rest of my measurements are the same size as the size chart. Also, you can see the white interior of the pockets through the pants, the fabric is not thin but still see through, so dark or white underwear or colored tucked in shirts are a no. They are more of a cream which is what I wanted and expected from the pictures. For the price, not worth it, I've gotten better and more accurately sized things on shein. Also even with heels, the pants are dragging the ground, so def not for short people. But idek, if I could have gone any smaller than an XXS, at this rate, it probably would have had to be an xxxxxs🙄 I wouldnt trust this sizing at all.

These are just what I wanted for work! I'm 5'8", 130lbs normally. I'm currently 20 weeks pregnant and needed good work pants that will get me through the winter months. I have a few straight/skinny leg maternity pants but I wanted some flare leg pants that can go over ankle boots (shown in pic) so I can start wearing socks for winter. I'm SO happy with these pants! I have long legs and finding pants that fit with heeled boots is difficult for me. These are the perfect length for a tall girl! Also, they hug my butt well (shown in pic) and aren't baggy like I was worried about. Definitely recommend!!

These are light and flow well. I bought the size small and I am 5’5”. These are an excellent price and the elastic waist feels fantastic. If you want to wear a longer shirt you will need to tie the front loop much lower than waist level. Otherwise if you want to tie it higher, these pants work best with shorter shirts.

These are lightweight and comfortable. They hit below the ankles on me and I’m 5’5” and 145 pounds. I ordered 2 pairs because I didn’t know if they large or medium would be better. I’m keeping the medium. The large fit too but they’re not as flattering.
These are lightweight and keep my post-baby belly in without being uncomfortable or rolling down. The 16s fit perfectly. I’m 5’6” and 200 pounds. I’ll be buying more colors.
These are like wearing pjs. Super comfy, but keep in mind they’re linen so they’re sheer. I’m 165 and 5’4 and got a Large since I’m on the curvy side. They’re perfect.

These are literally my fav pants to wear! I am on the shorter side 4’11 and weigh about 135 right now at 5 months pregnant but they do not even compare to the mamafique leggings I’ve bought. I do really those as well but I enjoy the loose and breathable feeling these give me when I do not want that tight feeling. Will be purchasing my 2nd pair after this review. Love that they have pockets and I do wear them with my uggs and they don’t drag.

These are literally the most perfect 70’s style bell bottom/flare jeans on my 5’3” frame! Flattering high rise creates the illusion of a smaller waist, even if you don’t have one. Nice medium weight denim, perfect blue shade to match everything, and very, very stretchy. So stretchy in fact, that you could easily go down one size I think. So many compliments 😍. Love these!!!

These are loose fitting but are a great length. At 5’3 they come to my ankles. The stripes make these look like work pants making these very versatile. They are true to size, but baggy by design. The material isn’t heavy but isn’t too thin. Love the button fly.

These are lovely! They're soft, and have quite a bit of stretch to them. I didn't order them for me, but I will now be ordering a pair for myself, and probably in several colors, because they are so nice. We ordered a large for someone 5'6" 180lbs and they fit perfectly. They seem true to size, the large is a large, which is great. They're a good fit on the waist and hips, and very roomy on the leg, being a barrel cut and she says really comfortable because of the stretch. They come down virtually all the way to the ankle, not quite as cropped as they look in the images. Not that that's a problem as they can be turned up. Big thumbs up here.

These are lovely. I was scared to order these thinking they might be too small, but they fit great! They have plenty of stretch and best of all is-They don’t give me cam3l to3. I have to spell it like that, otherwise they won’t let this review go through. They make my Puerto Rican Bewty look real nice too. Husband approves. They also hug my not so thick thighs perfectly. For size reference I am 5’3 149 lbs. My hips are 40 inches. I have a meaty tummy and these don’t cut in so they don’t give me that unflattering muffin top. Also, they were the perfect length so I didn’t have to cut them. Girl, I have nothing but good things to say about these jeans! Go do yourself a favor and get yourself a pair. K bye.

These are made from a stretchy soft material. On my daughter who is 5'4" tall they come to her foot but do not drag on the floor. They have pockets on the sides. These are great for working out. However they are also great for wearing everyday.

These are Misses size 16 Short. I am 5'6" 170lbs. I ordered two pair. I tried one of them on and they fit, except were too big in the back waist (as expected). I usually order short, since that is exactly the right length because I never wear heels with jeans. These were the right length and fit in the leg and all around. I planned to have the waist taken in, but decided to wash one pair, to see what the shrinkage was and whether or not I should wash the other pair before having the alteration done. I thought they might shrink some, but was really floored to see how much they shrank! Now, they are way too short and too tight in the legs and too small all around. I have never had this problem before. I am returning them.
These are more high rise than mid, in my opinion. But they don’t ride up in the thigh. They’re comfortable and flattering. I’m 5’1” 110 lbs and ordered size 2.

These are more or less the exact jeans I loved and wore to death in the early 1990s. I’m almost 5’2”, 105#, not curvy, and the 24 fits perfectly. I can get into 23 as well but wanted more room. I don’t need a belt with these. The pair I received are exactly the right length, just below the ankle, but I know QC varies so I think I got lucky. They are super comfy and have nice deep usable pockets. I also appreciate that I don’t have to worry about showing my whole butt to anybody when I bend over. I’m not gonna say they’re more flattering than low- or mid-rise jeans, because they’re not, but I don’t feel like I have to take them off the second I get home and there is something to be said for that.

These are my dream jeans! I’ve been on the hunt for a high waisted rigid denim skinny jean that fit just right. These are my favorite jeans that I own. I am 6 months postpartum and have a hard time finding jeans that are curvy friendly. These are perfect! I haven’t worn them out of the house so I don’t know if they slid down but I usually have to pull my waist up anyways. For reference I am 5’4” 178lbs and ordered a large(12-14).

These are my favorite jeans. Excellent fit, very comfortable, super flattering and fun to style. I’m 5’7” with long legs so I definitely appreciate the length of these! I actually bought another pair after staining my first ones. I always get a ton of compliments in these.

These are my favorite out of the Lee brand pants! They are soft and allow my thighs room and don’t bunch up in the front or under my butt like tighter pants do! I am 5’7 & 140lbs. These are my new favorit pants. I'm petite and these fit me perfect! Unrolled, they actually fit me like ankle length jeans. They look really cute cuffed, too. I usually buy 27" or 28" inseam, then have to roll them when I wear booties or anything other than low sneakers. These fit perfectly! SIZE DOWN! I wear 14-16 in other brands & found I need to size down for Democracy jeans. I have 2 pairs of 14 democracy jeggings that were on the loose side of fitting when I got them, but stretched some after a few wears and they just don't fit like I want anymore. Sizing down they fit amazingly and still fit well after several wears. I LOVE the white contrast stitching on indigo wash! It almost didn't get these because I wanted contrast stitching and it wasn't in the item description photos. The waist is just a smidgen lower rise than the petite absolution jegging. It makes it look more Summer casual. The ankle opening is a bit wider than the absolution jegging, so they don't pucker when you cuff them. I Ab Solutely LOVE these pants and will probably buy more. I really want a light wash, too.

These are my new favorite pair of jeggings. I'm 5'7" tall and weigh 204 pounds and I got size xxl/28" inseam Indigo but theyre more of a light blue. Fit great, stretchy and comfortable. Love them so much I ordered more.

I cannot think of a negative thing to say, I like everything about them.

These are nice and stretchy. Very comfortable. I wish the vintage/ripped look was more profound on the hem, but I think with more washes that'll happen. The length and size are both good for me. I have gained a few pounds, so I feel thicker around the middle than usual. But for reference, I am 5'7" tall, 130#, and ordered size Small. These sweatpants look better on the online model than me, and look cute with a tight crop top since they are high-waisted and baggy. But I think they are generally comfy, loose sweats. I think my teenage daughter will probably steal them from me! Thank you!

These are not what I would call velvet. It's more of a stretchy weighty velvety material. This fabric will likely hold up to wear better than velvet which is more delicate. The material is surprisingly heavy in a good way, which makes them hang nicely like in a draping kind of manner. The weight also helps to make them appear well made and a good quality. I am 5' 6", usually order a 31 inseam, and the length is to the floor so taller girls it works. I am between a L and XL but usually opt for XL for bottoms as I'm a bit hippy and these have ample room. I'm pretty sure I could do a L and they would just not be as flowing. So I call this ample true to size. I should also mention there are seam pockets and they don't make my hips look bigger. The sides lie flat. I want these over my typical house clothing of leggings because I'm finding the clinginess of leggings bothers me, but I don't want to go all the way to PJ bottoms. These are very nice for the price and I'm especially pleased with the weight. These are so nice you could probably wear them out with a sparkly top such as New Years or Christmas, but for me they will be stylish lounge wear.I'm so happy with them that I'd say it's a favorite item from Amazon. They are that nice. Also may purchase a second and may try a L.

These are okay, I don’t understand why people order a size up. They fit as expected, could’ve gone down a size but the small is the smallest all they have. I’m 117 lbs and 5’5. The length is good, just fit a bit loose, I wish it was a little tighter feeling.

These are one of the most comfiest palazzos I have every purchased. You can definitely pair these with a cute tank, or t-shirt when either heading over to the beach or just to spend a day out with some friends. They can even be worn to the office. Myself being 5'2, the pants are long on me so I will have to get them altered knowing that I purchased high-rise palazzo. I have nothing else negative to say about the pants minus the fact that they are sheer, especially if you hold them up against the window. When pairing these pants to an outfit I fell you can still wear them, but wear a longer cardigan to desired length to prevent anything being seen. I dislike it when my clothes are sheer, and I prefer to wear either something underneath or over to cover them. Don't wear anything thick because these pants are to be worn in comfortable and warm weather. After all, I leave it to the buyer however they wish to wear them, the can. Overall great product in terms of appearance, quality and durability!

These are so comfortable. And beyond cute. They're a stretchy material. These are SO comfortable. The length is just right (I am 5’4”) However, you have to play a guessing game on the size. I purchased the black/blue combo pack in XL. They are both labeled XL, but the blue pants are GIGANTIC. I am not a small woman but the blue ones were way too big in the waist. The black ones fit perfectly. I can’t imagine why the factory doesn’t use some sort of size standard, but I think it comes from China and they don’t have standards so you just have to hope you’re getting what you ordered. I like the black ones though. I’ll be wearing them often! EDIT: One year later... The fabric is thin and the seams ripped due to the stitching creating a "perforated line" that splits the fabric, especially in the inner thigh. The stitching itself seems okay, I don't think the thread they used was the problem. It's the thin fabric.

I got the medium and they were a little loose and I’m normally a size 6. The smalls would have been too short to exchange so I just kept the medium. Love them!

these are SO cute and the perfect price for trying this trend. my favorite silhouette for jeans is barrel and i feel it flatters pear shapes beautifully. it's also the most comfortable imo as your thighs/hips have room and the curved shape balances out my lower legs. i love the wash and the generous pockets. i ordered two sizes up but would've been fine with one size up because i'm bottom heavy & tall, but i'll just wash/dry to hopefully shrink them a bit because i love them too much to return! a belt would also work well but i'm actually a fan of how low they sit on my hips (we love body positivity around here) i'm 5'10, fluctuate between 190 and 200 lbs, very full on the bottom (34"ish waist, 47" butt/hips) and these hit just below my calf (perfect cropped length for me)

These are SO CUTE, also it feels like wearing pajamas😭 I was concerned about sizing but I decided to order my normal XL anyway and it was the right call (I'm around 5'7, 185lbs for reference), the waistband and material are both stretchy so they're comfortable, I would literally sleep in these Also, I was honestly not expecting much in terms of quality, I just needed a quick pair of pants to wear to an event and figured I'd probably never wear them again but they by far exceeded my expectations! I will wear these every chance I get!🩷✨

These are so cute! I love them! I am close to 5'6 and they fit perfect with wedges ......so if you are petite you may have to have them tailored to you. I sized up 1 to 2 sizes for the oversized look that the model has. They are nicely made and the overall clasps come connected (I know some said they don't so they may have changed it.) material is soft and flowy...so its not like a stiff denim...this makes it very cool, soft, and comfortable. I collect bib overalls because I am an artist and they fit my personality and these are wonderful. I'm happy to add them to my collection! Couldn't love them more! Thank you! (Not wearing wedges in the picture.)

These are so cute! They are high waisted and fit perfectly, they have a functioning button and zipper but the waistband in the back also stretches. I'm on the shorter side (5'3) and I didn't even have to get them hemmed and I normally always have to. They are so soft and really worth the price I paid since I've already worn them 3 times.

These are so flattering, I wasn’t expecting them to actually be cute! I expected them to be casual and comfortable, wear around the house, lounge wear. Runs true to size chart, I ordered a size 27 in yellow. For reference I’m 5’7 approximately 140lbs, my waist measurements are approximately 26-27” my hips are 38-39” these fit perfectly! Material is thin, lightweight and so incredibly comfortable! Great quality, definitely 5-stars, highly recommend!

These are so flattering, I wasn’t expecting them to actually be cute! I expected them to be casual and comfortable, wear around the house, lounge wear. These are so good for the price! I shared them on my IG and they have been best sellers for weeks. I’m wearing a size small and I’m 5’1 and 121lbs. They are comfortable but super flattering and they fit so well!

These are so light and comfy it feels like wearing nothing. The short length is perfect for me at 5'1". I am between a medium and large but went with the large in hopes that if I have a pregnant belly soon, they'll still fit. Glad I did because the large fits well but with room to grow. Very stretchy fabric and smooth. Love them. I got black but I feel like the lighter colors will show wrinkles or cellulite more and perhaps be less flattering. These pants are modest and simple enough to be able to dress up as office/work pants.

These are soft and comfortable. However, with the high waist and smooth material good fitting underwear is ESSENTIAL, also make sure your shirt is tucked in perfectly, or wear one that needs no tucking. These have good stretch, I wear an 8 curvy L cut in jeans, these are a medium they fit my waist and stretch to accommodate my large hips and my booty. I can totally see myself enjoying these in the next few months here in Florida as it will be nice and warm, like today it's January and 80. These are lightweight and don't have that slightly stiff feeling of a pure linen pair of pants, instead they almost have a silky tendency! Now, the only drawback for me as a busy mom, is not being able to throw these into the dryer with everything else. I did wash these and then draped them across the rack to dry before trying them on again for pictures, I didn't notice any shrinkage in regular washing! I think I might need another pair for variety's sake, instead of my beloved leggings. I'm 5'10" about 160, long torso, long thighs compared to calves, for reference 4 stars because I'm being persnickity about not being able to toss in the dryer on medium with everything else.

These are soft and warm and a little stretchy…I am 4months post partum so the higher waist helps hide my mom belly. For reference, I am 5’4 and 147lbs in this pic and bought size medium . I hope to find similar ones but skinny cut to wear with my winter boots 😊

These are soft, comfortable, and super stretchy. Very high waisted with some loose fabric in the crotch area. This is a medium on me and I'm 5'2" and 123 lbs. The denim itself is great quality with subtle fading going down both legs. This comes in multiple lengths which is great for us petite folks. Two side and back standard jean pockets and a bootleg style with a slight flare at the bottom. Has 4 way stretch so moves with you very easily. A great find!

These are some lovely, elegant fancy pants, at least that’s what I called them! 😊 They do come quite wrinkled up, but nothing more than throwing them in the dryer for a few minutes to take out all the wrinkles, did the job! They are more on the thin side material but they are not see-through! For size reference I am 5’2 and 100 pounds. I ordered the extra small. They are a little bit big on me in the thigh area, I do wish they were a little bit more fitted. They do also come a little long on me too. I am wearing high heels(in the pictures) but if I were to wear flats they would be way too long, for that reason I will be tailoring them to my size. Honestly, I wish I didn’t have to go through the process of tailoring them, but unfortunately I am short, so I tend to need to do that very often. In spite of the sizing, I still would recommend these pants, honestly I don’t think it’s the pants fault that I’m short!!! 😊

These are some nice slacks that you can use for work or any casual event. They fit pretty much true to size but they do run a little long. I'm 5'4 and I'm going to need a cuff them a little bit at the bottom. Overall they fit well and look good.

These are some seriously GREAT pants. They are made of cotton, spandex, and nylon. This gives them a great weight and a fabric that doesn't wrinkle easily. They are stretchy including the waistband so they are comfortable. I got 8 which is my normal size. If you are between two sizes, get the bigger one. You have the option of choosing short length or regular length. I chose regular. I am 5'4" and this is just right. It would even be floor-length for someone a few inches taller. The pants are somewhat formal so I am curious to know how the shorter version would look, it is a personal preference. These pants will be your go-to due to how easy they are to wear. AND they are washable!!

These are some unique and cute jeans that can be dressed up or down. And they are long leg friendly!! Yes! It's hard finding pants long enough for my 32.5" inseam. I can actually wear low heels with these jeans. I ordered a Size 6 according to the sizing chart in the photos but these pants are too big. I usually wear a size 2 or 4. I am 5'10, 123 lbs, 32B-26-35 for reference. So with those measurements a size 6 should fit but these jeans are too big in the waist, butt and hip area. If you read the product description, the sizing they list there is probably more correct as they list a Size 2 with a 26" waist and 34" hips. Wish I would have read this instead of using the sizing chart in the photos. Also these are very high waisted. I have a really high waist, basically have no torso, all legs and in order for me not to have a droopy looking crotch area, I had to pull these up really high. Luckily, I know how to alter clothing to fit me the way I like so I will wash them first to see if there's any shrinkage and then take the pants in as needed.

These are soooooo awesome! Great , thick quality, super stretchy! I am overweight currently. I hate buying pants lol, I'm 5 ft 172 lbs. I'm very wide hipped. I was shocked to see this XL is almost too baggy on my hips.

These are soooooo perfect and flattering and amazing!! I got the Navy, Size 3 Long (I am 5’8” and 120 lbs). I never have luck buying pants online but I am obsessed and will be getting more colors. ❤️

These are stretchy and comfortable while looking everyday business casual. They have the feel of sweatpants but the look of a fitted pant, nice! I have PCOS and my abdomen sometimes swells so fitted pants can be uncomfortable, these look great and feel easy to wear I also love that the band is nice and thick which means it isn't uncomfortable. There are belt loops for a belt too. They are very thick, definitely a winter pant. The fabric is nice and soft, doesn't bunch and is overall very comfortable. I ordered exactly to the size chart and it feels spot on. They fit perfectly. I have a 35 inch waist and a 44in hip, the XL fit perfect. It also wasn't too long on my petite legs.
These are stretchy and light weight. I am a 22/24W and the XXXL fit me perfect. I am so 5’10” and they were long enough. I loved the high waist on them. The only thing missing is/was pockets!

These are such nice, corduroy pants! I got them for my granddaughter, age 15, who really liked the look of them on Amazon. She’s wearing an adult size 8-10, and is very picky about what she likes to wear for school. Meaning, they had to be black. Haha. Seriously, though, black is her signature color, as she proudly proclaims. She loves that these are cargo pants, and also that they’re corduroy, rather than plain old denim. The corduroy is thin-wale, and the fabric is very soft, making it a perfect, cozy feel for Fall/Winter. The pants fit her perfectly, too. The fabric has a nice bit of stretch in the waist, but not obviously so - it’s just enough to stretch over the hips, then fit her perfectly in the waist. The length is even great! So many pants are too long on even average-size women/girls. These are a tiny bit long on my 5’4” granddaughter, but she prefers them to be long and slouchy. She’s a tough sell these days, but she is honestly delighted with these pants. The price of $34.99, as of this writing, is very reasonable for a quality-made pair of pants. These are machine wash and dry, perfect for a busy family with 3 kids. I’m very pleased with these pants.

These are super comfortable and I’ll definitely be wearing them to work. The short length is great for my 5’2 frame. Only drawback for me is the waist was a little big. I wish it sat a tad higher on my waist since the crotch part of the pants hangs low. Haven’t washed them yet but other reviews mention not ironing the pants so I’ll steer clear of doing that.

These are super comfortable and stretchy. The fabric is thinner than I expected, but still good quality. I’m 5’6 and usually wear a 12. These are the perfect length, but the waist is a little loose, and I can imagine that it’ll get looser as I wear them. Maybe size down if you’re shorter.

These are super comfortable and super flattering. I am between a small and a medium but in general, medium pants are the best fit for me. These are a bit loose in the waist, so I’d say they run a touch large, but not much. I’m 5’6” and these just hit the floor, so if you are taller, they will be short!

These are super comfortable pants. I did get the extra large and there are a little bit on the big side. I'm not a pregnant individual. I am 5'7, 190 lb. So, I'm a chunky lady. So, I thought a pair of pants like this would give me that little extra around the top. I wish I would have ordered the L instead of the XL. It's a little big around the legs and a little bit loose on the waist. But, the length is good and the quality is there. They're a nice boot cut so you can wear them with pretty much any kind of shoe . These are nice jeans. I'm still going to wear them even though they're a little bit loose and I'll just add a belt. It'll look great with a sweater. I like the fact that they are thicker and we're going into a season that's cold. They might be a little heavy for summer time. But all in all, they are really nice jeans. If you have a bigger tummy or you're pregnant it'll be nice because you've got that little extra elastic on the sides. I pulled it out the top to see how far it would go and it really had a lot of give.

These are super comfy and have a wonderful high waist. I am 5’4 and 115lbs. I got the small, which is a little baggy. I think an XS would be a better fit. Otherwise, I love them very much. I love the color. I got them because they remind me of the athleisure trend. I feel “ hip” when I wear them into town!

These are super comfy, soft and a lot thicker than I expected- however the left pocket was not sewn together so there’s a hole to my leg so I’ll have to sew it. Also the crotch area fits weirdly, not very flattering but they will make great lounge pants. I always wear a medium (I’m 5’4 145 lbs) but I probably should’ve ordered a small instead. Overall for the price - I would recommend these joggers!

These are super cute and comfy jeans. They look better than the picture I posted. Very trendy, I get compliments every time I wear them. They are stretchy so I could have gone with a small. I’m 5’8” and 150 ish.
These are super cute and stretchy. I’m 5’2, 155lbs and a 30 fits me perfect. Love these, I will definitely be getting more

These are super cute jean shorts. Just the perfect stretch to the soft comfortable cotton fabric. Nice rich black color. These are just as advertised. Very flattering and comfortable booty shorts. I didn't notice any fabric riding up in the crotch etc. They are well made. I ordered my usual size medium. I love these little shorts! For reference I am 6' tall, 35 B, 27 W, 36 H, and 143-145 lbs.
These are super cute, they are great beach/summer pants, I order a size up 2x, I'm 5ft 6in 183lb, they are lose in the front, perfect fit in the back, just tie the front tie tighter for a loser fit.
These are super cute. I’m 5ft tall and the length is great for me. The material is flowey and comfortable. The design on this one is very cute and summery.

These are super fun and comfortable. I wanted to look cute while lounging around the house, but I would even dress these up to go out in. I got a size large and they have a little extra room in the waist. I usually wear a medium, size 8. 5’7 and around 160lbs

These are super soft and comfortable. I got a medium. I'm 5'6" ish and 145 with curves. They hit just at the floor, which I like some jeans to kind of drag a bit with sandals. I did put on a heeled boot and still looked good as far as length. They have stretch but not too much. I've had them on all day and they didn't stretch out any further. For the price they are cute. The color was a little lighter than I wanted. I may buy them again in another wash.

These are super soft and comfortable. The stretchy waistband is of course comfortable, but also ensures a great fit. I love the pockets. These are so easy just to throw on and be done. I will say they are a tad bit see-through. I sized down because I didn't want them super flowy. I'm about a size 10 in bottoms, 165 lb at 5'6", wearing a medium.

These are super soft and comfy! I’m 25 weeks pregnant and the waistband fits great and come up super high on my waist! (I’m 5” 4’ And about 145lbs right now) I got the large to be safe! For me personally the length is manageable! I haven’t washed them yet, so I think once they are washed and dried the length will probably be perfect!

These are super soft. I love the way they fit. I am 5'9" and weight 205. They are stretchy, which makes them very comfy at work all day. They are just long enought for me to wear flats with. Love the color and the distress. Quailty is very good. Highly recommend.

These are super stretchy and comfortable. They are a thin denim. All of the pockets are functional which is always a plus!! I’m 5’4 and they hit me about 2 inches above my ankle. I love the little flair at the bottom. I do have an issue with the zipper staying up. But overall, I’m really pleased with these!

These are super super cute and did the job I needed for pictures. I debated buying these for so long and stressed on the size. I have a 10 month old and hate my belly. I’m 215lbs 5,7”. These are super thick and comfy. I am 5’7”, 125lbs and typically a size 4. These are a medium and fit similar to the models in the picture. I love them so much ♥️

These are sure to become my favorite pants! They are so comfy and cool looking! People have thought I was wearing a skirt rather than pants. I am 5ft 4in and was worried that they would be dragging on the floor, as is often the case. These fall perfectly to the tops of my feet. Absolutely a perfect length. Other reviewers have mentioned that the elastic waistline does not have a lot of stretch and I would agree with that. They do stretch, but not drastically. They are perfect for me with an around 35in waistline. For reference, I generally wear a 14-16, or XL, and am around 175lbs with a curvy shape, but not a lot of definition in the waistline. I want these in all available colors. Love them!

These are surprisingly thick for a legging. I wouldn’t be concerned at all about them being transparent. Also I feel like they would be pretty sturdy and warm (once again considering that they are leggings). However I used the size chart and other reviews to determine that I needed a medium. Clearly they are too small for me. I’m 9 weeks postpartum. So a lot of my weight is in my belly. This isn’t high enough or low enough to accommodate my belly. It hits at a terrible spot, I don’t really feel like these are a high rise. Maybe a midrise. They are also extremely tight in the belly and crotch area. I was going to return them but I decided to keep them in hopes they fit when I’m thinner. Currently I am 145 pounds. I’m 5 foot 4 inches. I would say a majority of my excess weight is in my belly. So maybe a large would have been better. I’m really disappointed that they don’t fit now.

These are the absolute best sweatpants I’ve ever bought. I’m 5’10 and 205 but hot damn. These sweats are perfect for the gym or casual errands. They are soft and durable. The quality is wild for the price. I just bought another pair. Save your time and just buy 2. 5/5. They wash well and don’t have a weird smell. The only weird thing was that they arrived in a see through package.

These are the best fitting jeans I have found in a long time! I am 5’3” and they are the perfect length! Lots of stretch for my thighs, not too much give in the waist or butt after multiple wears. Wish I could find them without rips!!! Only issue is that they came in a lighter wash than what I thought.

These are the BEST jeans I have ever owned in my life. I can never find a pair of jeans that fit right -- too big, too small, too long, too low, always falling down etc... These are perfect. I am 5'2" and 135-140lbs. I carry a bit of bulk in my bottom and thighs. I've had 4 kids so have a mama pouch that I needs tamed. I don't tuck shirts in so the elastic waist doesn't bother me at all. It will occasionally roll down in half if Ive been sitting a while but for the most part is high enough to be slimming but not so high that it acts like the bottom part of your bra. Length? I purchased the 4-Short and for someone with short legs, it's a perfect length. This is unheard of for me! The jeans are soft with a perfect amount of stretch. I have gone from hating to wear jeans to now owning 3 of these pairs. If you are a short, curvy lady..... don't hesitate to purchase!!

These are the best office pants I’ve found. They look dressier than just different colored jeans. They are made out of a slightly thicker material than just jeggings which is much more flattering to the figure. There is enough stretch, and they are thick enough to hold everything in with out lumps or dimples. I have curves and thicker legs so some jeggings make my legs just look like stuffed lil sausages. I gained and then lost a significant amount of weight, and now that I’m 40, being able to smooth out lumps and bumps without shapewear is really important to me. I bought a size 8 and the fit was perfect for my 5ft 3in 145-148lb frame. I am still a little wider in the stomach from having my baby a few months ago, so if you have a very narrow waist, then you might have a little gap in the back since they are pull on without buttons/drawstring etc. For me though, they were PERFECT for my post partum post weight loss middle aged lady body.

These are the best pants I own. The material hangs nicely and it’s super comfortable. I don’t feel like my waist is being strangled. I will wear these around the house, to walk dogs, and even to run errands. I will be ordering every pair. I am 5'5", 135 and a medium fits perfectly. I even throw these in the dryer and the length doesn't shrink up on me.

These are the best pants! I love the fabric, the fit, and I'll be ordering more asap. I got the size M in the color white and they fit me well. I am typically size 4-6, 29" waist, 41" hips, 25" inseam, 5'0" tall. These fit me perfectly and have plenty of stretch so I could have possibly sized down to the S. The white jeans are not transparent or see through. They wash and dry well. I cannot say enough good things about these pants, especially considering how hard jeans are to find when you are petite. Can't wait to get the other colors! Worth every penny!
These are the BEST work pants EVER. I have 2 pairs now and I am ordering all the colors. They are SO comfortable and flattering. I got a size 2. I’m 5’5..125lbs.

These are the cutest barrel jeans!!! Get them!!! I’m 5’4 and the length is perfect. Not much stretch. I ordered the darker ones and went up 2 sizes due to other reviews that I read. Glad I did- these fit perfectly!!

these are THE dress pants that i have been dreaming of. i am 5’9” curvy build with thick calves, wide hips, and long legs. pants never fit. these are cute on the butt and wide all the way down. i can even wear heels and not look like i’m borrowing somebody else’s pants. i can finally have the sleek oversized business attire look because the pants actually fit me the way they’re supposed to. i ordered the XXL and i’m normally an XL in items but the material is stretchy so they’re probably true to size cause the waist would stretch too. my measurements are roughly 41 33.5 48. i will be ordering more in other colors and i will be recommending this to all my tall and curvy friends. BUY THESE PANTS.

These are the exact same fit & style as the Abercrombie 90’s relaxed jean. They fit great in the waist so there isn’t a gap in the back like most jeans have. I wear 27 inch waist jeans and the size 6 fit me perfect.

These are the grey ones, I got the black ones a few days ago. The black ones arrived Thusday night, Friday I wore them to work, and Saturday I wore them to run a frozen toes 5K. These are geavy pants! They weigh about 2lbs! They hide every flaw and look professional. I am 5'6 1/2 and weigh 170.

These are the holy grail of function meets fashion. I was nervous as I waited for these to come in because I hate having to exchange clothes online. Any woman on here who is 5’4” and 135lbs knows the struggle of pants. I range from a small to a large on basically everything, which makes shopping a nightmare. Enter: these pants. I got a medium in the black and navy blue and will probably buy three more pairs. They fit perfectly. If you’re on the fence: just buy the pants. Trust me.

These are THE HOLY GRAIL of maternity shorts. They are soooooo comfortable and fit great! I am 5’2” and 215. I got the XL and they fit pretty large, but not large enough to return. I might get another pair and get a large as well because I love them! They are soo stretchy. The leg bands are not tight at all. Seriously so amazing. Buy them!!!

These are THE HOLY GRAIL of maternity shorts. They are soooooo comfortable and fit great! I am 5’2” and 215. I got the XL and they fit pretty large, but not large enough to return. I might get another pair and get a large as well because I love them! They are soo stretchy. The leg bands are not tight at all. Seriously so amazing. Buy them!!!

These are the jeggings ive been needing!!! I have bought so many over the years and have fallen in love but there is always something that is off. These are perfect! The waist band is yoga perfect. Doesnt roll down! Its high waisted enough. True to size. Wont rip having a nice strong fabric. Being pure blue they look like dark wash jeans. The seller answers all your questions so quickly and accurately! (Sizing in the questions btw) I ordered a large and it fits great! I think medium will be my next purchase as im loosing more weight and don't mind it a bit tighter on the waist. Don't get me wrong though the large is perfect. Im size 12 jeans. 5'8 there is even length to spare but not so much that it bunches a bunch. My knee area always seems to have that wrinkle - pants cant get tight enough there for me but its not to where I dont want to wear them which is the case for alot of others. Edit: i ordered another color. Just as awesome!!!

These are the most comfortable jeans! They fit true to size, don't stretch out but give just enough during the day to be comfy. I normally wear a size 2 in mid-rise jeans and that's what I ordered. I'm 5'4" and weigh 119. I'll be buying more.

These are the most comfortable maternity jeans ever!! These fit perfectly. They are a little loose in the butt area but I know I will fill these in and I think I could wear these until the third trimester. I wish they had more colors, I’d buy them all. These will definitely be my fat pants after the baby is here! I’m 5’4 and 165 pre pregnancy, and about 175 now and I got a large.

These came out great, they feel heavy duty and the definitely do the job, they are pretty hot to be in during hot weather but that's to be expected from pants like these, I took these out for a 2 day hike and they held up great, I felt like I could abuse these as much as I liked and they would still hold up. There are a few specific aspects of the pants that I will go over: 1. The knee pads: Trying to insert the knee pads will cause you to re-evaluate your entire life but once you understand the technique it's not a big deal, other than that they function great and really protect your knee when kneeling, only complaint is that they are very hard and inflexible so they can get uncomfortable when sitting. 2. The size: I measured my waist before ordering and ordered a 34" waist size, but when I tried the pants on, they were too loose on my waist even after tightening the waist adjustment mechanism, so I was forced to use a belt (which I was planning on using anyway so it wasn't that bad). 3. Overall comfort when walking: While walking in these pants after a while I noticed that the extra reinforcement material on the crotch area in the back of the pants would fold into itself and would bother me so I had to readjust it every once in a while, also the material of the pants is not very stretchy but I didn't find it bothering.

These capris are less high waisted than they are wide legged. I like the more modern, casual fit; comfortable without looking too frumpy. They are 95% cotton, which is rare these days. They did not shrink after washing in cold and hanging to dry. Although I am purposely choosing to roll with the slightly wrinkled look for a more causal vibe. This look is ideal for warm weather when a skirt or shorts could be warn without the concern of showing your legs. Yes please. I ordered a small, although I usually wear a medium or 6 in pants. There really isn't a need for a belt, but it does jazz up the overall look and was a thoughtful accompaniment. The belt is brown 'pleather' and looks surprisingly decent. But with the elastic waist band in the back, a belt really isn't necessary. There are belt loops that run around the entire waistband. I like the simple styling of the two front pockets. but feel the cut in the back makes my rear look a little pancake-like and baggy. I have short legs and am 5'7", 138. The size small is quite ample. Anyone smaller would for sure want an XS, which I do not believe is available. These capris will be a welcome addition to my spring/summer wardrobe. I love a good neutral color and appreciate the simple style, comfort and the modern, wide leg-look.

I'm already planning on ordering more colors because finding jeans that fit this well can be such a challenge.

These casual pants are easy to wear and very comfortable. I’m 5’9 and hate “high water” pants, even if it’s part of the intentional design, so I really like that Gap offers a tall version so I can get them in my preferred length. They do fit me a bit funny around the waist/upper hips, but they aren’t meant to be high fashion or snug so I don’t mind. These are perfect for errands around town or on vacation when you want to be comfortable in your own skin.

These cotton work pants are a nice weight cotton fabric, and very comfortable. They do require a little ironing after washing and drying because they do wrinkle some. Being 97% cotton, the pants did shrink when washed on cool and dried on light. Inside seams are straight going down pantleg. Two front and two back pockets hold my cell phone without falling out. The drawstring is a nice addition if you need to tighten the pants. The elastic around the waist doesn't bunch or irritate my skin. The length is perfect for a 5' 2 height.

These cropped pants look great and fit great. I am 5"6 and usually around 112 pounds and so ordered a 4, and the fit was perfect. They are classy looking pants and are great for work or casual. Love that they are comfortable, look good with ankle boots, and come in so many colors!

These denim jeggings feel like they’re made well. The fabric is thick, but still very stretchy and easy to move in. I’m 5’8”, 150lbs, and pear-shaped with a 31.5” waist and 44” hips. The “L-XL” size fits my legs, thighs, and butt perfectly. The waist comes up a bit higher on my torso than I expected and feels a little loose, but I could imagine that if it were tighter, it might create muffin top, which I don’t want. I’m very happy with my purchase and would recommend these jeggings!

These denim shorts are nice. The fabric has great stretch making them comfortable and they are a little longer than some of the other denim shorts I own. I got a bigger size because I wanted them to be comfortable and it's possible due to the stretch I could have sized down. Regardless, they are loose and comfortable and a great summertime staple to have. I'm 5'3" , 115#s wearing a size 4.

These destroyed jeans are amazing! The front pockets are full size so you can fit your entire cell phone in them. They're very on trend especially for about $35, the stretch is perfect and holds up. I'm 5'6" and 150 lbs and the medium fit perfectly.

These do have a pretty good jean look and real back pockets are . I find they fit true to the size chart provided. They are very long though. I'm 5'6" and these are folded over twice at the bottom so there is about an extra 5" of length on mine. I don't prefer the folded look but for the value and comfort I'll make it work!

These do not fit like the pictures, but that’s expected for a bigger gal ordering clothes when the models are not. I’m 5’4 and the length was good, right under ankles . I weigh ~230 and the XL did not fit well. I do have a lot going on in the back, and the waist dipped at my spine. It also didn’t fluff cutely at my waist. The pink color was super cute, but the material was thin and shows all lines and bumps and curves. It is hard to see the color from the lighting in my pictures. Not what I was looking for to wear to work. Probably will return and not reorder.

These dressy shorts fit nicely, hang well. For reference, I was 5'6", 39.5" hips, these are size M. I have a thing I do that shorts need to be "fingertip length" or longer, these are right there.

These ended up being the perfect length! Got a medium, I’m about 5’5” and was worried I’d have to wear heals but luckily my black sneakers height worked fine. The bell bottoms even covered them for them most part so they didn’t pull attention away from my outfit. The lining inside was super comfortable and they were made high quality considering they are sequins. Overall very impressed. Bought the color apricot and will be buying a pair in black!

These ETTELO cargo jeans are so cute and on trend. I'm obsessed with high waist jeans now, so absolutely love that! Nice deep pockets that I can fit my hands into comfortably, too! Sizewise, I followed the chart and got a size 10. I have a 30" waist and 36" hips. I wore these all day and found as the day went on the stretch stretches a bit, so I feel a size 8 would have fit me better, but belting did work fine. I'm 5'6" weigh125#. The length came to around my ankles, so I have to wear a flatter shoe - a low slide/sandal for summer will be perfect. The material is nice and soft. I washed in cold and drip dried as the instructions indicated - no shrinking. I do recommend these jeans, really cute!

These faux leather shorts are cute and fit well. They are pretty stretchy all over (including the waist), so they'll easily accommodate different shaped bodies. They seem well made (seams seem strong) and the zipper runs smoothly. The outside 'leather' is a little shiny (iridescent (?)) looking with a bit of a woven fabric pattern (it is not a smooth looking finish). I took an up close pic of the pocket area so you can see the material's finish. I like the way the material looks. The inside of the shorts is the backside of the 'leather' and it's a soft polyester/nylon feeling material, so the 'leather' isn't touching your skin, but the shorts are not lined with a separate material. I took a pic that I hope shows what I'm talking about.I ordered a size L (my normal size) based on their size chart and they fit comfortably (I have a 32" waist and 40" hips). They fit true to size. If you are in between sizes and want a comfortable fit, I would say size up and if you want a more skin tight fit, then size down. The tag says you can hand wash them or wash them inside out on the delicate cycle. They came pretty wrinkled (I haven't washed them yet and the pics show the way they arrived), so I think I'll need to wash and gently steam these to smooth them out. These are fun shorts that will go with a variety of tops and shoes (or knee high boots).luvamia Womens Shorts Trendy High Waisted Faux Leather Look Stretchy Jean Shorts Short Denim Pants with Pockets Comfy (Black, L)

These feel great: comfortable, stretchy denim with real front and back pockets. I love that they come in long sizes that are long enough for me (5’10” and 170lbs)! I ordered 2 colors of the same size (10L), and the waist band was vastly different causing a completely different fit between the two. Unfortunately, I need something between them so they’re both going back. Otherwise, they’d be exactly what I’m looking for.

These feel like a great pant and quality. They feel like they will keep their shape and not stretch like crazy. From just trying them on I feel they do run a touch small. I am 5’1” and 115lbs. I got size 26 short and they fit perfect for length- still a bit snug around the waist. I did order 25s and that was absolutely not happening. I wear a size 2 in Old Navy and American Eagle jeans.

These feel so soft and I love the elastic waistband . Looks dressy but feels like pjs . Bought another pair! The length is perfect too. I normally wear a size 10 and I’m 5’7. I ordered large long in these and it was perfect fit. Worth every penny!

These feel very thin yet even though I got a light color, you still can't see through them. Perfect summer work pant. I'm 5'8" 132 lbs and the length on these is just right to wear with heels or flats without hemming. The waist does hang a bit so I have to wear a belt with them but I appreciate the room through butt and thighs. The pockets are deep and the waist doesn't get gappy at the back. I do like these a lot. The only draw back is that they arrive with creases from being folded in the package and even after washing them those creases are still there. I suggest steaming them before wearing.

These festive jeans fit me like a glove. I am 5ft 2in 120 pounds. I bought a size medium for a little bit of room for my hips and thighs. I wore a belt to keep them tight around my waist because they are stretchy. I’m just hoping the red doesn’t bleed so probably wouldn’t put in washing machine.
These fit amazing! I like them better then my normal shorts even when I’m not pregnant. I got a large and I am 5”7 and normally weigh 175 before baby.

These fit amazingly. Thwy have high elasticity to them, the mediums are just a little loose on me but that's fine. These fit fantastic! Great basic jean, lightweight and stretchy so perfect for summer! Im 5'4" and 160lbs, ordered a size 8. I plan to cut a few more inches off the bottom to make them shorter.

These fit great in the waist and I love the wide legs. They aren’t super long, I’m 5’7 and have a blocky heel on in the photo. These have just enough stretch, not too much but the perfect amount. The material is also a nice thickness.

These fit great- were actually a true white- but too see through! You can see the outline of the pockets and zipper. Bummed- returned! For size reference im 5 foot 2 and 124 pounds. Medium fit perfect.

These fit just right & are comfy plus look nice.! I am 61 and I have that mommy pouch at the belly also I’m 5ft 7in, 170lbs and typically wear size 14 so I got these pants in an XL.. Currently the beige is the only XL but I will checkin for other colors, I am just so happy these are long enough and must actually be the 32in inseam as advertised..

These fit like a glove ! I’m wearing a size 32. They are 99% cotton 1% elastin so they have a rigid feel with a TINY amount of stretch which is exactly how I like my jeans to fit. I’m 5’5 for reference if between sizes I would size up. I’m typically a size 12/31 I did a 32 in these.
These fit like a glove, thin material stretchy and comfy like pjs!!! I’m 5’6 && 200lbs Length is perfect with boots. I got a XL so it’s true to size.

These fit me great around the waist and hips but the inseam lengths are a mess. For reference I am 5’4”, fluctuate between 135-140lbs and normally take a 6/28 (or a 4/27 in Madewell). I am keeping them and may have them hemmed but with shoes the length seems ok. They fit great in the hard to fit areas with a good amount of stretch but something is fishy with the inseams.
These fit me perfect and are super comfortable. I’m 5ft7 and 147 pounds. The medium fits perfect. Highly recommend!

These fit me perfectly. I’m obsessed. Size 10 or 12 pants, usually. About 170lbs and 5’6” and got the 30 Regular. These Levi’s have such a nice height on the waist. Perfectly covers and shapes the pelvis and tummy and lands right at juuuust above the navel on me. That area of denim is shaping as well as the rear. Kinda cinches at the natural waist and a bit more under the rump than other styles. At the waist, there’s almost a V-shaped waistline and I think that also aids in concealing the love handles area. The denim is very sturdy and while they’re not stretchy like some other cheap brands, they will conform to your body and have just enough give as to not be constricting. I got some kind of light indigo color - it’s pretty and would probably go with any top or shoe style. I love how the ankle isn’t suffocating like traditional skinny jeans! I wanted a tighter leg but tiny bit of give at the ankle (unlike the “straight” styles with is way too loose) and these fit the bill. The regular in a 30 is 30 for length as well and is AMAZING on me. Not too short at all. Front pockets are pretty short and useless but I don’t care the rest is a dream! These can be worn dressed up or down.

These fit my teletubby shaped body like a glove & feel so comfortable. Got the jean colored ones & then ordered the black. 5'5, 182lbs. Xl is perfect. Wearn your shirt out & no one will know that these aren't real denim jeans.

These fit okay and looked cute, but they didn't look a lot like leather and they were too shiny, not matte like the pic. Also, there were holes in both pockets. Also, the waist was big and the hips were snug, but the waist does have a drawstring to make more fitting. I thought they were a good length and I'm 5' 3.5". They weren't too long. I just would've liked them to look more like leather, instead of plastic and be less shiny, but they did fit cute. Also, they did have a pungent, strong odor, but that went away after a few days. I just hung them on a hanger in a room (not a closet).

These fit perfect, they were a great fit for a night out. They’re actually very stretchy and not too thick which made them so comfy! Approved for wide waisty girlies! I’m 5’5 with wide hips and larger bum so i got an XL!
These fit perfect! I'm 5'7 150 lbs I got a Large. Beautiful jeans.
These fit perfectly if you have long legs. I bought size small long, I’m 5’7
These fit perfectly im normally a 3x and the waist was a perfect fit . They are super long since and I’m 5’6 but I’m wearing with some boots and they hit the floor perfectly
These fit PERFECTLY! I’m 5’9 so pants are usually too short for me but there are a perfect fit length wise and around the waist. I got a size M! Stretchy, comfy, and adorable

These fit perfectly. I read reviews that suggested I should size down and I am so glad I did. I bought the 4 (small). For reference, I am 133 lbs, waist 32-33”, hips 38-39” and I am 5’4”. Sizing is a little weird for me because my waist is fluffier than I would like and I usually have to pick between waist size or hip size on a size chart. These jeans are very forgiving for mom tummies. The high waist is perfect. Keeps everything snug but not uncomfortably tight. I decided to go with the small because I am shorter at 5.4”. The length of perfect. I put a bootie (maybe 3” heel) and the length is perfect. I am very happy with these jeans. They are snug but stretchy and the fabric is very comfortable. Love the designs on the pant legs. Super happy with this purchase. I recommend sizing down especially if you are short. However, the thighs are a little tight. I looked at the size chart and actually measured my thigh before I ordered. If you have bigger or muscular thighs, consider measuring or stay with your normal size. Also pics aren’t great and I was only wearing one shoe
These fit perfectly. I am 195lbs and 5'6" and they fit great, feel good, and hide my C-section pooch. I ordered a size 16. Couldn't be happier and I'm ordering more right now!

These fit really great. They have a great stretch for curvy bodies. I'm 5'1" and the 12 Short fit me perfectly. My only complaint is after 3 wears and washes the upper inner thigh is already showing wear. Not sure how much longer they'll last. Disappointing.
These fit so comfortably! I wish they were a little longer, but I could wear these all day. 5’8” 155lbs got a size 29

These fit SO GOOD❣️ True too size I’m 5”3 135lbs and I got the size 26 black “waterless” stretchy type skinny Jean. For those of us with thicker thighs or booties these do NOT FLATTEN, SQUISH OR GIVE YOU THAT ABOUT TO RIP AT THE SEAMS FEELING! At ALL They actually fit like a glove and I think give a little lift! Definitely recommend ❣️❣️

These fit SO well and the fabric feels a lot more expensive than Amazon prices!! They have a high waist and stretchy waistband in the back. They have pockets, which I love, however there aren't any belt loops. That's the only downside to these. I'm 5'6" with a long torso and typically wear a small. I'm wearing a small in the black and I'd say they have about a 3.5 to 4 inch inseam. Love them!!
These fit so well- I am fairly short (5’6) and I definitely needed heels or they dragged the ground. I got a ton of compliments and I would own every pair if I could.
These fit so wonderfully and they are SOFT!! I am 5’3” 185 lbs. and bought a L so they are nice and stretchy! The raw hem is super cute!

These fit surprisingly well. A little loose at the waist, but a belt helps that. Not too long (I’m 5’1) so that’s a nice feature too. Most jeans are always way too long. I like these very much and recommend them.

These fit true to size for me, I ordered the Large. I am 5’9” and 175 and carry my weight in my stomach and these fit me nicely. I would actually order these or this brand again if they all fit like this. Nice jean material, with no blemishes that I have been able to find.

These fit true to size for me, I ordered the Large. I am 5’9” and 175 and carry my weight in my stomach and these fit me nicely. I would actually order these or this brand again if they all fit like this. Nice jean material, with no blemishes that I have been able to find.

These fit very cute. They’re a sweatpant like feeling material but look very professional. You wouldn’t know they’re that material until you touch them. I will definitely buy more colors. I typically wear an 8/10 and I got a medium. I’m wondering if a small wouldve fit me in the waist better. I’m usually a 29/30 in pants .. I’m 5’6 150 lbs for reference!

These fit very true to size. I am usually a 10 or a 30, and ordered the 30 in these and they fit very comfortably. Unfortunately mine had some weird lines in the fabric so I will be returning them. They are very comfortable though. For reference I am 5’8” 155 lbs.

These fit well and are comfortable, but look and feel cheap. The color inside is lighter than the outside, and shows through the pants, which dulls the outside color. I wonder if a black pair would be more opaque. They don't give me a muffin top, but I do have to pull them down slightly to avoid camel toe. Because they're thin they do show some lumps and bumps. I have a 28" inseam, and these seem to be at least 2" longer. I'm 5'3", 153 lbs, 38-32-42. I normally wear a size 10-12 in pants, and I bought a size Large.

These fit well and are super cute. The material is thin but layered and flowy, not see-through. Pockets are super convenient and the pants are very comfortable. I am 5'3" and have trouble with pants being too long, but I don't trip over these.
These flare jeans provided alot of stretch and are comfortable. I loved the way the jeans complimented my curvey figure. I am 5'2 and ordered a Large and weigh 166 lbs. Perfect fit and good quality.

These green and white checkered pants are adorable, comfortable and unique. Even though they're available on Amazon, you're unlikely to end up in a room with anyone else wearing them. The denim is on the thinner side if you compare them with typical jeans (Levis, etc.) but they're not too lightweight to wear in average NYC fall temperatures. They're a slightly stretchy, medium-wight twill. I ordered a 6 based on the size chart but should have listened to Amazon's advice when they said to get a 4. If Amazon makes a recommendation, I would follow it over the manufacturer's size chart in this instance. For reference, I'm 5'8", 110 lbs, 26" waist, 35" hip, 33" inseam. I do like the length, although according to the size chart it's the same for the 4 and 6. It's a 32" inseam according to my measurement but feels longer. I'm not accounting for the rise, which is average. I expected it to be shorter as I assumed these were going to be cut like junior's pants, but to my relief they're not. Maybe I'll wash them in warm water and tumble dry to tighten them up a bit. They're 98% cotton so they should shrink somewhat if you want them to. However, the green dye is already running into the white so it might be best to use cold water. I love the flare—they're as close to bell bottoms as I've seen in this century. They're wider than a boot cut unless the footwear in question is moon boots. They're unhemmed and have fashionably frayed ends but there's a line of subtle stitches 1/4" above the bottom to keep the fabric from further fraying. There are five functional pockets in all: two traditional jean pockets on the rump and two stitched round pockets in front, plus one small coin pocket, and there are belt loops that can accommodate a range of belt widths. For such an unusual, comfortable pair of jeans $39.99 seems reasonable if you like the way they fit. Again, my only concern is that the green dye will bleed into the white.
