These had a LOT of stretch and were SHORT with a saggy crotch area. I ordered a LARGE but I usually wear MEDIUM in pants because I wasn't sure hot stretchy or long they would truly be. The large fit ok, they were much more stretchy than expected, so I recommend either going with your typical size or sizing DOWN. I am 5'5" and these were a bit of high-water on me when I wore them comfortably above my hips. I had to pull them up a lot through the night so the crotch wasn’t down to my knees. Not sure if washing them will reset the material.

These harem pants are 95% polyester 5% spandex and so comfortable!! I am 5ft2in, 191 lbs, 40in waist, 47in hip. I usually order an XL in pants and so that’s what I ordered. I am happy with the XL fit. The waist elastic is very comfortable. They are a little long even with 3in heels on, so I will take them up a couple of inches and they won’t drag the floor. They will be fine for taller gals. They have pockets on the hips that lay flat and don’t stick out making your hips look larger. I washed them in cool water with like colors and tossed them in the dryer on medium heat. No color run and they came out without wrinkles. I ordered the Orangeflower print and there are plenty of colors in that print to choose from to coordinate whether I wear them in the fall or in the spring. I love them! So groovy!

These high waist straight leg ripped jeans are a stylish and trendy staple in my wardrobe. I'm 5'2" and knee holes are well-placed, unlike other pants this style that are typically made for taller people. These jeans don't have much stretch and give a bit of the camel toe effect because they're so high waisted. The leg length is perfectly tailored, and I can wear them with sneakers, booties, or even flip-flops.

These high-waisted straight-leg jeans are fantastic! The great stretch and tummy control features make them incredibly comfortable and flattering. At 5'4", the length is perfect for me. These lightweight jeans are both trendy and practical, quickly becoming my go-to pair. Highly recommended!

These hot pink bell bottoms are perfect for any concert or bachelorette trip! They fit very true to size and are not too long to wear with low boots. I am 5’6” and they were perfect length. They are slightly frayed at the bottom.

These jeans are a different design with the barrel legs, which make them a fun pair to wear. I love the pockets even if the front pockets aren't that deep; the ones in back fit my phone perfectly, so the front will work for my car key and my lip gloss. These jeans are a very cute with an on trend style. They have cargo pockets on the legs, plus the usual 2 front pockets and 2 back pockets which are all roomy. These jeans are absolutely FABULOUS! They make me feel awesome and the quality is EXCELLENT! If you want to trust a review, let it be this one. You will not be disappointed! BTW ~ I’m 5’9 and 135 lbs - I ordered a size 7 and they were perfect.

These jeans are actually really nice. I am always a little skeptical when ordering clothes online. Although I have found some of my favorite items right here. These jeans are stretchy and look really cute on. They hug all the right places and look just as pictured. For size reference I am 5'3 130lbs my measurements are bust 36 waist 31" hips 39" and a size small fit perfectly. I like that these can be dressed up or down depending on your plans. The length is perfect and that isn't usually the case so I am thrilled. I am thinking of ordering anothe style in the lighter color. I really dont need another pair but I really like these so I may splurge. They are nice quality the jean material isnt rough or heavy. I would say they are in my top 5 favorites for sure!

These jeans are adorable! I got lots of compliments. I am usually between sizes and I sized up because I can't stand jeans that cut into me or are snug around the knees. They fit great. Loose enough to be comfortable but not so loose that they were falling off. I wear all my pants wide-legged. I usually don't wear jeans and I wore these three times on vacation. I am 5'9 and they are roughly ankle length. As you can see in the picture my Tom's were showing but I didn't feel like my ankles were exposed. The fabric is truly denim but relatively thin so it didn't weigh my luggage down.

These jeans are amazing! Light weight denim, nice blue color options, stretchy but hold their shape, nice wide leg. As a shortie (5ft) these are a fuller length denim on me, to my ankle and look great. I’m a size 6 and ordered the medium and they are so comfortable. Full travel days and nothing digging in and suffocating. These and the Anthro Colette jeans arrived on the same day I kept these instead, much lighter weight, more stretch, better denim color, and a fraction of the price. I now own 3 pairs!

These jeans are amazing! I’m 5’3” and 150 lbs, and the size large in mid-blue fits perfectly—flattering, comfy, and not too tight or loose. The stretchy fabric feels great, and the wide-leg design is both trendy and versatile. The high waist and functional front pockets are a bonus! Perfect for dressing up or keeping casual. Love them and might grab another pair! ❤️

These jeans are amazing. I have bought 3 pairs. When skinny jeans came around they were not making boot cut flair or bell bottoms anymore. Finally the style is coming back around. I have been having trouble finding bell bottoms for someone is short as I. All others drag on the floor. I'm 5ft even and weigh 130 LBS. I order a medium. They are a little big on me so I do need a belt. But I'm worried if I get a small I will not be able to get them over my bum. I have junk in the trunk.I have only found one other brand of bell bottom jeans that are made for short people. The material is great for me. I do not have a gap in the back either. Highly recommend.

These jeans are awesome! They’re very slim fitting, almost like a thick jegging. They’re pretty tight around the ankle too which was important to me. They hit just above my belly button. Material is think which I like and the color is exactly as pictured. I’m 110lbs and 5”3 and I ordered an XS. The waist is a bit tight but definitely fits and the length is too long. If you’re shorter than me even they will be very long. They would probably fit better if they were 1.5 (maybe more?) inches shorter. Also, the ankle would be tighter if I wasn’t short and they’re too long, because I have too much extra material bunched up at the bottom. Other than the length though I love them and they’re pretty flattering!

These jeans are awesome. I was so worried about the fit because I am so oddly shaped. I am 5'2 and 170lbs. I have a larger midsection and smaller legs. These jeans fit like a glove ( see pictures) the stretch is enough, the waist is Forgiving. I went a size up from my normal 12 and got a 14 and I am so happy I did. I think I would have been fine with a 12, however I wanted to avoid a muffin top. I love the color! I want the darker color now. Wearing them gives me confidence. I tried them on with a few tops and all look awesome with heels and flats! There is enough give to fold the bottom for more of an ankle reveal, like a capris. Read the reviews!!!! They helped me.
These jeans are awesome. I'm 5'9 169 lbs. Waist is 33 inches. I normally wear a size 8 or 6 long. Because I like a tighter fit, these are size 4 with a 32 inch inseam.

These jeans are better than expected. I haven’t really like most barrel jeans I’ve seen so far, so I was a little skeptical. For some reason, these didn’t look so wide in the pics on Amazon so I thought I’d try. I was pleasantly surprised. They fit great and are not too wide. I ordered the small, which is supposed to fit 4/6. I’m a size 2 and they fit me perfectly. So I would say to size up. These are attractive, stylish and super comfortable. Although barrel jeans are trendy right now, these in particular are not going to go out of style when the trend fades because they’re are not as wide. I’m 5’4” for reference on length and I weigh 132 lbs.

These jeans are better than expected. I haven’t really like most barrel jeans I’ve seen so far, so I was a little skeptical. These jeans are beyond comfortable. They are very stretchy yet not thin or cheap feeling at all! The stitching is very well done. I love the three buttons and thick band at waistline. They fit well with no gaping at the waist. Bottom opening is very wide and length was perfect. I always expect jeans to be crazy long as I am only 5'3" but these are the perfect length to pair with my boots. I was pleasantly surprised with how deep tge front pockets are as most women's jeans have pretty useless front pockets. The ONLY complaint I had was with the ay the denim portion is cut on the front pockets. I noticed that the denim is cut very close to pocket opening so that you can actually see the stitching where denim meets pocket liner. Not a deal breaker, but I felt myself constantly readjusting that pocket (see last photo).

These jeans are comfy and stylish, very much on trend. In the photo the person wearing the jeans is 5'5", so they are a little long but will be fine with shoes that have a little bit of height to them.

These jeans are cute and comfortable. They just didn't fit me the way I wanted. They are baggy in the crotch area. Maybe a smaller size would be better? For reference I am 5ft 3in and weight 140lbs and ordered a Medium. I am still giving a 5 star review because the quality seems good I think I just ordered the wrong size for me. . Shipping was super fast!

These jeans are cute but they are pretty bulky. If you are a bit wider in the hip area they will make you look even wider. These would be great for winter but in Florida they are a little too thick for April weather. They are fitted in the hips (curvy girl). I think they will add curves to someone who is more of a rectangular shape and be quite flattering. If you have a small waist and hips you may not want the extra baggage, which is why I’m torn about keeping them or getting a refund. The front of the jeans don’t have any tummy support so I would not wear them when bloated. The button isn’t as secure as mainstream brand jeans, either. For reference I’m 5’4 and a half inches tall with a short torso. If I decide to keep them, I will need to cut the stings that are hanging off of the ruffles.

These jeans are cute, but they look like pants to a sexy Frankenstein or Hulk costume. The faux distressed hem doesn't resemble normal wear and tear: it's too symmetrical. I'm going to have to either hem them and make capris or cut them to (ironically) look less deliberate. But the cotton/spandex blend makes the fabric stretchy, soft and comfortable, and the pants have five pockets (including the fob) and belt loops like regular jeans. They're a bit loose on me, so I'd have to say they run large. For reference, I'm 5'8", 120 lbs, 26 waist, 35 hip, 33 inseam (not relevant here) and ordered a 4. They're borderline low riders but don't have a short rise, which is good. In other words, not a Junior's fit, more women's (but not matronly).

These jeans are exactly what I was looking for. Lightweight, very thin (but not see through), stretchy, but still have a jean feel and look. Its the perfect balance between leggings and actual jeans. The stretch is perfect. They bounce right back. I only wish the pants came a little higher. They sit right at my belly button, which is good enough for covering the belly. I just like that extra security. I am 5'9, 260..the xxl fits perfect. The only other con, was it does not have "tummy control" to smooth the love handles or belly flub..but for the price I cant complain at all. Will be ordering more!

These jeans are fantastic. Excellent fit and style. I am 5"6'-and 140lbs. The waist sits just right and the stretch is just enough for a snug but comfortable fit. The length is a nice boot or low heel length. Not to short like many are. The boot cut is perfect.

These jeans are giving boot-leg flare Jeans from Rural king on me. They look good on others but I expected more of a trouser Jean style like the picture shows. They smell like moth balls, too. But to be fair, so do a lot of jeans, lately. I’m 5’10” 136 lbs & the size 4 fit perfectly with the exception of the length. These would fit someone 5’7” perfectly in length. My other trouser jeans at home have a dark Carmel colored stitching that really complement the darker wash denim. These would look 1000x better like that instead of this white thread.

These jeans are gorgeous! And they have enough cotton in them to feel super soft, and enough stretch to feel comfortable sitting and walking in them. They are high waisted and have a nice flare that hits the shoe, just like I wanted it to (I’m 5’6”). They wash fine on medium but I let air dry because I don’t want to risk shrinkage in the dryer. I went with my “regular” size, but could have probably fit in the one below, but less comfortably. So I would suggest go with your regular size unless you are hesitating between two, and in that case go with the lower one. Also: the color is gorgeous!!!

These jeans are great, just what I was looking for. I ordered a small I’m 53, 123 pounds. I washed and dried them first so they shrunk a little bit, worked out perfect to wear with boots with heels might be a little slouchy with sneakers, going to buy them in blue also.

These jeans are my new favorite pair! Highly recommend if you have a small waist and larger hips/butt. I’m 5’6, 135 lbs, waist 28” hips 40”and the size guide said to order a 6. However I ordered the size 4 after reading reviews of women around my size (thanks for your pics and videos! So ). The size 4 waist was form fitting, but still had wiggle room while the hips and butt area was perfect. I wanted to post pics so you can see how great these jeans look. Most jeans tend to flatten my behind while these really flatter it! If you’re like me and you’re struggling to find that perfect pair of jeans look no further. Buy these jeans you won’t regret it!!

These jeans are nice and stretchy. In Levi's Mid Rise Skinny jeans, I have been wearing a 10, but they are cutting me in half at the waist lately. I am about 5'4", 143 lbs. I carry my weight in my stomach, so that's where most of my "curvy" is. I ordered a 10 in these jeans, hoping the extra stretch would help in the waist. They were, indeed, very comfortable in the waist, which measured 16" flat across. But the thighs and front were kind of baggy. I sent them back and ordered two pairs of 8s and they fit much better. The waist is a bit smaller, measuring 15" across, but there is so much stretch available that it's not a problem. The butt and legs fit closer, although they are not what I would consider tight, as you can see by my picture. Inseam on the size 10 and the 8 is 30". And they are definitely high waisted on me, not mid. Maybe I'm short waisted, but they come up to just above my belly button. Kind of strange feeling at first, but even though I do not tuck my shirts in, my muffin top always wanted to show through my tops. That isn't happening as much now, so I'm liking it. The size 10 pair were the Bristol-Whiskers, a kind of light blue. The 8s I ordered are Salida and a really dark pair, Parker Whisker. Out of the 3, the Salida are my favorite. A medium blue (lighter than they appear in the picture, but darker than the 10s). The other 8s, the Parker Whisker, are extremely dark blue and I may exchange them for another Salida. The "whiskering" on all of these jeans is pretty mild, much less than it looks in the pics they show. Today is the first day of me wearing my new jeans, so I can't tell if they will bag out, but they don't seem like they will.

These jeans are nice and thick, but I got the long length and they touch the ground with heels. I’m 5’8”, weight 155 pounds. I have ordered the regular length to see if that makes any difference. Still not sure about the fit, although they are a little snug at the waist, they fit very smoothly there, it’s the extra fabric under the rear in back that’s sort of unattractive. Elephant pants are all the thing, and these feel rather elegant on, but I’m still on the fence.

These jeans are nice quality and the color is better than I expected. I got the dark blue. I usually wear sise 2-4 in jeans and the XS fit although snug so small would have been more comfortable. They do have a nice stretch to them so they’ll probably loosen up. I’m 5’6” and they’re pretty long for crop. I would prefer more a straight wide leg look than the flare but they’re still cute.

These jeans are not my favorite. If I had a chance to try them on before buying I would have passed. I got size 10, which is my regular size, and they fit kind of strange. I guess it’s not my style. They are shorter than I would prefer, but not too short for me (I am 5’5” tall and weigh about 160 pounds). The fabric is good, neither too thick nor too thin, stretchable. I will wear these jeans around the house and in the backyard.

These jeans are not working for me. I ordered up a size and I’m glad I did because they fit loosely in the waist. The issue is the length. I’m short at 5”3 and they aren’t ankle, and they aren’t long, but this weird inbetween length and no matter what shoes I wear they seem to be just slightly too short. Other than that, they are comfortable and great of quality, just not right for me. My star ratings are based as follows: 5⭐️ - love it, can’t live without it. Outstanding and amazing. 4⭐️ - pretty great, no major flaws. 3⭐️ - got some issues going on. 2⭐️ - pretty flawed product. 1⭐️ - don’t waste your time or money. Just not worth it.
These jeans are of excellent quality, thick, rigid, high rise but create a very nice shape on the body, true to size. I order size 12, I am 5,4 and 167 weight.
These jeans are perfect for any day! I am 180lbs, usually a size 12, and ordered an XL. They are a bit loose on the waist but nothing a belt can't fix. I recommend!
These jeans are perfect for any day! I am 180lbs, usually a size 12, and ordered an XL. They are a bit loose on the waist but nothing a belt can't fix. I recommend!

These jeans are PERFECT!! I haven’t bought jeans in years, been wearing the same ones, but it was time to get some new ones as my old ones were showing their wear :( I’ve always worn American Eagle jeans, but I don’t have a store close to me so decided to go to the lovely Amazon and browse jeans. I HATE jeans shopping—HATE it. I’m extremely picky how jeans should fit me. I am tall, so they need to be long. And also I like them to be stretchy so I can move around. After 30-45 minute of browsing, I narrowed it down to these Levi’s! After reading the reviews I decided to give them a try. OMG am I glad I did. I got size 8L and these things fit me perfectly! They are comfortable, they are long enough, these are now the BEST jeans I own! I want to get more, but there aren’t many colors available in my size, so waiting for a restock. For reference I am 5’8 and weigh about 135ish. GET THE JEANS :)

These jeans are perfecttttt. At my height, it's a perfect crop, not too short. The stretch is good. Obvs you need to wear your skin tone underwear, but you should know that. I used a steamer for the wrinkles, that took a while but I don't have a washer/dryer at home. Haven't washed it yet but I always wash on cold and hang dry most of my stuff. For reference, I got size Large based on the size chart, and it fits well. I'm 5'8", 173lb, 38b, mid waist is 34", hips are 40". I'm usually a size 10.

These jeans are pretty comfortable. They are high rise. They are stretchy. They are distressed. They look similar to the jeans in the photo, but look to be made with different material than the photo. The length is fine, I’m 5’7 and they fit me almost like a pair of regular jeans, they came to right above my ankles.

These jeans are quality denim and a great length for taller people. I'm 5'8", 175lbs, and I ordered the "Blue Veil Dx" color option in size 10L. The hem hits the floor and since I usually don't wear flat shoes, this isn't a problem. The price is unbeatable. I haven't owned a pair of Lee jeans in many years. Unfortunately, now I remember why: The fly area always seems to be crooked or slightly off center on Lee jeans. Every pair I've ever tried over the years has had this problem. After wearing for a while, walking around, etc, the fly pulls more to one side and looks crooked. This isn't the case on any other brand of jeans I've tried, so it must be some flaw with this brand. It's weird. But hey, they're nice jeans otherwise, and many people seem to like them. This brand just isn't for me.

These jeans are quality! I got these for my niece, so I actually got them in XS, so this isn’t my size, (they are too small for me, I am 5’8/ 132), but I really wanted to show the fit, because I really like the style of the jeans and it can give you an idea of which size to get. I think their sizing chart is correct, so definitely go by that. I find them very flattering (again, this isn’t my size so it does flatten my back side, but I can tell that if I had gotten my size, they would fit very nicely). I just really like the style, and it’s hard to find a pair of jeans that is as flattering as these.

These jeans are quite different than any others I own. First of all, they fit the waist and bum perfectly, and they're comfortable to sit in without getting pinched. The legs are a bit long for me, but I'll probably wear them with boots or chunky heels, so that should be fine. I ordered size 2, and the fit is a bit loose. I'm 4'10" and 92lbs for reference. Overall nice jeans, I like them.

These jeans are so beautiful, i love the style, quality is very good but they’re not stretchy, they’re almost perfect 🤩 they’re tight for my booty so if my booty grows a bit more they’re not gonna fit 🥹, the waist is perfect and length also but i do wish it were a little stretchy for my booty. These jeans are so comfortable and hold their shape. I took this picture after having them on for 10 hours of travel time. I ordered size 4 short. I am 5' 4" 130 lbs.

These jeans are so comfortable!! They have a perfect loose fit with some stretch, are high waist, and are breathable! The fabric feels high quality and allows for some breathability as you walk. These jeans are so comfortable. I’m 5’10.5”, 155lbs, and I wear a 6. I ordered the 6 long and have plenty of room in them. The length is perfect. The material is stretchy and strong, so you feel secure without having to be uncomfortable. Would buy again.

These jeans are so cute, great fit and quality! They have just enough stretch to hug my curves but also enough structure to feel sassy. These jeans are so cute! And so comfortable! I’m 5’1 and 95 lbs and the 24 short fit perfectly!

These jeans are so cute! Initially when I ordered, I went with amazons suggestion (which is usually pretty spot on), and ordered a medium. They were huge, but I loved them so I reordered in a small. Honestly, after getting them and wearing them, I could have done an extra small. They are a mid-rise fit, super stretchy, and comfortable (like no joke ladies if you’re still dropping it like it’s hot, these are for you). They are the perfect cropped length (I am 5’7), the white is not see through (I’m wearing magenta underwear in the pics), and I am seriously obsessed with the flared bottom detail. I was really hoping to just pop these in the dryer for some shrink action, but the label specifically says no dryer so I’m rolling with the looser fit. These definitely look more high end than they are, and I’m probably going to order the Jean version because I like them so much. I definitely recommend, but would suggest sizing down. For reference I am pretty universally a size 3 or small in most pants.
These jeans are so cute! They are extremely stretchy but long! I am 5’2 but curvy and with some heels they fit perfect. No front pockets but real ones in the back. Good quality for the price.
These jeans are so cute!! The heart on the back pocket is adorable. The jeans are so flattering too and they fit just right! I’m 5’1 so they were a little long but with my wedges they were perfect!

These jeans are so flattering and comfortable to wear. I could seriously sleep in these jeans. I got a size 8. The quality of the denim isn't the greatest...a tad bit thin for my liking, but overall it is on par with the price point. A fun new staple for my closet! I enjoy pairing them with neutral tops and some jewelry for a fun night out.

These jeans are so nice! I love that they are hemmed but they still fit me well, which is an accomplishment considering I am very petite and have a hard time finding that combo. The length is perfect if you are petite like me but I imagine they would be shorter on taller people. Overall, love these pants and will be buying more colors!

These jeans are so soft and comfortable. They have a nice amount of stretch. I was a little skeptical of the sizing, but the XL fit me great. I have not washed them yet, but they seem durable as like they will hold up fine.

These jeans are so worth every dime you spend on them! After falling in love with True Religion jeans years ago, I decided that I would just stock up. I own over ten pairs of the jeans! They have just the right amount of stretchiness; they don't feel tight at all. They sit right at the belly bottom, so they are rather high waisted. The pants have 2 pockets in back and 3 up front (2 regular sized and one of those tiny pockets no one ever uses). I really like the look of these jeans - very different from the straight, tight jeans I have been wearing. I definitely recommend these jeans - and the price is very reasonable!

Because these are SUPER stretchy, I’m wondering if I could’ve gone down a size. I can literally pull these on with unzipping them. However, I don’t mind that at all. If anything changes, I’ll update my review. For now, I’m very happy and I do recommend these jeans. I’m almost 60 yrs old, but I think these would appeal to a broad range of ages.

These jeans fall between 3 and 4 stars and I don't think I would buy again. The good: The fit is great. I am 5' 7" 135lbs and normally wear either a 4 or 6 in other brands. The small in these fit nicely. They are a little tighter around my waist than I'd like, but I do have a pretty big waist-to-hip ratio (menopause belly!) However, they are stretchy so are wearable. The length is perfect on me and they are wide in the leg without being super-wide and baggy like some brands I've tried. The bad: The denim is low quality and the fabric is stiff. I have washed and steam-ironed them to soften them up a bit but they are still pretty stiff. Also, on the pair I received, the distressing is uneven. I ordered the deep blue color and there were three parallel white lines that looked like scratch marks on one leg. Luckily, I have a deep blue felt pen so I lightly touched up the white lines and now they aren't visible. I am sure I will wear these but they won't be my go-to jeans.

These jeans might be the most comfortable jeans in my closet. I'm typically a small, with narrow hips and for me the fit around the waist and hips is perfect. They are stretchy so they will also work for someone with wider hips. The legs are consistently wide from the top of the thighs to the ankles. In my opinion, there are 2 things that could make these jeans really special from a style perspective. One is adding a little more width to the legs and the other is to make them slightly longer. I'm 5'4" and they are the perfect length, but with no room to shrink up. They will be pretty short on anyone 5'5" and over. But, some love that style so it's a preference thing I guess. The added width would give them a more unique look. But, they are great, everyday jeans that I'll wear during the day to run errands or to go hang at a friend's house. When I get home, they are so comfortable I don't feel compelled to rip them off and throw on yoga pants, like some other jeans I have. So, overall, I'm very happy with them, but wouldn't put them in "my favorites" category from a style perspective.

These just didn’t do it for me, and fit a bit odd. I’m 5’3” and 145 with a 29” waist and 40” hips, usually a 6/8 and very muscular quads. The waist sat above my hips, but not at my belly button, and just seemed to make me look really wide. They sort of pancaked the booty and had extra space in the calves. I also wasn’t a huge fan of the line down the front, it seemed to stick out and itch a bit.

These khaki pants are made of nice quality, thin cotton fabric, with front and rear pockets large enough to hold a cell phone (yay!). The size chart is true to body (not garment) measurements, so these size large pants are too big to fit my daughter's 41" hips. The pants are very comfortable, but they aren't really suitable for yoga. These are casual, elastic-waist pants that would be great for someone who has trouble with zippers, since they are easy to put on and take off.

These Lee pull ons are a lot nicer than I expected. They are a good fit with some give and don't seem to be the type of jeans that stretch out after 10 minutes. I put these on out of the package and wore them for about 30 minutes around the house bending and stooping, and they held their shape. I washed them per the instructions then dried them and they did shrink a bit in the length, so be mindful. This was a welcomed surprise, because they were a little long. Now they're perfect. I am 5'3" and 145-150 pounds with curves and a belly. I feel like they're flattering to my shape. I'd buy again.***Update*** These jeans really didn't shrink that much in the length, less than I originally thought. I usually wear a bit of heel or tennis shoes with these. Even so, I love these jeans. They still look and fit great.

These leggings are great, I am 5’5 and 140 pounds normally a size 6 in jeans. I got the S/M size and they fit perfect! I’m also a mom and can tell you they’re good for bending down and squatting in. The one thing is that they aren’t that high waisted, it still covers the mom belly pouch you might have to pull them up again after squatting (I like all pants are like that though) but I still love the level of comfort they have. They have a great length to them too, I don’t like how some jeans can show your ankles at the bottom so I thought it was time to try the jeggings. They are comfortable and look like real jeans. The back pockets are very sturdy as well. After writing this review I’m ordering in a couple other colors. Great purchase I’m so happy to wear these out everywhere!

These leggings are so comfortable! I want them in every color. And this is how my costume closet turns into my regular closet. Also, I'm 6ft tall and 215lbs and bought the "extra plus" size. They fit very well with plenty of room for movement. I could have possibly gone down a size, but they were super comfy.

These leggings are SO soft! I am 5'4" and weigh 125lbs - usually leggings are so tight around my middle it gives me a stomach ache, but these fit wonderfully! They are very thin, so be careful of snags. They are great for dresses in Springtime - warm enough to keep you covered, but not hot. Love the length and bright colour! I risked it and washed these in the machine in a delicate bag - they survived. If you found my review , please click Yes below! :)

These leggings are very comfortable and very soft. They are an excellent price too! I got the brown and they match with so many outfits. They fit perfectly. I’m 5’6” and 150lbs and I got the one size and they were a perfect fit. They stretch nice and I’ve worn them dozens of times without any pilling or tearing. No holes or any damage. I’ve washed them tons of times and even put them in the dryer without any issues. Love these!! I’ve bought more in many other colors too!! Definitely going to be a repeat customer over and over because these are amazing!!!

These leggings fit good, they do have a very thin fleece lining and a lot of stretch. The jeans are basically navy leggings with white stripes to make it look more like jeans but not super great. That is the only reason I gave this a 4 star rating but definitely keeping them and like them overall. ;) I weigh 160 lb. and my height is 4'11" and I bought the XL and they fit great!

These light blue pants complimented my 190 lb body with extra space to give. The length is long & excellent which I like to fit my 5'3 body & covered my shoes. They're soft & comfortable, I will order other colors. Thank you

These linen pants are light and comfortable on a warm day, and I receive compliments when I wear them. I'm 5'6", about 160 pounds, right between L and XL according to the size chart. I went with XL and they fit great after laundering--just the right length for me, but my legs are short for my height. I machine washed cold gentle cycle and hung them to dry, no problems. I love the pockets, although the pants can sag a bit if I have something heavy in a pocket and haven't tied the drawstring tight enough. The grey color works with many different tops and is not see-through.

These lineny pants are made of a heavier material with a linen feel to it. They could possibly be hotter than I would like for summer but are not itchy, like most linen pants are for me. I’m 5’4”, so these are full length pants for me instead of capris, but I expected this. I would estimate the inseam length to be 28-29” in the XXL size. Their measurements of the length of the whole pant isn’t all that useful. They did fit perfectly in my normal size and are actually wide leg. These pants will be nice for spring, cool summer nights, and fall. The navy color is a bit darker than their picture and more of a truer navy color which I like better than the brighter blue in their pictures. They did arrive a bit wrinkled and folded into a small box for some odd reason. I’m hoping they will hang out, because this crinkled material won’t iron well. I can’t say yet about how they wash up but will update review if they shrink too much once it gets warm enough to wear them!

These look fantastic in the picture, but unfortunately, they don’t match my expectations. Unfortunately, I will be returning them and continue my search for a better fit.

These look great! As others have stated, they are long. I ordered the small. I am 5'4" and 127 pounds. I wear a size 25/26 regular at Gap and a size 2 regular at most places. I like it that they are tapered at the ankle area. The older overalls from the 1970’s had a much wider leg. I think the bit of tapering makes them more flattering. I was surprised to get a compliment on them from a 20something year old salesperson at the mall. Yesterday I got another compliment from a 50something yr old woman so I thought I should leave a review. I haven’t gotten any compliments on anything I’ve worn in ages! I love the comfortable look & feel. I will be buying a backup pair in case Amazon does away with this one. They meet all of my criteria for great overalls! My height is 5’3” weight is 155#.

These pants are a cheap quality version of slacksweats. They fit pretty well, and are comfortable on, but as soon as I put them on, I immediately noticed that the waist is not centered. You can see in my pictures that it’s off to the right, which is even more noticeable when they’re on. It’s a definite no for me because that’s the only thing I can focus on now; just how much off center they look. So for them to look right with the faux zipper centered on the tummy, I’d have to twist them to one side, which throws off the whole fit of the pants due to the other seams and pockets. Looking back at the other reviews, I can see that many of the other colors are cut/sewn the same way, but may not be as noticeable in a darker color. Bottom line, just not worth it when there are so many other better options with more flowy material that’s not this weird rough waffle weave anyway. I prefer a more sophisticated look, but wanted a pull-on comfortable dress slack. This is definitely not it, even if the seams did line up. FYI, I am 5’6, 190lbs, wear a size medium pant, and these were true to size in a medium.

These pants are a fun and comfortable piece for your wardrobe! Granted the material is a bit thinner than I want but they look great on, not see through. I wore them last night and got a lot of compliments. I am 5'9" and all legs and the length was wonderful - I could wear heels and the pants still were long enough. These will be great to pack for vacation to Miami and the Caribbean as they are lightweight and don't take up a lot of room. One issue I had was the pants tend to slip down in the back so didn't feel comfortable wearing a short top (because a crop top would look super cute with these pants).
These pants are a great fit, especially if you’re tall. I am wearing a size medium and I am 5’11” usually wear a size 8/10.

These pants are a great-quality stretchy material that feels good. As you can see in the close-up picture, it’s got a diagonal pattern more similar to jeans rather than the completely smooth knit I’ve seen in other professional yoga pants I own. But it’s still fine enough that the texture isn’t all that noticeable. I like the shape of these pants overall, BUT they tend to sag after just the first few minutes of wearing them, so I have to hike them up a little every so often. (Maybe if I had gotten a smaller size that would be less of an issue, but they aren't loose anywhere, so I was hesitant to size down.) -I’m 5’5”, and the 31” inseam falls below my ankle but doesn’t drag the floor. -It’s fairly high-waisted (comes to half an inch under my belly button). -I’m 142lbs, and the Large is a pretty good fit for me. Definitely would stretch for a few more pounds, and a medium might have actually worked better, but I’m fairly happy with the fit. Overall, a nice pair of work pants!
These pants are a must have!! They are stretchy, and great quality overall! I love them so much that I ordered another pair right away. True to size. I am 5/7", 168 lbs. and got the size large.

I’m just over 5’5” and ordered size XL. Taller wearers will likely be pleased with the length. The waistband is wide and stretchy, even just a touch snug. Since these pants are heavier gauge linen, I think I could get away with them this fall paired with boots and a sweater. Versatility is never a bad thing!

These pants are ADORABLE and COMFORTABLE!! The fabric is SOOO soft and stretchy, and they feel like very good quality. The pictures do them no justice, I promise! I think they'd make great beach pants (which is actually why I got them), but I also think you could pair them with a white button down or sweater for a dressier look. Although summer is almost over, I'd still buy these pants because blue stripes are timeless and you will definitely be glad you did!!

These pants are amazing! Flattering fit and look professional, but feels like I’m wearing sweats all day! Feels like good quality, and color is just as expected. These pants are amazing!!! They are snug but also have room to stretch. Super comfy and flattering. Im very impressed by these! They stretch but also are still a nice jean material. I never write reviews but I felt I had to for these! For reference, I’m 5’5 130lbs and ordered a small.

These pants are beautiful and comfy!! Easy to put on and length was perfect for me (I'm 5'5). Will order again!!

These pants are beautiful! I will be ordering more in different colors. They are a great staple for your wardrobe. Can be dressed up or worn casual cool. They are long for us short girls in the leg length. For reference, I am 5'1 and will need to hem them 2-3 fingers width. But possibly with wedges or heels may work for some. I highly recommend!
these pants are bomb. i am 5’6 170. i ordered medium. fits perfectly. they are just long enough- i hate pants that are short. i wore these to a dinner then bar afterwards. nice material and comfy

These pants are comfortable and better than I expected. I am 5'3 and usually wear a small to medium. I decided to order these in small. They fit perfectly at the waist. I have bigger thighs, so they don't look great on me in that area. I don't think they are particularly flattering on me, but they look much better with a suit jacket for wearing to work. The fabric is comfortable and stretchy. Overall, these are good, though not my favorite pants for work.

These pants are comfortable and stretchy. I was surprised by the fabric initially but I ended up liking it. I am 5’ 4”, 125lbs, normally wear size 6/8. I bought the size 8, length 30 and they were loose fitting in the legs but just how I like it around my waist. I could size down but thankfully looser jeans are in! In terms of length they pass my ankles but aren’t too long. I’ll probably get a 28” inseam for a pair to wear with Vans-like shoes. Also you can’t tell in the picture, but they make my butt look great! I bought the black pair and was going to keep them until I spent two minutes in them and realized how much they attract dog/cat hair. I have hardwood floors and a leather couch and yet I was covered in lint and hair. Just not practical for my life.

These pants are comfortable and the fabric is nice. However, they are really high-waisted on a shorter torso (perfect fit if I roll the waistband once). Length is good for me. I'm 5'3" and wearing a 1.5" heel.
These pants are comfy and flattering. They will look great with flats or heels. For size reference, I ordered a size small, 5'7, 125 lbs.

These pants are crazy comfortable, they don’t gap, and they feel great when sitting because of the elastane content. If you’re an 8-10 in mall sizes, the large fits quite well. It does give you a little bit of pancake butt. Plus, if you’ve got short legs, these are almost regular pants (26” inseam). Nice. Recommended!

These pants are cute and comfortable but WAYYYYY too long I’m going to see how much to have them hemmed but I really don’t understand why they are so long! I’m almost 5’8!!! We’re there made for a giant???

These pants are cute and feel like they are made of a good quality material. They washed well and didn’t seem to come apart at any of the seams. I am 5’3 and they hit me right at the ankles. My daughter is 5’7 1/2 and the pants hit her about mid shin. These pants are very cute and lightweight and a nice color. They could be dressed up with a nicer top or worn for a more casual attire. I highly recommend.

These pants are cute and flattering! The material feels very cheap but for the cost I think you get your value. The sizing was perfect, no gapping in my waist and stretchy through the hips. Comfortable to move around in. The button of the pants was very flimsy, I wouldn’t be surprised if it fell off after a wash or a few wears. I ended up returning because it was shorter than I would like. For reference I’m 5’7” and 170lb.

These pants are cute and very firm fitting. According to the size chart, I should be able to wear a size 6. I erred on the side of caution and ordered my usual size 8. They're a bit snug on the waist, and tummy area. I'm 5'3.5" and they are long bit I think with some heels, they should be fine. The fabric is pretty thick so no worries about them being see through. I do recommend wearing seamless undergarments to avoid showing lines and if you're worried about showing off the belly pooch, high waist control top are your best bet.

These pants are cute, but definitely more suitable for a person with a long torso, im petite so it fits a little too high waisted and loose around the waist, for references im 5’1 - 133lbs, the material is lightweight, soft and comfortable maybe an XS is the right size for me.
These pants are cute, comfy and fashionable! Love the belt option as well as the pockets! I'm 5'1 so they are longer on me than intended, but, they just look like a longer cropped pant!

These pants are cute. I can see them being a regular in my rotation. Do I wish they were a little longer? Yes! I'm 6 ft tall, 136 lbs, and this is a size Large, and longer is always better. But I'd still roll them up and wear them the same way. The fabric is soft and has a deep corduroy pile -- not the super-thick, noisy pile that makes a sound as your legs brush against each other. Just deep enough to feel like true corduroy. The color is a deep, rich dark olive. Very nice.

These pants are dressy enough to wear to the office, but they can also be used for everyday wear. My wife loves them as they fit true to size, are comfortable, and stretchy. There are no zippers or buttons to struggle with. My wife ordered the medium and they fit her perfectly. For reference, she is 5’4” and 140 lbs. They also have great tummy support.
These pants are everything! Cute, flattering, comfortable, dress up or dress down. I need more colors now!!! For reference I'm 5'9", 170lbs, athletic build (thick thighs) and size large fit perfect!

These pants are everything! Exactly what I’ve been looking for! Comfort, stretch, and style! I am 5’8 at 185 lbs and I’m wearing a L-tall for length! I could use a medium! Not sure if they’ll stretch out after a few uses!

These pants are exactly as expected. Love the Deep Blue color - it is the same in person as in the picture. The jeans are warm and fuzzy on the inside. They are comfortable to wear and are insulating, without being too thick. They are made of 70% cotton, 28.5% polyester, and 1.5% elastane. I appreciate the elastane in them, because it gives some stretch to the garment and makes them easy to move in. Even the first time putting these jeans on, they were easy to move in. These can be machine washed on a gentle cycle and line dried. They can be dry cleaned if needed, but not bleached. Appreciate the easy care of these pants. The front pockets are deep too, which is great. I am 5'6 and typically wear jeans with a 29 to 30" waist and the size M fits well in both length and width! I love that these are high waist and they weren't too tight or too big. The dark blue color of the pants makes them so they can be paired with a wide assortment of tops, jackets, coats, and shoes to create unique outfits. I am excited to wear them this fall and winter.

These pants are exactly as pictured... The asymmetric design is absolutely gorgeous, trendy, and unique. The fabric is great, strong and elastic... A little short length wise, but its fine. They are also true to size, I am 5'4'' and 130 pounds, and usually wear small or medium... I wanted these a little loose, and went for medium which in my case corresponds to a 6, and they fit perfect... Absolutely reasonable for the price. Recommended!

These pants are exactly as pictured... Love the fabric (it is elastic and suuuuper soft), and love the gorgeous, colorful design. The length is perfect!... They are also true to size, I am 5'4'' and around 130 pounds, and usually wear small... I wanted these a little loose, and went for medium, and they fit great... Absolutely reasonable for the price. Recommended!

These pants are exactly what I am looking for, except they are too large. I am 5’3 117 lbs. w 26” h 34.5”. I ordered a size 2 regular. It seems I need a 0 short, but they do not make that size. I would have kept them, but the reason I wanted them is to have work pants for yard work that were not falling off. Returning and continuing my search.

These pants are exactly what I was hoping they would be, but better. The photo you see is after a wash and tumble in the warm dryer (minimal shrinkage). And no wrinkles. I ordered these size S pants - a linen and viscose (rayon) mix, for a 5'3", 110 lb petite young woman with a 24" waist and curvy hips. Although the actual waist, even washed and dried, is a bit larger at appx 26", the pants can be tightened for a smaller waist with the attached belt or another belt. Also, I noticed that there is room to move the button over about 3/4" to make the waistline a bit smaller. For those who have larger waistlines, there is stretch of about 3", maybe a tad more. These are a higher waist pant, meaning, belly button area, and there is adequate fabric in the behind so that it isn't tight or prone to give a wedgie. In fact, the way the pants are cut in the back, and the fabric, makes for a nice drape that resembles the model in the photo. The pants are well-cut and have good stitching, with no loose threads or shoddy workmanship. They are similar to what you might find at one of the large anchor department stores in the mall. The fabric is neither too thin (not see-through) nor too thick (denim). It's perfect for spring and fall, and summer days that aren't over the mid-80s. I would say they are the thickness of a soft chambray shirt, thicker than a man's dress shirt, but not stiff at all. I am so impressed with this fabric composition that I am going to continue to look for garments with this mix: 55% Linen / 45% Viscose. The price point is an excellent value and I would have no hesitation whatsoever about buying again.

These pants are extremely comfortable! The material is soft and flowy. It kind of reminds me of a thin & breathable spandex material but not thin enough that they are see through, they are definitely squat proof and not see through. The V shape on the belly area is flattering and the elastic around the waist keeps them up but isn’t so tight that it’s uncomfortable or restrictive. These do stretch as you wear them so if you’re in-between sizes, I’d suggest sizing down. I washed them on a normal cycle and tumble dried on low, they came out perfectly fine. These are so comfortable that I’ll likely be living in them! You can wear them to work out in or to dress casually. I wore them today with a tank top, cardigan and sandals for school pickup and actually received a few compliments. If you’re looking for stretch & comfort, these are everything!! I ordered a size large and for reference I’m 5’5 & 190 lbs.

These pants are extremely flowy and comfortable!! There’s lots of room and tons of stretch! I’m 5’4 and the length hits me full length without being too long. They’re lightweight but not see through. I don’t think they’re very flattering on me. I’m going to definitely have to play around with styling them to figure out what looks best without looking like I’m wearing pajamas

These pants are fabulous and I love the color! I’m reviewing a size small. I’m 5’2 and I weigh 125 lbs and they fit absolutely perfect! They’re kinda on the thin side. But I can still wear them this winter because I’ll wear fleece tights underneath my pants. Plus, I can still wear them this Spring & Summer. Basically, you could wear them year-round! They are true to size! They are made very well! I’m extremely pleased with these pants! I highly recommend them!

These pants are fabulous for either lounging at home or at work.. The material is 81% polyester and 19% spandex, so there’s plenty of stretch and this material needs no special laundering, comes out of the dryer wrinkle free. What makes these pants look a little dressier to me is that sharp front seam. Very classy looking! The waist clings much like a pair of leggings. I think this is actually designed to be that way to lend shape to your silhouette. I don’t find the waist overly tight or uncomfortable. I like the zippered side pockets for an athleisure flare.The big attraction for me was the choice of a 29 inch inseam because I am petite and have spent my life shortening pants! I ordered a size small with the 29 inch seam and I am 5 feet tall, 117 pounds. These fit perfectly and just drape over the top of my shoe. I will enjoy this alternative style compared to jeans, joggers, or leggings on occasion. Great quality and I highly recommend!

These pants are fabulous! The fabric is a good weight, and drapes very nicely. I need to wear the pants up at the smallest part of my waist in order to make them hit perfectly at the floor. Therefore, they are pretty high waisted. I’m 5‘4“ tall, and 123 pounds. I carry my weight around my midsection, so I’m a rectangular shape. I ordered a 29” size medium. I ordered the ivory as well, and I can’t wait to see if they are see-through. Fingers crossed that they’re not! I’m definitely going to check out more colors.

These pants are fantastic quality, super comfy, and fit great. I love the pockets and stretchy part of the waistband in the back - it really helps on those days when I've eaten too much lol. I am 5'6, 142lbs and ordered a size medium and they fit great. I'll definitely recommend these to everyone!

These pants are fantastic! I was so surprised at how much I love them. They are soft and oh-so comfy! I got the lightweight version and they are exactly that—lightweight, yet not see through. Absolutely perfect for summer! They look so much more expensive than what they cost. Thrilled to add these to my wardrobe. Don’t know about durability yet as this is my first time wearing them, but they seem like they’ll be ok in the wash. My only CON—and not a dealbreaker—is that there’s this funky closure. There’s a normal tab closure with a hook & eye, but then there’s a faux belt with the double rings where you pass the fabric through and tighten it by pulling the end—I hope that makes sense. Anyway, it was only on the front by the tab closure and cheapened the pants significantly so I removed it (of course before I thought to take a pic). Plus, idk how I’d wear a belt on top of it. Idk why the manufacturer would put that there. It’s not shown in any picture either. Again, not a dealbreaker, but wanted to mention it so it’s no surprise like it was for me. Here are my stats...I’m 5’4” and I’m 135 lbs. My weight is pretty evenly distributed, so I’m a natural hourglass. I’ve got a slight mom tummy going, but it’s not awful. My measurements are 39” (or 34DD), 29”, 39”. I ordered the SMALL in lightweight white. I hope you found my review !

These pants are fantastic. Super comfortable and perfect for work. I bought a blue and light gray. I’m 175lbs, 5’5” and usually get an XL but I got these in a L since I read they are roomy and they fit great. They wash and tumble dry well. Excellent quality.

These pants are fantastic. Super comfortable and perfect for work. I bought a blue and light gray. I’m 175lbs, 5’5” and usually get an XL but I got these in a L since I read they are roomy and they fit great. They wash and tumble dry well. Excellent quality.

These pants are fantastic. They fit me (short legged 5’4” and apple shaped) perfectly without the legs dragging on the ground at all. The elasticated waist is so comfortable and I’m pretty sure someone at least two sizes smaller or larger than me (usually a 2XL) could wear them easily due to the way the waist is sewn. There are nice sized pockets that don’t change the line of the pants when in use and the fabric is soft and flowy. If you are a short legged person on the lookout for comfort you need these pants.

These pants are glorious. They feel like a work out pant or comfy jogger but they look soooo nice on. Tons of stretch and the quality of the fabric is impressive especially for the price. It’s not to thin and not too thick. They are perfect. I’m 5’4” 125 lbs the small is perfect

These pants are great and feel extremely comfortable. Exactly as product information and reviews described. Only issue is the inseam: my inseam is 33.5 inches, so I purchased the 33 inch pair in medium. I’m 5’8”, 135 lbs for reference. These fit great around the middle and do not cut into my midriff or anywhere else in any problematic way. But they are too long to wear with anything other than 3 inch plus heels. I’m going for comfort here, as many of you probably are, so high high heels are not really my style (not at all in fact). So, I’m going to try ordering the 31 inch instead. I’ll review those when I have them.

These pants are great and I can’t wait to wear them. I’m 5’6 235lbs and these fall right at my ankles. They have some stretch but are true to size. Love them

These pants are great for Handywork and manual labor. Loose and stretchy fabric makes them a breeze to work in. I am 5’2” and 120lbs, and I ordered a six short, but I think I could’ve gone down one size as they’re a bit baggy on me. Definitely going to get another pair, because for the price these are great. They’re also cute for casual wear if you roll them up :) *note that the waistband in the back is a legging type elastic, I like it but others might not*

These pants are great for the office or a casual night out. They are a little snug at the waist, and a bit short in length, but overall they look pretty cute. For the most part they are comfortable to wear. The fabric feels like it's a good quality, and I really like the width of the pant legs. I'm 5'1, 130lbs, and I ordered a size medium.
These pants are great for warmer weather. Color is very pretty, they are comfortable but a little long on my 5’2” frame. Will have to wear heels or hem them.
These pants are great quality, and I love the way they feel- lightweight and a little stretchy. Fits great. I am 5'5 and 135 lbs. and ordered a small. Will definitely being buying more from CRZ Yoga.

These pants are great, albeit a tad overpriced. Im 210lb 5'4" 40 in waist. I ordered xl-2xl. These pants fit as expected to me, not too tight or lose, and are Very comfy. They look like jeans until you touch them which is nice. They're not the most durable as I have 2 cats and had a loose threat after my cat walked across my lap so I feel the need to be careful with them which is frustrating given the price and material. I guess i feel like for the material not being jean the price could be less.. Overall they look and feel great so if you have the money then go for it.

These pants are great, for reference, Im 5ft 2 and 108lbs. The pants will fit almost any body weight. It is short people friendly, and it surprisingly fits true to size!! It looks really good on you and helps accentuate your curves. The only problem is that it lints easily.

These pants are great, for reference, Im 5ft 2 and 108lbs. The pants will fit almost any body weight. It is short people friendly, and it surprisingly fits true to size!! It looks really good on you and helps accentuate your curves. The only problem is that it lints easily.

These pants are great! I bought them for work (job requires black pants) these are perfect! They fit me really good. I'm 6ft, 155-160. I got the black XL 35" inseam. They are perfect length and perfect fit. They are stretchy have pockets and button with belt loopholes so they look more like actual hands which is great. I will be buying another pair soon!

These pants are great! They fit so wonderfully. At first I was worried because they don’t have much stretch to them and I have a bigger bottom area but I was definitely wrong. I will def be ordering more colors. The quality is also great they feel like luxury pants. I am 5’1 and 139 pounds.

These pants are great. There's a lining like shorts inside and it doesn't ride up. You notice it a little bit when you're walking, like the hem of the shorts, but it's not very noticeable. It might be more visible if you're pretty dark skinned, though. They're flowy and the wrinkles steamed out easily--however, they wrinkle when you're sitting for a bit (I was at my desk half of the day) and those new wrinkles didn't go away when you get up. Not a deal breaker for me, but worth noting. I love that the waist fit me perfectly. There's no elastic, no stretch, and I used the measurements in the at size chart. These will prob be too long if you're short. I'm 5'8" and had on 2.5" heels and they were just above the floor maybe an inch. For size reference, I ordered XL and it's perfect. I'm 5'8", 173#, about a size 10. My mid waist is 34 and my hips are 40 inches.

These pants are great. Very comfortable and stretchy, and the denim color on these looks legit. The ankle has a tie string to make it tighter too. I really like these pants, and would buy other colors. The only downside is that they are not full length if you’re tall, I’m 5’10 and they hit mid ankle.

These pants are just as cute as depicted in the description photos. The material is a thin but opaque, lightweight fabric with a little texture that drapes beautifully and doesn't wrinkle easily. They are NOT linen, as some of the lines in the item description suggest. The bow in front is sewn to either side, and is not a drawstring, while the rest of the waist is smocked and very stretchy. As for sizing, I am 5 foot 7, weigh 170 pounds, have a 36C bust with narrow shoulders, a short torso, and a wide but flat derriere, carry most of my weight in the middle, and wear a US women's size 10 or 30 pants (medium size pants and joggers at Old Navy and H&M), or a woman's 10 or 12 in dresses. I ordered these pants in the "large" size, which I think was the right fit for me (see my pics). While I don't think these are the most flattering pants for my apple shaped flabby stomach, they are super comfortable to wear with no pinching at the waist, and I can see myself wearing them often as soon as the weather warms up. Overall, these are cute, comfortable summer pants, and I'm happy with the quality. I would order from this brand again.
These pants are just as described the color is beautiful and the fit is flattering they also have a good amount of stretch to them I’m almost 5’7 and the length is perfect I love the quality

These pants are light-weight, quick drying, and quite comfortable. I do like how the nip in at the waist and then are lose throughout the legs. I enjoy how deep and functional the pockets are. I could fit my cellphone, no problem. They are very swishy so these aren't pants you can sneak around in, but that doesn't bother me. I prefer to wear the cuff untightened because the pants are long enough to hit me at the heel, but I appreciate the options. I think these would be decent hiking pants as well. I am 5'4, 125 pounds, with 38" hips and 27" waist and although the small was the right size, a good fit, and the waistband still had room to stretch, I was definitely aware of the waistband while wearing.

These pants are lightweight and comfortable for the summer or warmer climates. The pockets are deep enough to securely hold my phone, a wallet, and lip balm. The fabric is woven and the seams are finished nicely. They are a little long for 5'3" me buy that problem can be solved with taller shoes or my hemming them. Easy and not a big deal. I really like these pants and may get them in another color.

These pants are lightweight and flowy just as described. I am 5’9” and have to hike them pretty high. They run long even on me, I can see that being the only downside to these pants. If you know how to hem then I would recommend them.
These pants are lightweight but flattering and super comfy! I can wear them for work or play. I ordered 27" and am 5'4" but sent them back for 29" which are PERFECT!!

These pants are literally perfect. I’m about to order a third pair. The tie waist is great and adds just enough style. They can be worn with heels or flat sandals or even sneakers. They’re extremely comfortable and breathable and regulate according to your body temperature! I’m almost 5’7” and am 135 lbs and the small fit perfectly. Stretchy waist is very comfortable. The whole sewing pattern of the pants is great. They’re very slimming which I think is my favorite thing about them. Love these pants!!

These pants are lovely, well-made, and lightweight. The perfect alternative for my yoga practice when typical yoga pants just feel too warm in the summer for me. The problem is they are pictured drooping down to the top of a shoe. I like that look, and what I was looking for, but these do not do that. The elastic goes just above the ankle and the pants don’t really go any further. I will probably keep them, though as they are comfortable, the elastic is not too tight and the material is very nice. They are not as puffy as typical harem/Thai pants. They have a much slimmer look which is nice. I am on the shorter side of average height, 5‘5“ and not so heavy that the length is taken up by that issue.

These pants are made of a nice, fairly thin and lightweight fabric, that makes them perfect for hot summer days. Despite being thin, they are not see through. The fit is excellent if you follow the size chart and the overall look is very nice. Nothing weird sticking out or not falling as it should. So perfect construction. As mentioned by other reviewers though, these are a bit long to be called capri. At 5'5, they are just slightly above my ankles, so they're cropped pants, I would say. Other than that, no complains. Very flattering.

These pants are made of a very nice material. I wear a large typically, so I ordered a large and they fit great. There is elastic in the back for a little extra movement and the length is good for me (I'm 5'8"). I will be wearing these cute pants often!

These pants are made with quality material, they're stretchy and comfortable. They were a bit long on me, even with the elastic around the ankles. I'm 5'3". I was able to fold them up and they still looked nice. I took away a star because the inside of one of the pockets was stitched into the seam of the pant, which makes it only partially functional.

These pants are my new favorite! They fit exactly as expected and are so soft and comfortable. I'm 5'7" and 140lbs and for a size M/6 which is my normal. I expected the pants to be a little longer (y2k) style, but they were not too short either. I need these in more colors! I want to wear them everyday!

These pants are not for anyone under 5' 8". I am 5'2" and I had a good 6 inches to spare in the legs and the rise was so long that I could pull these up to make a strapless jumpsuit. However, if you are way taller than me, the fabric and stitching were excellent quality and the color was a nice apricot pink.

These pants are not what I expected, because the fabric is shiny. However, I think they’ll be fine for walks on chilly days. The pants are well made and I like the soft fleece lining. I am 5’8” and 132lbs. and the size Medium, 32” inseam is a little large, but I think they’ll work.

These pants are okay. The white is definitely very sheer, even with light colored under, I would still lean towards purchasing one of the darker colors as the pants are thin. The waistband is also thin and cheap feeling. True to size - I got a large. I’m 5’8, 170 and usually buy a long in pants when available, and these are long enough for me! Returning because I found a different pair of flowy vacation pants I like better.

These pants are perfect for a warm day. They pair well casually or business casual. This color is not see through as there is a lining from waist to knee. For reference, I purchased a large in Light Apricot. The color appears more light beige than apricot. I'm 5 foot 1 and 160 pounds. To get the length at my ankle I have the waistband below my belly button. If I wear them on my waist they are a cropped length.
These pants are perfect for casual wear or work wear! Straight leg, mid rise and regular fit! The length (long) is perfect for me. True to size (6) for reference I am 143 lb and 5’7”

These pants are perfect for spring/summer weather. The fabric is lightweight and flowy it is not the softest linen but just reasonably soft. The style and fitting is good and gives a smart look. I do not find the belt really purposeful it seems unnecessary the waist has elastic for some extra stretch. It is a hight waist pant and the length is suitable for my height 5’4”. The fabric is not see through and does not get many wrinkles. I look forward to wearing these in the summer months because they will be comfortable to wear.

These pants are perfect for the office. They don’t show any lint or other material which is very nice. They fit perfectly and as expected. I got a size 4, I am 5’ 7” and 160lbs. It is a little short on me but I have very long legs so I’m used to it. These pants actually went longer than some of my other dress pants which was very nice! Will definitely buy more

These pants are perfect for work, perfect for a day out, I love them and whenever I wear them I get compliments. I am 5’2 and these pants don’t drag. They feel good, they don’t restrict the belly, they are comfortable and the material is nice not cheap.

These pants are perfect material! The color is wonderful, great quality and comfortable. I feel confident and ready to conquer the day in these. Definitely recommend. I ordered them.in black as well. I'm 5'9" and 180 lbs.

These pants are perfect, lots of stretch and form fitting. Not see through, I got black and worth the money. No belt loop tho but you won’t need it. I got a L, 5’6 190 bottom heavy. I could’ve sized down and I’m sure it would’ve fit more snug.

These pants are perfect! I have the green and red/orange pair and will definitely purchase more. I like them so much that I am leaving a review and that says a lot! I ordered a medium and large both sizes seem to accommodate my weight fluctuating. I am 5’2 170lb and curvy. I didn’t hem the pants since I wanted them super long. If you are looking for a wide leg pant these are the ones!
These pants are perfect. Feel great, not to heavy or to tight, I’m normally a 2 but did a 4 just incase. I really like them and think they are perfect for work. I’m 5’2 and 120-125pounds

These pants are pretty cute for summer and fit fairly well except the front band area is a bit strange. The back and sides of the waistband and regular and straight, but in the front the band kind of curves down more and thickens. I’m not really sure what the point of that is but I feel it’s unflattering and almost just looks like a sewing mistake. I’ll still probably wear them a fair amount this spring/summer. I’m 5’5 and they do hit above the ankle as advertised but that is that awkward length where these pants would probably only look good with flip flops and look strange/cut off with tennis shoes etc.

These pants are pretty stretchy, they have thinner material so they aren't too hot, and the length is great! I'm 5'4, waist 29.5, around 170lbs and they fit perfectly. These pants are quickly becoming my favorite pants. They can be dressed up or down. Fun for the beach or running around doing errands. They are comfy, flowy and flattering. I love them. I bought a medium. I am 5'6" and weigh 145.

These pants are quite comfy and cute!! Great material - and were vacuum sealed when they arrived. These pants are really comfortable . Problem for me is I’m 5’6” 160 lbs. I have a 10. I need the waist to be higher, from the crotch to the waist band it’s a short distance the length was great on me. The band is nice and comfortable sturdy at the top. These pants are really comfortable & oddly flattering. I’m only 5ft 4in and they hit just to the floor, so with shoes on they’ll be perfect. I wish the color was a little more true brown, they’re kind of orangey but I can’t wait to pair them with a cozy sweater for the fall / winter months!

These pants are really comfortable and easy to wear, my wife likes the style and fit of them. She likes how comfortable they are while still looking polished. There are no buttons, zippers or belt loops, so make sure to get your correct size. For reference she is is 5’4 and about 120lbs and got an extra small and likes how they fit, the length is perfect and the waist is snug but not uncomfortable. The material is good quality, she likes the thickness of them and thinks they will be fine as winter wear with boots and a turtleneck and can be worn with sandals and a tank top in warmer months. Overall she is really happy with them. She likes the style and fit. They are very versatile and classic bottoms that she expects to wear a lot. Her only issue is they don’t have pockets, just one small one in the back that isn’t really functional. I hope that sharing my opinion and experience here provides you some value when shopping and deciding on something like these pants, if so please let everyone know below.

These pants are really comfortable and soft. The “distressing” could use some work. It was just two slits cut below the knee. I would love it if they weren’t distressed at all. I’m 5’5” and they were long on me. Too long to wear flats but would look good with short heels.

These pants are really comfy. I am a size 16/18 and prefer a 2xl but I took a chance and got an xl. They fit really well. They are thin, I wouldn't recommend for winter weather. The waist band is slightly thicker than normal but not sewn in so it does tend to flip but it's easily rectified. I'm 5'6" and they are pretty long. No pockets! Overall I like them but in the color I got (light gray) I won't wear them out, just around the house. I might go back and get the black to wear out.

These pants are really cute! I’m 5’11 and wear a size 14/16 and they fit comfortably. They were short though (like just above my ankle) so I wore my docs so it wasn’t too noticeable (I do have big thighs and a butt so maybe that’s why?) It did leave like a black color on my legs after I took them off but that’s probably because I didn’t wash them. They’re really good quality!

These pants are really nice, especially for the price. There really classy looking and quite comfortable (fabric is 100% polyester). It feels like you’re not wearing anything as they are so lightweight. These would go great for work or even to wear casually. I’m 5’9” and around 150 lbs and ordered a large because I do not like anything at all tight on my waist, and these fit well, but I would have been fine with a medium because they do stretch. I would say they are true to size. Overall I think these are totally worth it.

These pants are remarkably awesome. They look great and fit really well. Something I will point out is that they are very long; the product pics shown are pants which have been hemmed by about 3 inches. The length is perfect in my bare feet but look sloppy with shoes (too baggy) so I'll have to have mine hemmed. I'm 5'6", 140lbs.

These pants are roomy and comfortable. I have large thighs and these complement me nicely, evening my legs a bit. The length is a bit long for me, but I expected this, since I am 5'2". With heeled shoes its not much of a problem, but with flats they might be a tad long. I usually wear a size 14 in jeans, I opted for the XL and they fit well. I think the Large would have fit well but I did not want to risk the Large fitting small on the thighs. Overall, I am pleased with the style and fit.

these pants are seriously great, especially if you’re a thick girly! hips are around 42 inches waist 28 and at first i ordered a large due to size chart for the hip area but they were a tad baggy in the waist and crotch area. I reordered them in a medium and they fit perfect! I would try and size down if you want a more fitted look but if you want them a little baggier order your usual size! also- they are short girl friendly! I am 5’1 and they aren't too long, pair them with platform sneakers or boots and your good to go!

These pants are seriously so comfortable!! I am 5'6" and before pregnancy I was 145lbs and wore a size 6. I am currently 22 weeks pregnant and now weigh 152lbs. I got a size 6 in these pants and they were just slightly too big but overall fit perfectly. They fit my leg length PERFECTLY and they were actually skinny jeans! I loved that these pants don't feel like they're cutting into my tummy like my pre-pregnancy do. I definitely recommend these pants and will absolutely be buying a couple more pairs soon!

These pants are so beautiful (in photo and in person) and I was so excited to get them. I realize I am very thin and I am not as curvy as the model in the picture, but I am also not emaciated. I ordered the smallest size available, a small, and was thinking they may be a little loose…possibly. I am swimming in them and I’d have to gain 15-20 pounds to fill them out. They are also super long as you can see I’m barefoot in some of the pictures, and I actually wore 5 1/2 inch platform heels in another to show how they look. Which was fine in the heels. But I cannot believe how large these are for a small. I would have to guess these are about a size 28 in US sizing or a size 7/8. To me, these are a generous medium (maybe even large) and I wonder if size tags got mixed up. I’m 5f4 and weigh 106. I am thin, so I typically wear a size 0 jeans. However, I was not expecting these to be this big. Again, maybe a little loose, but wow! I am very disappointed because these jeans are beautiful. I can tell that they would look great if they made an extra (double extra) small.

These pants are so bomb. They are soft and have good quality stretch to them. I ordered a 2x scared that they would run small but I could have easily done a large because of the stretch. They were a little big in the seat but you couldn’t tell due to the print. I’m 5’11 and they were definitely long enough. I think they would have been shorter with a smaller size. Overall I’m very satisfied with this purchase.

These pants are so comfortable and cute. The denim is not heavy and has some stretch to it. I Love the wide leg, button fly, and front pockets. I usually wear a size 2, but these only came in a size 4, which is perfect! They are a little loose but in such a good, comfortable way. You can wear these with a variety of different shoes, and the color and style will work for multiple seasons. I'm 5'3", 115 #s, and recommend these pants.

These pants are so comfortable and cute. The denim is not heavy and has some stretch to it. I Love the wide leg, button fly, and front pockets.
