These pants are so comfortable and elegant looking. They honestly exceeded expectations. Love that the back of waist is elastic so even if they are a big snug on the front, it has some give. I’m 5 ft 5 inches and 115 pounds and got size small. Perfect fit. They aren’t super long. It taller than me, you would need to wear flats. I can wear a heel but it’s just long enough.
These pants are so comfortable and it has a nice fit. I need a go to work slacks and these are perfect. Material is breathable and also seems easy to clean. I’m 5’ 3” and they aren’t too long.

These pants are SO comfortable and soft! They are a stretchy material so I ordered a size down and I still have room to spare! These are amazing they are the same comfort level as yoga pants but look exactly like fancy dress pants a boss and coworkers would never be able to tell these are stretchy material! I even did the see through test and they are not see through at all!!! I am so impressed by these and will be ordering multiple pairs! These are a GAME CHANGER! I am 5,2 120 pounds and ordered a size XS!

These pants are so comfortable, they are on the thinner side so they’re better for the warm weather. You can dress them up or down. I’m 5’3 about weigh 180 pounds I’m wearing heels in the photo so they’re a good length for me. I want them in every color!

These pants are so comfortable! I am 5’6” and usually a size 8-10 and ordered an XLarge to give me plenty of room. I could have definitely sized down l to a large, but the drawstring works, so they are perfect. I love the dark blue, I want other colors now!

These pants are so comfortable! I an 5'5 145lbs. I wear a size M/L so I went for the large here for the loose look. They can be dressed up or down. I wore them to a restaurant for dinner and I also wore the to christmas at the inlaws where we were all dressed comfortably. They are a little long but I was okay with that.
These pants are so comfortable! I got an XL based on reviews but could have worn the L. I'm 5'8" 200 ish lbs. I was worried they may be a bit short but the length is perfect!

these pants are so comfortable! I ordered a small because before pregnancy i was 125-128lb & 5’4”. they fit perfectly and even fit over my belly/back support band which you can see in the first picture! I am 25weeks 3days today and weigh about 133.2 and i feel there is definitely still enough stretch to get me through these last 14weeks! Will definitely order these again!

These pants are so comfortable. I got a size up because I've gained some weight, but that was utterly unnecessary. I'm 5'7" and these pants in Large are about 6" too long for me. I'm ordering medium to see how it fits differently, because if I can find the right proportions I'm hoping they will work. I love the fabric and style!

These pants are so comfy and cute. These will be my new favorite pants to wear into the office. I'm 5'3" and 110 lbs and size small fits perfectly. These are a bit shorter than I was expecting though. Not really long enough for me to roll up like they are in the photos.

These pants are SO comfy and perfect to lounge at home! I love the fit and color of them! I have them in the xs in the 30” inseam and they are a little long on me but nothing too crazy! I’m 5’1” for reference!

These pants are SO comfy and SO worth it. For reference i am 6ft 1in and i got the medium 37 in inseam and as you can see they go all the way to the floor and are very high waisted for those of you who like high waisted. Perfect for going out and also perfect for work. BUY THEM!!

These pants are so cute an I’m in love with the shade of pink. They are lightweight and are really soft (material is 65% Polyester, 35% Cotton). They have an elastic waistband that kinda makes me wish I would have sized up because it feels a little tight when I sit (I’m 5’9” and around 150 lbs and ordered a medium), but not so much as I wouldn’t want to wear these. I could definitely wear these lounging around the house or running errands in fall or winter. The reason I didn’t rate these five stars is because I think they are slightly higher priced than I think they should be, by maybe $5-10. Otherwise these are great sweatpants.

These pants are so cute and flattering. Not to mention comfortable. Upon taking them out of the packaging I thought they were going to be to small, however the stretch is wonderful. I purchase a size 2x. I normally wear a street size 20/22 & I'm 5'2. They were just a little long, but I wasn't tripping over or steeping on the bottom of them..

These pants are so cute and trendy. I got lots of compliments! I am 5ft2 and bought a small; they aren’t long like on the model. They fit well but I removed a star because they are a little scratchy on the inside. Otherwise I love them!

These pants are so cute and very comfortable! They aren’t scratchy on the inside which is nice. The length is good and actually go to my feet which is hard to find being 5’7. I do wish i was able to get an XL because it is at its max around my hips and thighs which worry me a little for after going to the bathroom and possibly ripping them. Also fair warning it does leave a black residue on your hands when touching the material, I’m not sure how to get rid of that. Theyre so cute though and i love the shorts in them for extra coverage

user_comment: These pants are so cute on. They have a highwaisted, wide legged design w/ a pleat above each leg. They have a button closure & half of the waistband is elastic to help w the perfect fit. I’m typically an 8/10 or medium in pants, but after checking out the measurements on the size chart I decided to order a size 6 & they fit perfectly. So with that being said, I think these run a little big, but as long as you choose your size based on the seize chart measurements you should be good. The length of these run long, but they’re perfect w heels which is how I prefer to wear them anyway. Not to mention, im on the short side at 5’2, so these are tall girl friendly. The material is on the thinner side,, so unfortunately these may not be the best to wear during the winter, but I plan on getting tons of use out of them before it gets too cold. The material also doesn’t have any stretch, but these are still comfortable due to the baggier fit. I love the classic pin stripe design, but the thin white stripes don’t stand out as much as some other pinstriped designs. Regardless they still have a great look & a white top will easily help to make the pinstripes more noticeable. These seem to be pretty well made too, as I have not come across any flaws. Overall these are great pants that are both cute & comfortable & I definitely recommend them.

These pants are so cute! I'm about 5'1, 115 pounds and I ordered a small. They are oversized, but in a cute way. At my height, they hit just above my ankle. I like the frill and bow on the high waistline- it helps to give the pants some shape with a tighter fitted shirt.

These pants are so cute! Light weight but feel high quality. Flowy and comfortable, but very thin (think underwear lines). These would work for so many occasions (weddings, showers, reunions) or just an every day work pant. I wanted to share pictures in the multiple colors because I couldn’t find photo reviews of some of these. I ordered medium, I’m 5’6”, 155. Hope this is for someone!

These pants are so cute! Pretty good quality too! The only thing is that they are so short. I’m 5’7 and these are definitely ankle swingers… Will wear again though as the sequins got stuck together very minimally compared to other sequin pants I’ve worn before.
These pants are so cute. I got lots of compliments every time I’ve worn them. They are thin but not see through. I’m 5’7” 155lbs and I ordered a medium and they fit perfectly.
These pants are so flattering and comfortable. True to size and very stretchy. I’m 5’2, 130lbs, and ordered a small. They are a little long tho, just something to consider.

These pants are so flattering, comfortable, and versatile. You can really dress them up or down. I am shorter and usually need pants shortened, but I think because these are already meant to be ankle length, it’s actually perfect pant length for petites! I am 5’2” 121 lbs, got a small. I’m thinking of getting another pair.

These pants are so fun and on trend. They could be dressed up or down I’m tall 5’11 approximately 175. I usually wear a 12/14 and first purchased an extra large, which was baggy in the legs- returned for a large. Additionally ordered the hot pink and silver. I’m returning the silver because they’re a bit more lavender than desired. The hot pink is scrumptious. These pants are a bit short for us tall gals but I can style with ankle strap shoes or boots. Nice fabric and good value.

These pants are so lightweight and soft and perfect for a warm day! They're SUPER wide, which gives them a very flowy appearance. The pockets are deep and hold my Pixel 8 Pro without any issues, and the drawstring keeps the pats at my waist. The pattern is bright and beautiful, and other than some wrinkles that will come out after washing (which I don't actually care about) these are ready to go. For sizing: I'm 5'3" tall and they just brush the ground when I walk when pulled up to my actual waist. I'm currently around a size 18/20 and I feel like there's still a lot of stretch left in the waist band. The pants themselves do not have much stretch, but there's still quite a lot of space.

These pants are SO nice. I am really surprised. They have a nice weight. They are not paper thin but also not super thick. Great for hot summer. They are buttery soft. I am 5'7 155lbs I ordered a medium and they are a perfect length for me. They hit right above my foot. I can easily wear sandals with them, and they dont ride up really short when I sit down (I have long legs). They have pockets. The thicker waist band gives good tummy support. They fit really comfortably around the waist. I would buy several other colors. I recommend these!

These pants are so nice. They are in style which is awesome, but also comfortable! They do have pockets (yay!) and fit true to size. I feel so fashionable in these and ready to go get business done in them. I’m 5’4 and they’re the perfect length and size in a small. I recommend them.

These pants are so perfect for all year round. I liked the fit, the fabric and the color. It is of great quality and seems like a durable garment. I ordered a small size and it fits just right. For reference, I’m 5’4”, around 145lbs, 37” hips, 31” waist. Also, the length of the pants is great for my height. This is that type of pants that you can easily dress up or down. I love wearing it with white sneakers or any type of sandals. They are so comfy and flattering. I highly recommend it.

These pants are so pretty - a flow, silky feeling fabric with a pretty leaf pattern. They have an elasticized waist band, and even an inner lining of "shorts" made of a very thin fabric to avoid any "see through" issues in the panty area. My only problem is the length. I am 5'21/2" and weigh 160, which is why I needed the size L, and these drag the ground! I will have to take up the bottom hem in order to wear them comfortably. These will be great for summer wear as they are cool and breezy feeling, so I have time to do that little chore. Overall, I am pleased with these pants.

These pants are so pretty and flattering on. They feel soft and light and look adorable! Apparently I accidentally ordered a L when I meant to order an XL, but I actually thought the fit was perfect at that size. They feel a touch shorter than I'd like, resting firmly above, not at the ankle. The size up wouldn't add much in length though, so not sure if I'll bother exchanging them. 5'9" and 195lbs
These pants are so soft and comfortable and have a nice fit! I’m 5”10 - 158lbs and got size Large which fits perfectly! It’s high waisted and has no pockets. I love it!

These pants are so stinking cute and fit amazing. I am 5’5”-138lbs…I bought a small. I took these out of the package, did a quick throw in the dryer and wore them that day to a work event. It was a little hot, and the material is linen and light weight, so they were very comfortable.. They are high waisted, so I bought a white crop t-shirt from amazon and called it a day!! I am ordering another pair now!! I promise you will love them!

These pants are so super stretchy and comfortable to wear. I ordered a size 8 was excited to find a longer inseam. At 5'7" and 160 pounds the 33" inseam and it was actually too long. I will be returning for a shorter pair. Overall I really liked these pants.

These pants are so super stretchy and comfortable to wear. I ordered a size 8 was excited to find a longer inseam. At 5'7" and 160 pounds the 33" inseam and it was actually too long. I will be returning for a shorter pair. Overall I really liked these pants.

These pants are so trendy and you can dress them up or down based on where you’re wanting to wear them. There are a lightweight fabric, but they’re not see-through. I am 5 foot four and I weigh 150 pounds. I am wearing a size medium, and these were very comfortable and did not give me a muffin top. I did not feel like they were too long and the slits on the side to make it to where I had no issues walking in them in sandals today.

These pants are soft, very comfy and have just the right amount of stretch to them. They look well made. I love the tan color. I ordered a large which fits everywhere. The length is good, a tiny bit longer would have been ok, too. I'm 5'4" and the L comes just past my ankles. The waist line is ok, a little more room will be nice if I can lose a few inches. That is truly not the pants sizing issue though, it's definitely my issue. I'm truly glad they even fit me, knowing my current waistline. Very nice pants!
These pants are sooo amazing!! I’m 5’ 5” and 220lbs. These fit so good and will look so cute with a distressed tee for a Vegas raiders game!!

These pants are such a cute vibrant pink color! The material is a satin like polyester blend. I'm only 5 feet tall and these fit just right in terms of length, they hit right at my ankles. I ordered the x-small and they fit perfectly. I really like the pockets. My only minor complaint is that these are pull on pants and I always prefer to have a zipper on my pants.

These pants are super adorable, and very nice quality. I absolutely LOVE the pink color. However, here are the issues I have with these pants: 1. The waistband is soooo tight. I stretched them out on the back of a chair for two days hoping it would make the elastic give a little. I even steamed it while stretched but neither gave me much, if any relief. 2. I am tall, 5'9" and pants are always short on me. I can make these long enough by pulling them down from my waist (which then makes the elastic even tighter when lowered to my hip) but I have a lot of sagging in the crotch. I will still wear these but will have to wear them with a long silk shirt that will cover up the crotch area. 3. Last things to know are that you should NOT wear any lotion of any kind when wearing these pants. I mistakenly had some on when I wanted to wear these and this fabric really shows moisture so I couldn't wear them and had to send them to the wash. Which, MAKE SURE YOU WASH THEM SEPARATELY. The pink dye in these pants bled onto other items in my wash. Nothing was important so I didn't care but everyone should know and take heed of this warning. Anyway, super cute pants. I may just take the elastic out completely (if that is possible) and make it a drawstring waist because I DO want to wear these.

These pants are super comfortable, have 5 full pockets, belt loops, and come in fun colors! I typically wear a 12 size pant and ordered these in a L. They are a perfect skinny fit but and have a little give in the lower leg-ankle area so as to not look like a legging. Love these and will definitely order more. I’m 5’5” and 165 lbs for reference.

These pants are super comfortable. I'm not allowed to wear leggings to work and no one even noticed they are a little big and I fear if I lose weight they'll be too big but for now they're great. I'm 5'8", 165 - 170lbs, I ordered the large.

These pants are super comfortable. You could wear them as pj's! They feel like a t-shirt material, but I am totally going to pair them with a nice summery blouse and wear them to dinner!! I am 5'6" and the length is perfect for flats or sandals.
These pants are super comfy & look great on. I bought them in both black & blue, and I love them. For reference, I’m 5’5” & 140 lbs wearing a 6R and they fit perfect.

These pants are super comfy and lightweight. For reference, I’m 5’3” 146lbs and usually wear around 10/12 in pants. I went with the 12 and they are pretty loose so I’ll prob go with the 10 instead. But overall definitely recommend!

These pants are super comfy, can be dressed up or down, wash/dry easily and don’t wrinkle easily when wearing. I’m 5’4” 145 athletic build. I ordered a small and they skim the ground in flat flip flops. Since they are so forgiving in the XS may have been a better length but they are not getting stepped on/tore up so it’s fine. A thicker waist band would be nice. I have received many compliments and others wanting the link.

These pants are super comfy. They've become one of my favorite pants now. They are a bit too long for me even with a good 4 inch heel added on. I'm 5'5" and I still had to cut off a bit from the bottom. If your a tall girl you most likely wont have to worry about the length. But if your short like me then still get it but cut the bottom to desired length.
These pants are super cute and confy, runs a bit small. The only issue is tgey are shorter on me , I'm 5'9",they hit me at my ankles exactly.
These pants are super cute and extremely comfortable! I love them so much that I'm buying more! I am 120-125 pounds and 5ft 3. I wear a size 4 jeans- about 27 inches. I bought small!

These pants are super cute and fit to a “T” so they’re true to size for sure! I’m 200lbs and I wear a large however, in the photo it shows the pants with more of a ridged pant leg bottom and when I received them the hanging tassle things were SUPER LONG and nothing like the photo.. so I just cut them down and now the pants are perfect.

These pants are super cute and flattering. They are a heavier weight material, so definitely look and feel more like a jegging or really stretchy jean instead of leggings which is what I wanted. They are very skinny and a true ankle length which is hard for me to find at 5' 4". I am around 135ish pounds and curvy and the 6 short fits perfectly (I'd say they run comparable to AE jeans/junior clothing in sizing but maybe a size bigger than some women's sized jeans). They do have pockets on the rear but they do not look like "mom jeans". Also, the elastic waist band is thick and it seems to hold in the tummy area nicely. Definitely recommend!

These pants are super cute and the fabric is very nice. Also squat proof, I hit a full leg day in these! My only complaint is I wish they were just an inch maybe two longer. I’m 5’9 and like my flare pants to just barely touch the floor.

These pants are super cute as pictured but they just do not hang right on my daughter's 5'2" frame. We always anticipate hemming pants and maybe that will allow the wide leg to hang correctly. For reference, she is wearing an xsmall. The quality seems on point and she describes them as "very comfortable."

These pants are super cute, soft, comfy, and good quality. However, I will be returning because they are very high watered on me, and when I sit, the end of the pant leg sits at mid calf on me. For reference, I’m 5’ 9” and ordered a size 4. I’m bummed they’re not long enough!

These pants are super cute!! One of my only complaints is that the zipper doesn’t stay up throughout the day. I was able to fix this by just using a string attached to the button of the pants, but it would be much more convenient if the zipper would stay up on its own. I’m 5’1 and 120lbs, so these were a bit long and just a bit too big around the waist. Nonetheless, they’re super cute and any minor issues can be fixed quickly and easily!

These pants are super cute. I'm 5'2" and 145 pounds and ordered a size M. They fit me well and were comfortable. There is elastic on the back that tightens them around the waist to make them look more flattering. The length was just right for me to wear a short heel. I am not sure that they would work for someone that is tall. Unfortunately, I only wore them for one day because after a long night of dancing, I sat on a concrete fence and caused a lot of irreparable snagging on the fabric. I should have known better but my feet were hurting.

These pants are super flattering. They have a great quality material, it’s a dressier feel. The waistband is very stretchy, and they run pretty true to size. I’m 5’6 1/2 tall and I normally wear a size 12/14 in pants, or a L/XL. I ordered these in an XL and they fit perfectly, the waistband has stretch in it that can fit someone a little bigger as well, and there’s plenty of room in the hip area. I did try the size larger which also fit but there was too much material and it didn’t look as flattering so i’m keeping the xl.
These pants are super light and comfy and the hem is actually long enough for me, which is rare! If you’re under 5’8” you will probably need to hem or wear with heeled shoes

These pants are super long on me but it was to be expected as I am only 5ft tall. I trimmed about 2 inches off and with shoes on it's a perfect length! It's high waisted and the pockets are deep. The jean is medium weight so it's not super thick but doesn't feel super cheap either. It has some stretch so it's super comfortable so far. I bought it in a medium and my waist is 28-29.

These pants are super silky, soft, and stretchy. They're very comfortable to wear but aren't flattering on me at all. I'm usually an XL-XXL, US size 16-20, and went by the size chart and ordered the 3XL for my 40" waist and 49" hips. But I think my usual size might have looked better. I love the pockets! But these are thinner though and the fit just isn't right for me at all. They're okay but I wouldn't personally pick them again.
These pants are super stretchy and comfortable. They are cute and flattering. I’ve bought them in three different colors now. I’m 5’5” and 120 lbs. I got a small.

These pants are super stretchy and perfect for people with thicker thighs and a small waist (always my issue when buying pants). For reference I am 5’4” athletic build and I got the extra small. (I ended up returning because I liked but didn’t love them, and I can’t justify a purchase I don’t absolutely adore, so that’s the only reason for the four stars.)

These pants are the “pull-on formal” type with no fly/ button, a thick elastic waist and detailing like overstitched pockets and belt hooks to make them work-appropriate. The fabric is of pretty decent thickness but if I kept them I’d probably need shapewear to cover the vpl and lumps and bumps. I ordered them in long, as the current fashion for flood pants doesn’t suit me, and they would be just about right with a modest heel (I’m 5’6” and somewhat short waisted). I have a small waist and big booty, but I was hoping they would work for me due to the stretch and elastic waist but they gaped really badly at the back. If I went down a size they would probably fit better at the waist but I wouldn’t want them to be any tighter on the hips for work pants. I returned them because of this but think the quality and style are good.
These pants are the cutest! I had to buy another pair in a different color. They’re comfortable and the corduroy is nice and stiff, which I like. I’m 5’9” and 118lbs. I got a small and it fit well.

These pants are the perfect length (I'm 5'4) and really great quality! The material is thick, soft & flowy all in one. Highly recommend, will definitely be purchasing another color. For reference I'm 123 lbs and the XS fits well 🤍

These pants are the perfect shade of green and fit fabulously well. I have washed them several times, and they so look as good as new. I cannot believe the quality for the price and would highly recommend them. I am 5'3", weigh 100 pounds, and usually wear a 27 inch inseam. The length of the regular inseam fits me perfectly.

These pants are too adorable! They are very comfortable with just enough stretch. I’m 5’6”, weigh 140lbs and I ordered a medium. They fit perfect. It was worth the weight to get them. The delivery took a couple of weeks. So if you’re wanting them for an event, don’t wait yo order!

These pants are true to size & comfortable. The fabric has good thickness. I'm 5' and 135lbs, Medium is good but it's a tad too long for me. The waist is pretty stretchy and perfect width so it doesn't roll. Pretty good pants
These pants are very comfortable and extremely flattering. I am 5’ 6” and weigh 195. I ordered the 14 and I love them. I could probably have ordered the 12 but I like the 14s for non spanx days!
These pants are very comfortable and feel sturdy! I would say they are more relaxed in the legs than in the picture (more of a boyfriend style). I’m 5’10” and 150 lbs and the 10 long fit great!

These pants are very comfortable and look super cute! I am 5’4 and 125lb and it fits true to size! but I am not very tall and the length of this pants are a perfect for me! but if you are taller this pants might be short for you!

These pants are very comfortable and look super cute! I am 5’4 and 125lb and it fits true to size! but I am not very tall and the length of this pants are a perfect for me! but if you are taller this pants might be short for you!

These pants are very comfortable and soft. Fit perfectly I got a small and I am 5ft 110 lbs. the only thing I find weird is the 2 front knee pockets don’t have any kind of closure. I bought 2 pair and would buy more. I wash them and no shrinkage at all. As with other reviewers the zipper can be a nightmare to get up and down. I hope it doesn’t break cause I really like these pants.

These pants are very comfortable maybe a little too big, but I love them. I’m 5’8 and 156 lbs and got a size large. I could easily probably fit a medium as I have an invisible belt helping keep it snugger.

These pants are very comfortable to wear, and the fabric feels soft against my skin. I found it convenient that I could remove the wrinkles from packaging by simply putting them in the dryer for a few minutes, and they looked great afterward. The wide legs and drawstring waist give these pants a casual feel, but they can also be dressed up with a nice blouse. The elastic waist is very forgiving, so if you're in between sizes, the waistline has some give. I also appreciate that they have pockets, which is always a plus for me as they provide a place for my hands. As for the size, I ordered my usual medium size, but these pants feel and look a bit too big for me. There's too much material around my hips and backside, which isn't very flattering. If I order again, I'll definitely go down a size. (For size reference, I'm 5'6" and 124 lbs.) Other than the sizing issue, I really like these pants, and the fabric has a linen-like appearance. I've attached some photos to give you a closer look and hope that they help you out. Thank you!
These pants are very comfortable. I am 5'8" and was afraid they would not be long enough, but they are. I did go up one size. I get lots of compliments when I wear these.

These pants are very comfortable. The material is dressy looking. The elastic waist is very comfortable and the length is perfect for me. I am 5'7". The blue and white pattern is very cheerful and beachy. The pants are flowy and lightweight and cool. The quality is good and the price is fair.

These pants are very comfortable. They have pockets In the front. The fabric is light weight and perfect for summer errands, yoga or casual wear events. I have a medium. Women’s 6/8 in clothes. I’m around 5’4. The length is fine for me but for someone shorter you it maybe a little long. It also washes very well and the color does not fade. I typically let the pants airdry.
These pants are very comfy I even bent over and stretched my legs. I’m gonna use for work. I’m 5’0 and weigh 126 pounds. I got size 2 short.

These pants are very flattering, with a pleated front, imitation back pockets, and a nice drape. The fabric is a slinky, dressy material that has enough weight to drape smoothly and not bulge stiffly at the hips. I love that they have the impression of back pockets, which creates a nice silhouette; you can see from my images that they're a sewn 'fake' that doesn't actually have any function beyond looks. The waist is elastic in the back, with a zipper and tab closure in front. The size large fits as expected at the waist, and is about 29" inseam. The pink color is a nice cool tone. Overall, I'm really impressed with these pants and so pleased I decided to order them for spring!

These pants are very flattering. Even more than the bootcut pants, especially for those with muscular calves. Material is medium weight. Style is versatile. They can be to be worn in office or lounge around in the house. Quality is also very good. I’m 5’7” and ordered 31 inseam.

These pants are very high waisted, have decent pockets for female pants with a frayed, wide flare leg. The denim has a touch of elastic to it so they hug well without needing to do gymnastics to get them on. I was impressed that not only were they long enough but at 5’10”, touched the floor barefooted, something most pants never do. The zipper is metal and well sewn in, the rivets are all well pressed but the button is just a snap on which means it’s loose on the fabric and will not last overly long. They wash well without shrinking, keeping their vivid white and black pattern but the frayed bottom did fray a lot more. May need either a stitch line or some fray stop to keep them from falling apart long term.

These pants are very light weight and comfy. I was a little thrown by the texture at first. The material does wrinkle easily. They are much longer than they appear on the model. I got a size small and am 5’2”, 125lbs—these pants touched the floor when I wore them. Still ended up looking cute, but not what was presented in the listing.

These pants are very nice for curvy girls. I have a 31" waist and 41" hips. The cut combined with the stretch is very flattering in the size 10P for me. I think that because these are cut for this specific body shape and with the stretch in the fabric, I could have sized down (normally I size up for my hips). There is a bit of excess fabric at the hips but with a bit of ironing they relax and look great with plenty of room to move. Even though they're a bit big, I love the way that they drape, looking wide and relaxed with a gently graduating boot cut. The finish is nicely tailored and professional. The length is great and measures 29" at the inseam: flats or heels appropriate for me at 5'2". I would still recommend to size down if you're in between. With them being sold as a gabardine trouser, I was expecting them to be a bit more of a classic suiting material. It still has a nice weave to the fabric so I'm pleased with the finish. In all, these Rafaella pants are good quality and excellent value and my bum feels great in them!

These pants are very pretty and of a nice quality material, however I will be returning them. 1. I didn’t find that they were becoming on me. They made my hips look wide. 2. They fit well, except for the elastic waistband, which was too tight, not relaxed, & not comfortable. I chose the black & coral to wear at the beach. They need to be comfortable. If I had chosen a solid color and they were becoming on me, I could see keeping them. For reference, I’m 5’2”, 108 lbs., size 4/small The length was perfect for me. I considered exchanging the size small for a medium, but thought that they would be too big everywhere else & too long, which would require hemming. Before sending them back, I tried them on again. They are high waisted, so I pulled them down a little bit on my actual waist. They seemed more relaxed looking on me, and the elastic stretched some. It was more comfortable, but I still didn’t think they looked go on me. Pulling them down some of course made them a little longer.

These pants are very soft and comfortable but, as others have said, just a bit thinner than expected. However, for the price, I have no complaints. They come just to the bottom of my feet and I’m 5’4”, so if you’re tall they might be a bit too short for you, and if you’re short you may need to hem or fold them. They wash well and have nice pockets and a nice, comfortable drawstring waist that is wide enough not to dig into you. There is a logo by the one pocket and it’s situated nicely.

These pants are very stretchy which is nice, but the camel toe situation in addition to the length for a taller gal like me was a no go. They also made such an annoying/weird sound whenever you move. Disappointed that these didn’t work out, but for shorter ladies they may be fine. Also these are very stretchy—I am normally a large and probably could have ordered a medium. 5’9, 170, pear shaped with curvy butt

These pants are warm and amazing. I LOVE them! I wore them out to dinner multiple nights on my Aspen snowboarding trip where temps were 15-20 degrees. They are warm, stretchy, very flattering, and you can dress them up or down! I wore them to dressy dinners and more casual dinners. I packed 4 pairs of pants for dinners and these were the only ones I needed. Travel win, winter warmth win, fashion win! I'm 5'7", 122 lbs, and wear size 25 in jeans. The small fit me perfect!

user_comment: These pants arrived a bit wrinkled and I threw the in the dryer with a wet towel and the wrinkles came out. I really like the way they fit - true to size (I'm a medium). They have an elastic waistband in the back and a tie in the front. I paired then with a white body suit and a denim jacket and it was a rather smart outfit. The picture may not reflect it well, but they do fit great and are cut really well (the pockets don't gap and stick out). For reference of length, I'm 5'9".

These pants did shrink quite a bit. I am 5' 1 1/2" tall, about 114 lbs, and this is how the pants fit me. I have a long torso with a high waist. I have washed them a few times since, and they have stayed the same length for me, after the initial shrinkage. Overall, I like them, and get many compliments when I wear them.

These pants do not have structure and do not flatter my shape. They do have some stretch, are long (I wish they were a tad bit longer) and are soft. They are good for wearing around the house. I am 5’10” 211lbs

These pants do not have structure and do not flatter my shape. They do have some stretch, are long (I wish they were a tad bit longer) and are soft. They are good for wearing around the house. I am 5’10” 211lbs

These pants far exceeded my expectations. Very well made. They are made to be worn baggy but I ordered a size down and they fit perfect. I’m 5’6” 130 and I got a size small. I have already ordered more.
These pants fit amazing. I’m 5’3 weigh 150 and bought a size 9 and they fit like a glove. They are definitely a must have. So comfortable and I didn’t feel hot in them at all.

These pants fit and feel like leggings - not pants or slacks. I can't wear leggings to work and I'm looking for good work pants. They feel and fit nicely (I can fit somewhere between a S-M, I'm 131lbs, 5'5 and I bought a size Small). They're cute on, just not what I'm looking for.

These pants fit and feel like leggings - not pants or slacks. I can't wear leggings to work and I'm looking for good work pants. They feel and fit nicely (I can fit somewhere between a S-M, I'm 131lbs, 5'5 and I bought a size Small). They're cute on, just not what I'm looking for.

These pants fit fairly nicely. I wear a US 8 in jeans, and the waist is not snug (I received a M). I’m not a huge fan of the elastic band at the waist, but it isn’t too tight. The inseam is long enough for me. I’m 5’4”, but have longer legs. The crotch area leaves a little to be desired. I don’t have a butt, but if I did these pants would be riding up in places that I don’t want them riding up. The material is flowy, comfortable, and not see through, but I don’t feel that these would be as cool as lighter weight materials in the high heat of the middle of summer. They are a cotton/linen blend (70/30) so maybe they might be okay in the high heat? I just don’t know that answer for sure. I feel that since they are slightly thicker than what I was expecting, that they would be great from very early spring through mid fall - depending on the climate where you live. They are thick enough for me to wear in temperatures in the 60°F (15°C). They are well made. I love that they have pockets, and the color is perfect. It’s like a mix of denim and teal. Overall, I would recommend, but if you have wider hips, a butt, or thicker thighs, there might be an issue in the crotch area. Check other reviews and find people who are similar in body type to see how it works for them.

These pants fit great! They were veey comfortable on. The faux leather looked very nice and it's not in your face synthetic. I liked the button closure detail. The pants a super long, but I am 5' 1". I had to hem them, but that is not a big deal and it happens often at my height.
These pants fit me perfect!! They have some stretch and are really comfortable. I’m 5’2 and they are perfect length for me. I can’t wait to wear these out😊
These pants fit me perfectly. I got the Size 2 - Long- and I'm 5' 8.5 and weigh 128 lbs. They are also well made and very comfy.

These pants fit perfectly although I gained some weight before wearing them. The material felt great again my skin. Comfortable and soft material. Definitely runs true to size. I’m 5’0 148lbs wearing a medium. No alterations needed for height!…Bought these in black as well.

These pants fit perfectly and are comfortable and true to size.....here's the but...but if you are under 5'5" you aren't considered short....you are extra extra short apparently and they don't have that option....so I will keep them but I have to get them hemmed because they are for work and I'm not sure if a giant rolled cuff is appropriate. Gray pants feel thinner and softer and stretchier than the blue ones...more form fitting and I don't really think they are flattering but they are pretty comfortable.

These pants fit perfectly! The material is soft and comfortable. I have GI issues and gained weight and bloat easily . I needed an elastic waist to accommodate . LOL! I ordered the Medium, I am 5’3. 135 lbs. size 8. Hoping to return to a smaller size soon! And know these will still fit properly.. My only complaint is the pockets. I don’t care for how low they are and they used the wrong print . The print underneath is much nicer than the and the pockets look a little off.

These pants fit perfectly. They are a tad long but I paired it with high heels and it was fine. They are soft and have a good stretch. High in the waist. They’re very comfortable! I’m 5’3” 146lbs and I ordered a medium, which is my size and they fit better than I expected.

These pants fit true to size. I am 5’3 and weight 130 lbs and I normally get a size 6 because I don’t like my pants too fitted. I got a size 6 for these and they fit perfectly!! They are super comfortable and soft. They also look like good quality. The only con is that they get wrinkly so they need to be ironed before used.

These pants fit true to size. I am always an XL in pants (if not larger), I have big thighs & wide hips (5'5 200 lbs for reference), and hate when pants are too tight around my legs. These ones aren't! They are not see through, and have soft and stretchy fabric. There are pockets (thank god!) and the wide leg is a nice touch. I am average height and the length is perfect. However, I cannot rate these 5 stars because I just can't stand that the stitching ruins the pattern (pictured). I wish the pattern would have been lined up at the seams- then these would be 5 stars!

These pants fit well. I’m 5’4” 175 lbs. usually wear a large, 10-12 in women’s. I have hips and a booty, an hour glass shape. Instead of my regular size I ordered XL because I wanted them loose. They are not loose but not snug either. If you want them really flowy like the model in the pic, go 2 sizes up. Love them!!

These pants fits absolutely perfect!!!! I’m thoroughly IMPRESSED!!! They hugged every single curve 😍 I’m gonna get another colour. My weight is 155 and I’m 5ft 3” tall and I got size medium. I have absolutely no problems at all with these pants.

These pants for me are not only hugh waisted but high water ready (come up above the ankle), which the latter is not great. Being taller this is a problem for me. The waist and hips fit great and I really like the fabric. For reference: Female; 5'7" ; 130lbs ; Athletic/Active ; long torso ; small bust.

These pants have a lovely print. Side pockets and elastic waist with inside drawstring. Waistband is wide. Material is like a crepe feel. Not see through. Sizing is a tad off. Based on size chart I’m a large and for the most part length and butt fit, however waist was a bit tight. Will see if I can cut some of the inside elastic. I’m 5’3” at 160 and wear size 12.

These pants have a thicker than expected material. I’d say they would be good for spring, summer, and fall and don’t feel like cheap thin pants. They are very comfortable on and long enough for my 34” inseam. Took a star off because I bought them for work, and they look more fitted in the hip area then I was hoping for, and do show panty lines. The pockets are a great addition, but they do stick out some on me, probably because they are more fitted in the hips on me. With the right shirt they should still be great for work. I would buy different colors. The wrinkles are straight out of the package, I haven’t washed them yet.For reference I’m 5’9”, 42” hip, 34” inseam

These pants have a very strange fit. For context, I'm 5 feet tall and weigh 122 pounds, and I ordered a small. First, the pants have an extremely high waist; I have to pull them up to my chest for the crotch to fit properly. Additionally, the pants are really long, so they might work better for those with longer legs. The most unusual aspect of these pants is that because the material is thin, they are lined with a pair of shorts. These inner shorts are bulky, making it look like you're wearing a diaper or something underneath. It's a very odd look. However, I do like that the pants are soft. Be aware that they shrink.

These pants have been great. The stretchy waistband is comfortable and keeps the pants up well enough! They're not super thin so I've felt comfortable wearing them outside in 55 degree weather. The length is perfect for me. I like having the under belly band because I don't love anything tight on my belly. Here's hoping this continues to work through third trimester! I am 5'5 and somewhere between 125 and 130 (depending on the day) and just hit the third trimester of my first baby. I would buy these again!

These pants have such a vivid color. The green is very solid green. I feel it’s almost not true to the photos in the description but pretty close. They are stretchier than I thought they’d be and fit well. I am 5’ 5” and about 186 lbs. I hover between a 12-14 depending on the brand and the day. I went with a 14, and they’re spot on. I definitely would not have gotten away with a 12. Sometimes 14s tend to be long on me, but these are perfect bootcut length for my proportions. The rise is like a high mid. I carry my weight in my legs and belly, and while they don’t have tummy control I still feel they are pretty flattering. These seem well suitable for 1st and 2nd trimester for most people, I think. They are a little firmer elastic than I expected so I think it will depend on the person since some people gain more inches on their waist during a pregnancy than others. As far as I can tell, I think these will comfortably come out as far as 13 inches past your pre-pregnancy waist, and maybe a few inches more, depending on your tolerance towards tighter elastic feeling. However I think these are really great for apple-shaped people or who suffer from extreme bloating. They hit right on the natural waist and with a longer top that covers the elastic, they look just like fashionable jeans. Actually these are probably the most flattering jeans I've ever worn, they make my legs look soooo skinny. I usually buy jeans in size 10 - and these in size Small are like a size 6 on the legs part and like from size 8 out to like a good 22 or so for the waist. The unstretched waist is 30 inches, the rise is 9.5", the inseam is actually 27" (and I am 5'3" so this is perfect for me). Unstretched hip is 36", they stretch out fine to my 38" hips. My waist size fluctuates a lot and then it's not unusual for me to bloat out as much as 10 inches by dinner so these are so great for me. I'll see how they hold up to more washings but I'm probably going to try out more from this brand. The only cons I really see so far is the lack of front pockets and that the inside thread feels a bit scratchy in places.

These silky high waisted palazzo pants are a timeless classic. The fabric is a silky feeling synthetic material that drapes well, and they are very flattering. When taken straight out of the box, they were a little wrinkled but that is to be expected. With a few minutes in the dryer they flattened right out. The waistband falls at the smallest part of my waist -these are very high waisted, and plenty long in the crotch. The pockets are not too shallow, and can fit my phone without slipping out. The waist band is both elastic and drawstring, so they are comfortable, functional and adjustable. I wish they were longer though- I am 5 foot 6 and with completely flat sandals they were about two inches from the floor (and I prefer a floor length pant). I think if you are shorter than me, the pants would hit the floor or perhaps allow a higher heel if you're close to five feet tall. If you're taller than me (for example 5 foot 8 or more) then they would be more of an awesome Culottes length. I ordered a size Medium, which based on the chart fits a size 8 to 10. I am a size 10 and these fit nicely in the waist (meaning the elastic was a perfect comfortable fit and did not require additional cinching with the drawstring). Overall these are a breezy daytime pant, the type that you see on European women with strappy sandals, a form fitting body suit and a great pair of sunglasses.

These silky satin dress pants would be absolutely great to wear to a business casual night out event, a work party, date night…. literally anytime you want to look fabulous. The pleated front ads for detail around the waist where are the pants do not need to be super tight. The pants hug your butt nicely as well as your thighs and ankle yet is still loosely fitted. The material is silky, smooth and not horribly thin. The pockets are nice and the elastic waist is very comfortable. I am 5‘11“ tall and 142 pounds. My waist measures 32 inches and my hips measure 39.5 inches. I ordered the medium and it fit perfectly.

These straight leg jeans by Levi's are high-quality and flattering. Great fit, and comfortable too. I am 5'7", size 8-10, 152 lb (37"/31"/40"), and ordered these jeans in a size 8 per the size chart. The size 8 fits me perfectly so, if you are between sizes, you may want to size a little bit down. These jeans are definitely high rise and come up all the way to my belly button. They fit me exactly perfectly all the way down: not too tight anywhere, but not baggy and loose either. The fit around the butt area isn't the most flattering, but it does me OK. The length is also perfect on me, perhaps on the long side. I also appreciate that the fabric is substantial and the pockets are real. The front pockets are not very deep, though the back pockets are sufficiently large. The fabric is quite substantial compared to other jeans, but still soft enough not to be irritating. Overall a really nice pair of jeans from Levi's if you're looking for straight leg.

These straight leg, business / casual pants are quite comfortable. They are made of a super soft knit material that is a little fuzzy too. I got the X-Large Petite size and they fit well around my waist, but were a little shorter than I prefer on leg length. I am 5' 4", and often pants are too long. Since they had the petite sizes I went with that, but I guess I am borderline between sizes for the sizing of these pants. According to the chart and X-Large in regular would have 42.1" legs and I know those would be too long. Sort of a pickle on that one, lol. They are well made with solid stitching. The pleat down the front gives them a more stylish look for wearing away from home as well as lounging at home. They have a drawstring for waist adjustment, if needed. There are no pockets, though. With the thickness of the material, I thought they would be very warm, but the knit material must breath well as I wore them for 15 minutes or more while doing a couple things in the house and they were just as warm as the thin pants I had on before trying these on. They arrived in a zip bag and folded with them was a piece of tissue paper. Not sure why, but the tissue paper left tiny (pin-head sized) pieces of white here and there on the pants. The paper looked fine with no tears, but somehow it shed onto the pants, lol. Just mentioning as they were very visible on the black pair of pants I got. Over all, I'm recommending these knit pants. They are of a nice quality knit material and well made. Only caution I will say is study the size chart and hopefully the sizes will work better for the next person!

I haven’t washed them yet, but I don’t plan to dry them in the dryer to prevent pealing and shrinking.

These sweats are super comfy. They're thick and warm and so soft. For fit, they do run bigger. I'm 5'9, 170lbs, size 10/12 or large, but I ordered an extra large for a roomy fit. They fit bigger than I expected, I would've had plenty of extra room in my normal size. I'm really happy about the length. I'm definitely ordering more but I will stick with my regular size next time.

These tartan plaid pants are really cute! The perfect pant for Christmas celebrations. The red color is vibrant, and the pattern is really beautiful. The big bow that ties in the front adds festive style! I found them to be plenty long enough for my long legs (I normally wear 32 inch inseam jeans). They did run a touch snug though in the waist, so if you are between sizes in that area you may want to size up. There was a lot of extra room in the hip area though. I like the cut with the gathered waistline and loose, wide leg. Very on trend currently. The fabric was different than I expected. It is heavier and a bit more stiff than other dress pants in my closet. It feels like a quality fabric that should last. I do wish that there were pockets. For that missing element, I took off one star. All told, I am quite pleased with these fun red plaid pants. Looking forward to wearing them at the family holiday celebration!

These those black high-waisted wide leg pants are stylish and comfortable. I'm 5'2" and it's usually tought to find pants that don't need hemming, but pants fit me well. They look great with sneakers or flats, but look too short with heels. The waist is great, sitting just right with its stretchy back, zipper, and clasp closure. I just wish they had added a second clasp or a button for that extra secure feel. The fabric is smooth with just the perfect thickness. Not too thin, not too heavy. These pants are really versatile, sliding from a casual sneaker look to something more classy with flats and a belt. I can glam them up with some fancy accessories, and they elevate the look of the pants.

These three colors coordinate and accessorize any outfit. Not too thick, not too thin. I am a 27 waist and bought the smallest size. I do feel like they could offer an even smaller size because I am on hole 5 out of 7…with a looser fit.

These Tronjori Womens High Waisted Pull on Baggy Fleece Sweatpants Fall Winter Athletic Jogger sweats are "mom jeans" 80's style fit in the waist for sure! I'm 5'4" and 160 lbs. They're too big for me but that's not a negative. I'd rather have too big than tight and uncomfortable and comfy these ARE. * To start with the beige color is beautiful. It's a soft, creamy looking, light beige. * The outter fabric is very soft. Inner fleece is soft and fuzzy. * These are cozy and warm pants. I can feel a definite difference in how warm I feel with them on. * Side pockets....yea! * Wide elastic waist band. Elastic is soft and zero stiffness to it. There's a tie also in the waist band. * Leg bottoms are elasticized also. * Good stretch in the fabric overall. * Runs big. But I'm a bit petite though I don't generally wear petite sizes. These sweats fit me a bit too large but they fit overall. No saggy bottom. Even though I need to pull them up high on my waist I have no complaint because that's an extra warmth layer on my low back and sides. I generally need a size short in jeans so too much length isn't a shocker to me. Definitely recommend.

These were essentially what I was looking for, a lightweight, comfy, denim pull on but not quite a home run. FABRIC and STRETCH The fabric is NOT stretchy, only the waistband has stretch. Of course there will be color variation, but the pics show a more weathered, distressed look than the mine. SIZING and FIT: I tried both XL and 2X and there's not a whole lot of difference between the two as far as I can tell, but there's more room in the hip and thigh in the 2X. The fit isn't super flattering, especially from the back, but that could be because I have a relatively big, round, bum so it isn't as gathered back there as it is in the model pics. I think I'd probably need a 3X (which they don't have) to get that cute extra baggy look. OVERALL: For reference, I usually wear about a size 16 in pants. I'm plus sized (50-44-48) with a large bust and bum but no hips. I carry most of my weight in my belly. So while these will fit a plus sized body, they fit more like a regular relaxed jean than a baggy/slouchy jean. If I keep them, I will probably go with the smaller size (XL) because they're slightly more flattering as a relaxed jean, but if I could, I'd prefer to size up to get the slouchy, oversized look like the model.

These wide leg pants are very comfortable, with an elastic waist and tie to keep them from being too loose. I am 5'8", so you can see the length in the photo. I have worn them a couple times and they are fairly wrinkle resistant. These are as comfy as sweatpants, but a lot better looking!

These wide leg yoga pants are incredibly comfortable with nice stretchy material and a good fit. I love the fit especially for yoga as I find they have a nice, loose, wide leg style yet are still fitted in the right areas, and I love that they move with my body when I am doing different poses. The addition of pockets is a nice touch, even though I might not put anything too bulky in them since they are form-fitting to the body, but they are nice and deep and still great for slipping your hands into. I ordered my usual size Medium, and they fit great. For reference, I'm 5'6", 145 lbs, with a 28" waist and 38" hips. The only small issue I noticed is that panty lines can be visible when wearing these pants, so you might want to opt for seamless underwear depending on how they fit you. Overall, these have become my go-to lounge and yoga pants. They're so easy to slip on and off, and they look flattering while still being incredibly comfortable.

These wide leg, high waisted jeans are very comfortable. They fit me well, except because of my shortness (5' 4") they are not really cropped on me. More like flood pants, but I am okay with that. I do not have to worry about the bottoms getting wet or my lower legs getting too cold, lol. They have three buttons that are quite stiff to unbutton when you get them but are fine after the first time. The zipper works well. There are four functional pockets, two in front and two in back. The pockets are a little smallish, but would hold a tissue or car keys. As you can see in one of my pictures, if you are apple shaped like I am, the white of the inside of the pocket (on the front) will show, despite the fit being not too tight. Not a problem for me as I most always like to wear shirts / blouses that are long enough to cover at least most of my bottom. Not sure how the pocket issue could have been prevented in the designing of them, but there probably is a way. These jeans seem to be mostly well made. The only thing I noticed really was that the buttons are sort of the cheap type that wiggle and rattle. Not sure what the durability would be of those. Aside from that, I can recommend these jeans and I am happy with them. The reason I only gave four stars was for the buttons and the white of the pocket showing. If anything comes up about those buttons on mine, I will update my review.

These wide-leg high-waisted pants are a fun addition to my wardrobe. They can be dressed up or down, and they're both stylish and comfortable. I love the khaki color for a moody, neutral look—perfectly paired with black shoes, a black top, and a black belt. The fabric is thick but lightweight, feeling high-quality without being heavy. I can wear them with heels or flats, and I like that they touch the ground when I wear flats.

These women’s wide leg capri pants were delivered swiftly in simple packaging. They have been made of a good quality cotton blend material with no loose threads, neat stitching and hemmed beautifully. The material feels heavier than expected and is not at all see through in the denim blue color I ordered. Using the size chart provided, I ordered a size medium and they fit true to size. I’m usually a small-med, 5’6 130lbs for reference. The elastic waist is very stretchy and forgiving, thus allowing you to size up or down depending how you prefer your pants to fit. They sit right above my feet, hitting my ankles so too short for winter and boots but will be nice in warmer weather. If you’re petite they will probably fit like regular length pants. They have pockets! Not big ones but pockets nonetheless! The color is more true in the first and last photo. I’m happy with these pants and look forward to wearing them when it gets warmer. I highly recommend this seller and these pants. I will probably order more pairs in the other colors available.

These worked perfectly for my "hipster photographer" character for a murder mystery dinner. They fit so well, I have been wearing them all the time! They are a smidge long for me, but I love them! I'm 5'3 and 130lbs for reference.

After reading reviews from people who were my height or less, I thought I would be able to wear these with flats to do school pickups or run quick errands. The pants were so long! Even with three inch heels, my pants caught on my feet. I do have small size 5 feet so the pant legs totally cover my foot. Since the inseam measurements in reviews and answers are all over, I think they must not be consistent. On the pair I received, the inseam was 32” and overall length was 43.5” which is just a tad longer than the description. My recommended size was a large but based on reviews, I ordered a medium and they still felt large. I’m undecided if I want to try the small, I doubt they would fit into my 42” hips comfortably. 🤣

On the pair I received, I noticed at least 2 holes (1 large, 1 small) in the back, on the stretchy part near the hip & above where it meets the jeans. I was desperate for pants though so I am planning on repairing them myself with a needle/thread. If the rips were in the front, I might be less lazy about returning them. This 2 piece tracksuit is decent for the price. It runs very true to size - I ordered XL: I'm 5'10" and around 150lbs. It's actually a little bigger than I prefer: but I'd rather order a size up than have it be too small. The fabric has a lot of stretch to it and can accommodate varying bust/hip sizes. It does has some flaws though, which may be a deal breaker for some people. The sleeves are too short - and the pants are a little too long + slightly baggy around the ankles. Also, the collar circumference of the top is way too big around my neck: even when it's fully zipped. To camouflage this, I plan on wearing it with the "lapels" turned down. The fabric is also a little bit scratchy feeling and not very soft. The white zippers are pure snow white color, while the white stripes of the fabric are an off-white color. You can tell if you really look in person but it's barely noticeable. Overall, this isn't too bad for the value if you can overlook some potential flaws. I give this 3 out of 5 stars

This are actually sis jeans! I was worried they would be that cheap thin material you often see with stretch jeans but these have a nice thickness! The pockets are amazingly deep. FYI, they look tiny out the package but have a lot of stretch so don't let the put of package look scare you!

This AUROLRAN belt feels top notch - reminds me of a Gucci. It came with a nice pull string pouch to store it in, love those for keeping my belts looking nice. This belt is absolutely stunning in person. It almost feels like cheating the system to get it for as inexpensive as it is. The belt is made out of a silver glitter faux leather that is thick and durable and the glitter does not flake off. Each of the rhinestones is riveted into the pleather and is super secure, they aren't going to be falling off. It has heavy duty hardware encrusted with rhinestones, the belt is just heavy weighted and feels super expensive. The belt runs true to size, I have a 38 in waist and ordered the L that fits 39-44in and have plenty of room to adjust if I wear low rise pants or otherwise. I've got the silver belt that has the iridescent rhinestones through the middle, I love the little pop of rainbow that they give. Although the belt says it's western style I actually find that it works well with many styles of clothing and think that this belt is an absolutely beautiful accent to any outfit to make it super fancy.

Just order your normal size for the best fit. See my pictures for details.

This brand is one of my favorites. Mainly because the belly band is very thin and you can’t see a line from it through your shirt. Brands like Isabel Maternity have a thicker belly band that you can notice through a regular t shirt. I’m 5’4, 148 lbs and 6 months pregnant. I ordered the medium and they fit me great. Just had to cuff the bottom of them.

This brand is the best Ive found on Amazon for trousers! These fit perfectly and are so comfortable. The fabric on these is thinner which makes them perfect for warmer weather, however I will be wearing this winter for work. The waist band has elastic in the back which makes these very forgiving. Wrinkles come out easily and for the price these an excellent value. For reference I amn5'5, 120lbs and im in a Small. Will be getting in more colors!

This Capri Legging with back Pockets is freakin comfortable around my waistband and stylish. Stretchy comfy. I ordered in every colors. True to size as well. Length is perfect to my ankle. I’m a medium size. (115 lbs 4.11” height) this is my go to pants going forward. I love love this pants. I’m getting rid of all my regular jeans.

This color is gorgeous and the pants are amazing!! So soft and comfortable. I really loved this pants!! They’re fresh for this summer. My weight is 180lb and I bought size Large and it fixed perfectly!

This dark port color is a lot more versatile than you might think. I love this for a neutral alternative to black, brown or grey. It adds a pop of color without competing with the rest of your outfit. The design is a straightforward classic with a plain finish to the good quality leather. It's relatively sturdy but pliable and softens with wear. I anticipate it will last a good long while. I like the bonded finish on the edges too. the squarish buckle is like a tarnished brass for a lived in look. The tail end is squared with subtly rounded corners. This covers up the embossed Timberland logo when wearing. The medium size I ordered fits me well. I have a 31" waist and 41" hips and I can wear this on the second hole with midrise jeans, giving the belt a measurement of 34". There are five holes in this belt at one inch intervals measuring a span of 31" to 35" from tang to hole. The width is neither wide, nor skinny — 7/8" or 22mm, very workable and will fit through most belt carriers. I love it. Excellent quality with great workmanship. I wear this often!

This denim shirt from luvamia is the type of wardrobe basic that you will reach for again and again. Layer it under a vest, wear it solo, layer it on top of a tank or tshirt, wear it open like a jacket, you'll never run out of options. This top is lightweight, yet sturdy 100% cotton. I picked this up for my daughter, she is 5'4" and 108lbs. She is wearing the size small in the helium blue. Made in China, this denim top appears to be well made. All button, seams and hems are nicely sewn and have held up well to repeated washings. We machine washed in cold water and line dried. This dress did not disappoint. I was not sure what to expect but it really is good quality and fits me perfect. For reference purposes, I am 5’1”, 123 lbs. and purchased a small. I definitely would purchase another one in a different color.

This is a fun Valentino knock off, that gives just the right vibes without being over the top. I think that it’s easily paired dressed up or casual… Depending on your preference, or for both. The size is perfect and for reference I am 5‘6“ 135 LBS with a 29 inch high waist and 36 inch low waist.

This is a good find stretchy comfy. I love them so much I have it in black also. I am 5”3…145 they fit perfect in a size 6. I love how comfortable they are fitted and received many compliments good material quality.

This is a good quality multipack of belts. The material is soft and flexible, and the belts are thin enough to fit any pair of bottoms while not being too thin. I'm about 100lbs, so belts are often too long for me or don't have enough holes to fit my waist, but these belts are great! They are sized accurately and fit great! I love that the set comes with 3 neutral colors to coordinate with any outfit. My only concerns are whether the material will remain supple later or if they will dry out, crack, or rip. Time can only tell, but they are a great set for the price.

This is a great fit with lots of stretch. I’m 5’4 and about 190 lbs. curvy around the mid section and wider hips. These are very comfortable. I am short and they fall just at my shoes, so if you’re taller, you may want to rethink these. I love these so much. Maybe my new favorite jeans!

This is a great pair of statement pants at a great price! I immediately wore them (straight from the package without ironing) to church and received MULTIPLE compliments on them. They are fun to wear, feel nice and airy, and I found them remarkable easy to style. (I still need to iron them, which will only improve the look) SIZING: I followed the sizing chart (and you should too!). I'm an 8/10 US size (5' 5" and 150 lbs) and the chart indicated I should order a Large, so I did. I often order mediums, but the large fits perfectly.

This is a great pair of winter pants. I own several fleece-lined pants but this has to be the best pants of all. It is light yet warm, & high stretch material that moves with you. Most fleece-lined pants are warm but are so stiff that you feel like you can't move at all, but this stretches so well! I am 5'2" 120 lbs and got a small. It is a bit long but everything else fits well. The shipping was long tho. Took about a month but it was worth it!

This is a great relaxed “boyfriend” style overall. For all the reviews saying it’s saggy in the crotch or makes your butt look bad, I’m sorry, but that’s just the nature of overalls... especially a looser fit. And especially for those of us who grew up in the late 80s early 90s who are conditioned to think tight pants are the only pants worth wearing in public. I’m generally between a small and medium in both pants and tops. 5’6” with long legs but a short torso. I weigh 145, but am an athletic build so built about the way someone who weighs 130-135 who doesn’t lift heavy weights. I ordered a medium. The best thing you can do before returning these is take some selfies standing how you normally would for a picture and send to some of your GIRL friends. We’re usually our own worse critics, and if you’re not used to overalls or this particular fit, a second opinion helps. Don’t ask a man, they’d be happiest to see you with no pants ever. Anything that leaves your shape to the imagination to any degree annoys them 😂 They are soft and comfortable, a thinner stretchy denim. The light color is great for summer. I only gave 4 stars because out of the wash, I don’t like the way the top seam of the chest pocket sort of puckers and folds over. Easily fixable by wetting it down and ironing it(I use my straightener 😂), but annoying. Regardless, I will be buying these in the distressed style as well.

This is a nice shirt. Got it for a holiday party. I'm 6ft tall and it covered my bottom so I could pair it with leggings. Already washed and dried it and still looked good. Someone complimented me on it and I legit said "Thanks! It has pockets!"

This is a review of KUNMI Women’s wide leg pants. For reference, I ordered a size small. I am 5’3” and weigh 110-115 pounds. These pants are a perfect fit - I don’t even have to hem them! I ordered them in dark brown. The fabric is light and moves well. There are four small pleats in the front, which I like because it makes the waist fit without having the hip and thigh area look like it’s pulling and too tight. The legs are wide but not too much to be trendy. The back is elastic which makes them really comfortable. There are belt loops, but because I of the tailoring, I won’t need to rely on a belt to keep the waist in place. These pants are a great price for a classy, tailored look at work!

This is a small (5'3" 116lb) its big everywhere. I would say this is a good small . It could have been labeled wrong. (((( the leg seam is not right, the knee hole is on the side of my knee the picture doesn't show it as bad as when you walk ))))) very disappointed.

This is a stylish belt that is very well made. The buckle is secure and the material feels lovely. The loop itself makes this an item that is easy to dress up with empire waist dresses and outfits. I love this belt with the exception of the sizing being a little off. I ordered this in a large based on the provided size chart of my waist measuring at 33”. The belt buckles on the first hole provided but I could go in another notch if it was available to me. This leaves almost 10” of extra belt hanging at the end with no additional belt loop to keep it from sagging. The large belt measures 44” overall from buckle to end of belt tail. I am 5’2”, 140lbs with a 33” waist and size 8 pants, size small dresses. I could have easily done the medium and maybe even the small given the extra 10” of belt left. Overall. It is an absolutely lovely belt, high quality, comfortable and very stylish but if you are on the fence about sizing, size down.

This is a tiny little belt. It’s real leather with a brass colored metal buckle. I didn’t particularly care for it myself. It’s too narrow for my taste and too thick. This is a medium and measured from the base of the buckle prong at the leather to the middle hole would fit a 32.75” waist. Seems small for a medium to me, so check your belts that fit and compare to my photo before ordering. I prefer a wider softer leather belt. This one is tiny and stiff with a nubuck finish. Not for me.

This is a well made pair of dress pants that has a stretchy elastic back, and button front high waisted front. The fabric feels smooth and silky. Great paired with heels for a nice dinner out in warm or cooler weather.

This is an affordable pair of slacks from Amazon, you can’t expect the quality to be like Banana Republic or anything. The color is great. This is listed as 80% linen, 20% cotton, but the pants that I received were 40% linen, 60% cotton (assuming by "lines" they meant linen). The only reason I bought these pants was because of the high linen content. This explains why some reviewers think they feel more like cotton pants - because they are 60% cotton! They are also very small. Short and much tighter than shown in the photo. I am 5'7" with 41" hips - I ordered the size M, as per their size chart, a M fits up to 42.91" hips. They are very snug around the hips - if I was any bigger, I would be afraid to sit down for fear that they would tear. They are snug enough that the waitband pulls down in the back, and the pockets don't lay completely flat, because the fabric is pulling across my butt. The length reaches to about 1" above my ankle bone if I wear these at my natural waist. I'm afraid to wash them, because if they shrink, I won't be able to wear them. Probably will be returned, even though I like the color, and they seem to be made well.

This is my 3rd pair of Democracy Ab Solution Jeans. The other two were full length size in 4P. The length was perfect for flats, heels or boots. I wanted a pair of crop jeans for spring and summer. I’m tired of finding crop pants in regular length that I would have to shorten them. These were 6P and the length is perfect, about 4” above my ankles and just below the wide part of my calf. Mid calf is not flattering on my since mine are muscular not slender. The fabric has some stretch as well as the waistband. They are comfortable and flattering. I first got them inn 4P but they were a little snug so I exchanged them for the 6P. My others in 4P were fine size wise. I’m 5’3” and 125 lbs. the smaller size would have stretched out eventually, but I wanted them right away. Note: the fabric has some slight imperfections placed purposefully near top front of thighs for the distressed look.
This is my favorite dress I have ordered from Amazon! It’s so beautiful and comfy. The quality is so nice. I am 5’3 and 120 pounds and an XS fits perfectly.

This is my favorite style of rayon pants: elasticated one-size-fits-most waist, and wide in the legs. When I first opened the package my initial thought was: the threads are too coarse and the weave is too wide. However, after washing them and running them through the dryer on a low heat they became the more familiar soft, flowing rayon that I'm more familiar with. The fit works well for me. I have a 35" waist and 46" hips. They are wide in the legs, which I love. These are a great length for me; I like pants grazing above the ankle. They have pockets - handy. About the quality: I would say it's just okay. As you can see in the photos, the ends of the drawstring are unfinished and ragged. Also, there is an obvious gap where the white elastic shows through the opening in the waistband. I've already removed the drawstring and whip stitched the opening closed so no white is seen. [I don't see the reason to have a drawstring unless you have an 18" waist and you have to tighten the pants up to stop them from falling off your body]. There are loose threads here and there, and the workmanship is just average. Bottom line: would I buy them again? Possibly. I'm not sure these pants are a good value, however, based on the quality. I don't imagine they are going to last for more than a season. Knowing that, and not having high expectations, but considering they are a style and fabric that works for me during hot weather, and they are conveniently available on Amazon, I'm giving them 4 *.

This is my first jean jacket. Everytime i usually would try one on the arms would be tight and it would be stiff. This one is really nice, soft, and stretchy. I got a size large just to be safe. I am 65 in, 153 lbs. Broaded shoulded. Would 100% recommend this.

This is my first pair of Levi’s and I am very happy with what I’ve gotten for the price. The sizing is very accurate. I’m 5’4” and 101lbs and I got size 25 regular. I usually like my pants with a little extra at the ankle but they come right below my ankle and fit nice. I was afraid because they were super skinny but they aren’t constricting at all and are very flexible. My only real complaint with them is those dang pockets! I was hoping that they’d have pockets that I can fit at least my phone in but alas not. I posted one pic with my hand in the pocket and it reaches the end.

This is my first shot at trying the yoga pant style work slacks and OH MY STARS THESE ARE INCREDIBLE. I am 5'8, 160 lbs and typically wear size 10 American eagle jeans. The sizing chart dictated to order a size 12. I ordered four different pair of slacks from Rekucci. Amazon accidentally sent one pair in size 8 instead of 12 but I tried them on anyways. Even they fit, but were just a smidge too snug to be professional. These pants go on so easy. They move with you. They don't fall off. They just fit really well. I was afraid of what the material would be but, again, I'm impressed. They look just like a pair of dress slacks, not like a pair of yoga pants or pajamas. Rekucci comfort fit pants will definitely be my new go to for dress slacks. You just can't beat this kind of quality, especially for, what, $33?

It's pretty good, except I had to fold in the hem (so I will be fixing that myself, yup! even in petite size), but that is a minor thing) the rest of the fit is good. They are comfortable. This is my second pair of these trousers. Both in the thick fabric. This green pair I ordered a size L, the other pair I ordered in an XL. I’m around 180 pounds, 5’1. I have a very high waist and short torso and long legs for my height (note: my legs are still short AF, but since my torso is so short and my waist so high my legs at least look longer than my 5’1 height would make you think). The XL fit nice and were comfy and flowy, but they sat lower than my natural waist which annoyed me. The L fits exactly at my waist. They are a touch snug though, not uncomfortably so, but if there was a size inbetween the L and XL they would be perfect. I got the regular length in both sizes. The length in the L is perfect, they are a touch long on the XL since they sit below my natural waist but both work well with boots/heels. The XL works with flats/loafers if they have a platform sole. The only negative is that they don’t flatter my big bubble butt the way I’m used to with different style pants but the booty doesn’t ALWAYS have to be pippin’ I suppose. Regardless, love these pants. I haven’t tried the thin fabric style yet.
