UPDATED: I added pictures I purchased the V3/ (high waisted with the 3 buttons) size 9/ in Dark Wash thinking they might end up being a little too small, but they’re actually a little loose (and very stretchy). So maybe the manufacturer updated sizing to be more true to size? (I see in the comments that a lot of people have had to size up one or two sizes.) Summary: Sizing? True to size for me. I’m 5’7” around 140lbs waist 29” hips 39-1/2” inseem about 32” and this size 9 will work even though it is a little loose fitting. High-Waisted? Yes. The pants sit above my belly button Butt-Lifting? Yes and no... They’re not fitted enough for me to notice any actual structural butt lifting, but I do believe the cut/ style around the butt is flattering (Sorry the picture isn’t better. Difficult to take a pic of your own butt!)

Use the size chart included with the photos of the coat. I'm 5'3" 124 lbs. Size chart said 44 inch chest for the small and that is correct. It is roomy enough for a bulky sweater underneath. Material isn't stiff. Tag has 88% cotton, 12% polyester. Sleeves are a bit too long, so I rolled the cuff up. I think it looks good and will work well.

Use to love these jeans. I ordered the blue jeans in April 2024. Just ordered these last week. I also ordered a blue pair. As you can see, the ones ordered in April fit great lengthwise. Both pairs I ordered last week are at least five inches longer! I’m 5’3 and never had this problem. The zipper also seems cheap. I will be returning both pair. Get your act together on sizing.
Used pants as part of my scarecrow costume. I absolutely Love these pant and got a lot of compliments. I'm 5'4" 162lbs and the med fit perfectly

Used to own the old pair of these in 28 and read reviews to size up so I sized up to a 29 (my waist is 27.5”-28”). The 29 is slightly too big on the waist but a size smaller would have been so tight around the hips and legs. I doubt I would have been able to sit down. If you owned these jeans in the past do not expect the same pair because the fit in the hips and legs is tighter as I mentioned. These jeans have zero stretch but I knew that coming into this. Overall I love these because they are a true high rise unlike other brands’ claims of “high rise” so I will keep them. Don’t worry about the weird “V” shape in my pictures. This happens with all of my jeans because I have very high set hips and I doubt you will have this problem! I am 5’7” and 128lbs with a short torso.

Used to own the old pair of these in 28 and read reviews to size up so I sized up to a 29 (my waist is 27.5”-28”). The 29 is slightly too big on the waist but a size smaller would have been so tight around the hips and legs. I doubt I would have been able to sit down. If you owned these jeans in the past do not expect the same pair because the fit in the hips and legs is tighter as I mentioned. These jeans have zero stretch but I knew that coming into this. Overall I love these because they are a true high rise unlike other brands’ claims of “high rise” so I will keep them. Don’t worry about the weird “V” shape in my pictures. This happens with all of my jeans because I have very high set hips and I doubt you will have this problem! I am 5’7” and 128lbs with a short torso.

Usually I don't go for high wasted pants; these definitely have some mom-jeans energy, but that's more of a style preference thing. They do fit fine, and button over my belly button. I'm 5'7", 135 lbs, and wear size sm/size 4. They are comfortable and don't pinch anywhere. They're a bit stinky. I washed them with like-colors, and they definitely lost some of their color, and still carry their manufacturing odor. It's no worse than the smell of new Levi's, and I'm hoping it'll be gone after a few more washes. I'm a bit sensitive to that kind of thing. The fabric is comfy. It feels like real jeans, but has a lot of elasticity which makes movement really easy. They're a bit plain for my usual style, but aside from the odor, they seem to be well-made, and a reasonable style. If you love the high-waisted look, I think you'll be pleased with these. They're a reasonable value, and very comfortable.

Usually I’ll buy some fashion nova jeans in a 15 for $30 and they’ll show up a little tight but stretch out in a few hours. Few months in they’ll tear at the thigh anti-gap lol. A coworker convinced me to get jeans at Target in July. Got 3 pairs of “Levi’s” in a 14 (because they’re stretchy) for like $40/ea. Literally wearing these things to work every day because that’s the only thing I can do through this apocalypse. Some how a pair of these garbage pants ripped in a month. A MONTH. So. I’m on amazon and I see these here bad boys on sale for $9 and I figure I should honestly just buy six pairs and call it a night. Just in case though I upped it to a size 16. If they run small, they’ll fit. If they run regular, I’ll wear a belt. Well guess what. They run regular. The delivery lady Just dropped them off and I pulled one on and these bad boys are so comfortable, but I ordered them big lol. Anyway, I’ll wear a belt to work. I got two pairs but I came back to buy two more, but the sale is over, sad day, but not that sad. They seem way sturdier than the ones on fashion nova AND these pants not only have 4 1/2 Real Pockets but I can also fit my entire hand in the front ones. Heck, I can fit a couple TV remotes in the front pockets. I’m definitely coming back, and even though the $9 sale is over, full price is still a steal compared to Target’s “Levi’s” For reference I’m about 5’5 and 197lbs this week but I’m kindof dense in the bones. A lot of my weight is butt, a lot of it is thighs...these jeans don’t quite do the butt justice but that’s definitely on me because I purposely ordered them too big haha if I figure out how to update this review, I’ll edit to add pictures when I buy the right size

Usually, I wouldn't say I like wearing jeans because I find them uncomfortable after a while. But KHAKI & BLUE Cali1850 Women's The Everyday Skinny Jeans are super comfortable and soft. I usually wear a size 4, but based on the sizing guide, I needed a 6. I'm 5'7 and weigh 120 lbs, but my hip width fits the size 6. The jeans are bigger than I'd like, looking a bit baggy when they should be a slim fit. Overall, they are a great causal jeans.
Very classy, soft, beautiful color. I’m 5’4” and 100lbs, size S is slightly loose but a very comfy fit! I ordered more colors. They look even better with heels on.

Very comfortable and a cute fit. I’m always worried about buying pants like this as sometimes there a bit tonight on the thigh's, these are not! They fit perfect in the thighs and buttocks area. However, I do have a small waste, and they left a bit of an indent in the skin. I’m 5”8 130 lbs. I ordered a small and they are very comfortable I bought this with The Drop razor back rib shirt that was on sale. Total cost less than 50$!
Very comfortable and fits as expected. I’m 5’4”, 120lbs. Beautiful, bright color as well.

Very comfortable and great quality. Thick enough for cooler weather. Not see through at all. Runs true to size. Very stretchy. Pants are short girl approved. I’m 5’3 and usually get a 30 inch inseam. 10/10 recommend!

Very comfortable and looks flattering on me. I am 5'3" tall and my weight is142 lbs. Size 6 fits me perfectly. Fabric is thin but stretchable. I am giving 4 stars because of the color. I ordered cape town color. Just got it and the color is nothing like online picture. I already have the color I got so undecided what to do.
Very comfortable and stretchy. I am 5'8 and they are a little short hence the 4 stars. Overall love the pants can dress up or down.
Very comfortable and stretchy. Perfect for hiding mommy tummy! I'm 5"4 and about 135lb. A medium seems like it fits just right

Very comfortable and true to size. I am 5’0 236lbs. Worked very well with my shirt that I also ordered from Amazon for an impromptu all white photo shoot. I received many compliments. I am wearing a 1X... if you have thicker thighs and hips i do suggest going up one size! They are kind of thin but if you wear the right undies you will be just fine! I love them
Very comfortable dressy thin not hot a smidgen see through but not unless you STARE really close. I’m 5’5” 145-155 I got medium orange and green.

Very comfortable easy to wear. Pants usually feel too short unless marked “TALLS”, but at 5’8”- I could have easily worn heels. This style is out of my comfort zone- but hey, why the heck not?! I loved them! I bought 2x because things nowadays are cut smaller. A 1x would have been absolutely perfect. True to size and I would buy again!

Very comfortable except for the crotch. I can’t explain what’s going on with it, just that it hangs down more than I’d like. Sleeves are kinda longer than I’d like. I read and reread the reviews because I was torn between a small and medium. Got the medium, but kinda want a small for comparison. I’m 5’4”, about 155 pounds and a 34DD. Definitely not tight up top which is unusual. Like the other reviews say, you can see the pockets which may be an issue with a lighter color. Oh, and the smell. No one mentioned the smell!! Strong chemical smell so if I do keep it, I’ll have to wash it first. (I work with chemicals, so if it’s bothering me, that’s not a positive).

Very comfortable fabric (not thick though so more of an early fall temperature kind of outfit). I’m short at 5’2” but this were super long and needed to wear wedges with. I’ve only worn them once as of now, very cute but potentially not a durable quality.
Very comfortable material. The length and for is perfect for me. I am 5’3 and weigh 138 and bought a size 6.

Very comfortable overalls! I am 5'0" and 125lbs and the small fits pretty well. The straps and pant legs are a little long but I expected that. I was worried it would be tight in the thighs/butt area but they're very roomy and comfortable. In the second photo I pulled them all the way up and rolled the hem. I'll probably cut and re-sew the straps to be a little shorter, but if you don't sew these are still absolutely wearable at 5'0.

Very comfortable pair of jeggings. The legs are snug enough that I will be able to wear with boots in the winter Love them and recommend them!

Very comfortable pants, elastic waist band with pull tie. Although the pants are wrinkled, as they just came out of the plastic bag, they seem like they will iron easily. Nice wide leg. Size is good. I typically wear size 16-18, XL and purchased XL. They fit as expected. Length is good (I’m 5’5”) and they drape to the floor. They will be good length when I wear shoes with a little heel.

Very comfortable pants, I already want to order a second pair. Very comfortable pants. They stretch and the material is not rough. For reference I am145lbs, 28 waist ,5’4, and I got a small.

Very comfortable slacks. I’m 5’3, 140 & medium fit well. Love the wide legs and versatility of these slacks that allow them to be dressed up or down. I bought a gold chain belt & wore them with a nice blouse for a very special annual event. So many compliments. Pockets are the perfect size (able to hold my iPhone 12 Pro Max). I bought black slacks but may be looking to get other colors in the future.

Very comfortable with a decent amount of stretch to them. I wear these high waisted leggings whenever I travel as I find them to be more comfortable than jeans. I bought the one size, and for reference, I weigh 121 lbs and have a 25” waist with a 41” hip and had ample room.

VERY comfortable, but too baggy. Even the smallest size (XS) is loose and bunches up weirdly. I would recommend these yoga pants to curvier ladies, since they are really comfy and the fabric feels like good quality (especially for the price). Personal Measurements: 5’5” 105 lbs 26” waist 34” hips

Very comfortable, can be dressed up or down. For reference 5‘6”; 110pounds ordered size 25 fits great with some room. Normally between 24/25 in straight jeans. As comparison Everlane jeans size 24 as well as Ella moss jeans.
Very comfortable, easy to dress up or down. I'm a chubby 5'2" and bought the size 12.
Very comfortable, stretchy and breathable high waisted jeans. 5'7 175lbs wear a size 11 in jeans but ordered a Large.
Very comfortable! Great fit! I’m 5’4” 195-200 lbs and the XL fit perfect. Going to buy another one. Gave it a 4 star because the pattern picture was not what I received but still looks great!

Very comfortable. The stretch is nice. Haven’t seen how they do after washing and drying. Overall I’m verry happy. Be aware these are pretty long. I’m 5”8 and they cover my feet. I got the size 18 and they seem to be true to size.

Very comfy and nice pants the only thing is the black ones are a little smaller order one size up. And the white ones a little see-through but other than that all of the other colors will be ok. Very comfy and perfect dark jean color. Loving these jeggings!! I’m 5’2” 140 lbs and they come up just below my calves.
Very comfy and perfect dark jean color. Loving these jeggings!! I’m 5’2” 140 lbs and they come up just below my calves.
Very comfy and stretchy. I'm 5'6" and 150lb and I've ordered medium. It fits perfectly, exactly as I wanted.

Very comfy and worth the price just for the comfort alone. I’ve had multiple abdominal surgeries and it’s not easy to find pants that don’t torture my mid section. I was skeptical of pull on pants but they don’t look “old lady” like I imagined pull on pants would look. Length is right on at ankle and I got a 4 regular. I’m 5’3” and short length is too short. Another review had stated all four pockets were functional so I wanted to point that out. These are a much better looking alternative to sweatpants which is what I usually wear around the house. I might just get another pair. Hope this review is .

Very cute and comfortable on, plenty of space but not too loose or baggy. Very cute and comfortable shorts, the color was lighter than expected. I’m 5’3, weighing 123 and got the small, they fit great. Really like the length and that they are high wasted.

Very cute and comfortable skort. Love that its shorts but looks of a skirt. Has quite a bit a stretch to it. I could have easily wore a small but with a more fitted fit. My friend bought the black one and also was very cute.

Very cute and comfy. A little bigger than I expected. I ordered a medium. I’m 5,6” 159lbs. They’re stretchy but still denim material. I love them. I ordered both the light and dark pair and the sizing is consistent with both.

Very cute and comfy. A little bigger than I expected. I ordered a medium. I’m 5,6” 159lbs. They’re stretchy but still denim material. I love them. I ordered both the light and dark pair and the sizing is consistent with both.
Very cute and got lots of compliments! Material is thin but expected for the price. Ordered a size small (5ft 5in and 130lbs for reference) and they were a bit large in the waist.
Very cute and hugs the right curves, I an 5’6 and they are a tad short.
Very cute and stretchy pants. Wish they were slightly longer to give that flare look, I’m 5’8 and they were a standard length.

Very cute romper. Fits slightly loose, I should have sized down. I bought a medium based on size chart and other comments. A quick hot wash and hot dyer made it fit perfectly. I’m 5’3, 170lbs, 38C bra size. I usually wear a med or size 8. Romper has great stretch. Had a smell to to upon arrival, washed it and it was fine.
Very cute shorts. Husband loves them. I’m 5’5 154 pounds. Athletic build. I ordered a x large. Good quality shorts.

Very cute, comfortable fabric. It's better than I had anticipated. I purchased the medium, I'm 5'2 120 lbs. The fabric has some spandex in it to give a bit of stretch and adds to the comfortable but fitted fit. Color is great. I purchased some solid colored tank tops from Amazon to wear with it, it's going to look great. Love this purchase, finding overalls of this type has not been easy. In my search, others have been either too long, too baggy, and too heavy/stiff. 😁
Very cute! They are flattering and have a nice stretch to them. Love the button fly. I went down a size from my usual, and they are perfect. (5'5" 135lbs. Usually wear an 8, but bought the 4/6)

Very cute! Fit is slightly oversized & the material is stretchy. Love the dusty orange/red color! Ordered size small I’m 5’4” 118lbs (26” waist) Gave 4 stars b/c the material - while very cute - is not the highest quality. So in my opinion the price is a little high, but I love ‘em!

Very cute! Fit is slightly oversized & the material is stretchy. Love the dusty orange/red color! Ordered size small I’m 5’4” 118lbs (26” waist) Gave 4 stars b/c the material - while very cute - is not the highest quality. So in my opinion the price is a little high, but I love ‘em!
Very cute.. xl. 266 5'9

Very disappointed… These are not low rise, they smell like an old musty basement, the smell will not come out of the fabric. They are true to size. However, the pockets are HUGE and give a total mom ars! Looks horrible. I wear a size 4 and I’m 142 pounds. These pants make my booty look like a team of work horses going down the road. Only the horses smell better than the capri/pants… Not cute! Smells horrible. It’s a zero stars and a don’t buy!

Very fast shipping. After a couple of disappointments in my search for pants that I could wear with anything and that fit me well, this is where I stop. I love how many interesting colors they come in. I've ordered 5 of them! I'm 5'7" 110-112 lbs. These are size small tall. I love the rise and the inseam. I wasn't looking for anything skin tight- the leggings as pants look. But regular trousers were not slim enough. I needed an in-between. This fits that need for me. The material is light and has a "silky" feeling on my skin, especially with shaved legs :) But the'ye not shiny. The smallest hint of a shimmer maybe, but not the way silk or satin shimmers... It's milder than that.
Very flattering and comfortable! I'm 5'2'', 135lb and typically wear size 4/6. I ordered a small. Tons of compliments!

Very flattering and comfortable. The material is soft with a little stretch. Lots of stretch in the waist. I could have sized down to an XL instead of XXL. I’m exchanging for the smaller size and getting a second pair. The length is perfect for my 5’6” height. I’m sure they’ll be my new favorite pants! I highly recommend. I exchanged for the smaller size (brown). I like the fit better.

Very flattering and comfortable. The material is soft with a little stretch. Lots of stretch in the waist. I could have sized down to an XL instead of XXL. I’m exchanging for the smaller size and getting a second pair. The length is perfect for my 5’6” height. I’m sure they’ll be my new favorite pants! I highly recommend. I exchanged for the smaller size (brown). I like the fit better.

Very good quality pants, I love how nice they feel! But i’m five feet tall and 132 pounds with a 31 inch waist and got a large and it still squeezes me. 100% size up but these are great pants otherwise.

Very good quality, feels expensive. Also very comfortable, stretchy Jean material. I'm 5'9 (150lbs) and the Mediums fit my waist well. I typically wear a 6-8 long pant size, my waist is 29". However the Mediums are a little short. They naturally sit higher on the waist, so ill likely end up undoing the hem of the pants for the added length. Actual inseam length (crotch seam to end of pant leg) is 27.5inches. I thought it would be longer. Overalll, They do have the wide leg look I wanted, and they're comfy enough to keep.
Very good quality, great fit true to size . I got an X-small I’m 110 and 5’5 . I did steam them to get all the wrinkles out from shipping. Great staple piece for the holidays.
Very happy with the fit and length. I'm 5'5 135lbs and these fit great. Pairs well with a professional bodysuit or tucked shirt, for work.
Very happy with the fit. I’m 5’6 and 123lbs. Size 2 fits well and the 30” length is perfect, not too short. Would and will buy again.

Very happy with this belt. It reminds me of a Gucci horsebit design, which I like. Received it in perfect condition. Gold is almost like an antique color, which is pretty. I like that it's reversible AND adjustable! I ordered size 38-42" because I ordered a belt in the past that was too small, so I figured it would better to have it be too big than too small. That said, it fits nicely with jeans or dresses, and looks good with both. For reference, I'm 5'6" and 170 lbs.

Very hard for me to find a pair of jeans that fit well, because I'm 5'1" and 138 lbs - they are either way too long (like by a foot+) or so tight I can't bear being in them. These looked funny to me when I opened the package because I had forgotten I had ordered high waist jeans. Been a long time! I love them, they are a perfect fit for me. I like the material because it's soft, not thick and stiff. They are a great length on me, and not skin tight at the bottom. I see other reviews where the buttons fell off, etc. So far my buttons are on just fine. I love the high waist, it prevents love handles and these will look good with just about any top-T-shirt, blouse, turtlenecks, or any kind of shoe or boot. In photos I am wearing low kitten heels with black tights. They arrived nicely packaged and quickly after ordering. Looking forward to loving them a long time.

Very high quality with the kind of dense stretch that provides a great fit without getting too loose or baggy after wearing awhile. Here are the measurements of the size 9 Long: Waist 30” (stretches to about 33”) Hip 37” Rise 9 1/2” Inseam 34”
Very high waisted pants just like I like them. Material is stretchy got a size L and they fit perfect. I’m 5’7 202 pounds. Very curvy

Very impressed with these jeans. I do wish they came in short, but I have them rolled. I also wish they did XXS, I feel they would fit a little more snug with them being stretchy. I'm 5ft 100lbs for reference. I still love the style and feel!

Very light weight and comfy. They looked a bit small out of the bag but they have a lot of stretch. I'm 5'3 and 170lbs, got the 10 to 16 size. I love how they cover my fluffy spots. The best part is they have POCKETS!! And not crappy little ones, I can fit my phone in them. As soon as I put them on I went back and ordered 3 more. I think I'm going to live in these.

Very lightweight and see through when you hold it up to the light. Pockets! Elastic is generously sized. You can safely get your size. You could even size down comfortably. Definitely looks more skirt like than pants like which I was hoping for. I am 5 feet tall and if wear this high (above my belly button) the hem reaches my feet.

Very lightweight and super comfortable. Length is perfect. Fitted at the waist and hips then loose on the thighs and legs. I like the faded wash, distressing and button fly. Might have to order another pair! For reference I am 5'8 and 137 lbs. UPDATE: I ordered a second pair in white after writing this review. They are 2 inches shorter which is a problem for me! I don't have time to return them as I am leaving on vacation. Very disappointed in the quality control! I guess I will let down the hem and leave an unfinished hem which might look OK with these distressed jeans.

Very nice dress pants. Definitely can wear to work or casual. Material is good quality, light and soft to touch. The fit is perfect; I especially like the elastic waist band that adds to the comfort. I wear heels most days so I like the length. The color is a little lighter than pictured but I not by much to be an issue. I’m 5’4 180 lbs and got the large.

Very nice heavy wide leg white pant. I would say they are a little on the extra wide side through the leg and that would be ok. The only problem with these pants is that they run really long. I am 5’7” and without a heal the cover my feet and then some. With a heal they are still long, but definitely do able. I would recommend these pants for someone over 5’8”.

Very nice looking pants, very dressy and professional. I ordered the beige. The word says beige, but the picture looks more like a very light sand, almost white. They are as pictured. I was actually hoping for something a little more beige because I’ve never had much luck with virtually white pants. They all seem to stain so easy. The first time I wear them they come home with an ink spot, coffee stain, or something. These did not! I was very impressed. I wore them to the office on a regular workday. I took the train into the city. Wore the pants all day. When I came home, they looked great. A few wrinkles around the hip flexors, which is normal for an office job. I was eating a breakfast bar at my desk and dropped a few chocolate chips on the pants so I went into the bathroom and just wiped them off with a wet paper towel and the chocolate came right off. It’s great to be able to have such a light colored pair of pants that don’t stain easy. And they’re so easy to care for. They were a little creased out of the package, as you can see by some of the photos. I tried them on right away. I was wearing a black and purple knee brace and I just happened to have on black underwear. Could not see through them at all, which can be a problem with such light colored pants quite often, and they fit perfect. I touched them up with a steam iron and it came out fine. Care instructions. The tag inside the pants list just the care instructions symbols, and I didn’t know what they all meant, but there is a card attached to the pants that translates them. You might want to save the little card, that’s what I did. Care instructions for these pants translate to: Do not bleach, dry clean, Machine wash up to 86°F general cycle. iron up to 230°F tumble dry low. So you can dry clean them and they’re very nice pants. They’re worth it if you want to. But it also says machine wash up to 68°F gentle cycle, tumble dry low, iron up to 230°F. So I threw them in the washer by themselves on delicate, and then threw them in the dryer on low. And I am very impressed. They’re clean and they came out of the dryer virtually wrinkle free. So I’m not gonna bother to test iron them, they don’t need it. Very easy to care for. Sized as stated. I measured myself and bought the one according to the measurement chart, and it fit perfectly. May be too short for average to tall people. The one thing the measurement chart does not say is the inseam. This concerned me because I’m 5’4”” with a 28 inch inseam, and very long waisted. These pants fit me perfectly, I can wear them with flats. They come up to my waist. I measured the extra large inseam is 29 inches so it’s perfect for me. However, as my sister says, for anyone who actually has legs, lol, they may end up, looking like high water pants. But from my short legs, they’re perfect. I’m thrilled with the inseam.

Very nice, well made belt. It came in a nice box, which was great for gifting. It is real leather, and has a cutting device if you need to shorten it. It was packaged very well with all the bells, and whistles of a designer belt. I wasn't sure if my daughter would need the small or medium based on the size guide, so I went with the medium since it did come with the option to shorten if needed, and the medium was the right choice. For reference, my daughter has an athletic build. She is almost 5'4, and 132 lbs. She wears a size 7 in juniors. I hope this gives you a good idea for sizing. It's a very nice black, real leather, belt. It's not too thin, or too wide. I imagine it will fit any belt loop size, but still has a nice wide width. I will post pics of the belt when I get home. I would definitely, reccomend this, and will probably purchase in other colors when available.

After first was there was no bleeding of fabric (I ordered light wash color) and seams did not unravel. Super pleased!

We ordered this faux leather belt from QiqiLuxi and it was priced at $10 at the time. The quality of the fake leather is about average, your basic inexpensive material. The buckle and belt tip where actually heavier duty than I expected and look pretty good. The belt material, 3 stars, the simple inexpensive buckle, 5 stars. The posting itself seems misleading as this is a womens belt, it is much to thin to be considered a mens belt. The size also suggests it is good for up to 38" waists... the limit is closer it 33". The miss has 38" hips and no way this will work low low cut jeans, it was in the furtherst hole with a set of very high waisted jeans (on the miss with a 32" waist). I have 4 stars as the buckle and belt cap are nice for the price, but it could of got 3 stars as the belt itself is cheep material and shorter than expected.

Well... kinda on the fence... I went with the Size: X-Large | Color: Khaki. For reference I'm over 50 years old. Height 5'6", weight 170lbs measurements Bust: 43 Waist: 34 Hips: 43. These pants have a lot of orange/pink to them for being "khaki" depending on the lighting. But we all know khaki is one of those colors we all have different ideas of what it actually is. This fabric is very light weight, flowy, with some small stretch and they kinda look like a linen. They are 100% polyester though. That means they haven't shrunk or anything in the wash and they don't hold the wrinkles nearly as badly as linen does. But that also means they don't breath as well either. On the softness scale of 1-5, 5 being super soft, these fall around a 4. They are so light that they aren't often in contact with your skin unless you're sitting, but the texture has not bothered my sensitive skin at all. The stitching all seems fine, decent construction. The pockets are a nice feature. Maybe it's because of the size, but the front and back are not that different. And on me, it's unfortunate where some of the pleats fall from the elastic waist. It adds to the look of my belly. Not something I need exaggerated. With a shirt over it, it can look a little better but I will probably alter the waist line in time. Overall, they are pretty decent pants that would work in an office or for traveling. With the price being under $20, that bumps these an extra star. I would say they are worth checking out. Peace and comfy pants

What on earth did I receive? I was anxiously awaiting these jeans, which look super cute and comfortable in the product photos. I checked the size chart and ordered a size small. I am 5’5”, 120 lbs & usually wear a 4 or 6. My preferred length is a 30” inseam. According to the size chart, these should have measured between 29-30”. The jeans arrived and I loved the look but realized they seemed short before I even tried them on. They are definitely high-rise and the waist fit me fine, but the length! Oh my goodness, these fit me like capri-length pants. I looked utterly ridiculous. I will never wear these. Unfortunately, the jean material is super thin feeling to boot. They do not feel durable and there were loose threads all over them. Not worth it at all for me. Maybe you’ll have better luck.

What you see is what you get with these. The pleats stay intact with wear, and they are a relaxed straight leg. The material is substantial enough to drape, and not flap in the wind and cling (like other lightweight trousers I've tried). Runs true to size. At 5'1 I can wear these with a platform sneaker or small heel so they'd fit a wide range of standard heights. Best belted since the front button seam is visible.

What's good - • Heavy material gives it a high quality, flowy & elegant feel • Pockets are always great to have • Elastic waistband is comfortable and gives the pants a totally relaxed fit However... • length of S-sized pants still too long on a 5'2" frame (since it's supposed to be ankle length) • the front pleats are unnecessary and create a puffy look • the fitting on the hips is a bit too wide and crotch area is too low - looks unflatteringly baggy

So its right but a very comfortable tight I am 120 lbs and 4' 11" so normally i would go with a small in clothing but knowing these are streatchy and im short i went with an xs and im so happy i did!

When I find a pair of jeans (or pants in general) that fit, they are usually baggy in the tummy area and fit my butt (or vice-versa) and 9 times out of 10 they are way too long so I end up taking them in to be hemmed. I love wide leg pants and usually I guess they aren't the most flattering on shorter legged people - I am - 36-33-42 and 5'4" - and maybe I'm just kidding myself but I think these jeans look pretty good. And even better, they feel GREAT on. They have a perfect stretch. They fit my butt but aren't too tight - I always have trouble there too. I washed them with darks and tumble dried them and they came out great. The unfinished hem still looks good - no extra fraying or anything like that while being laundered. I think they are fabulous jeans.

When I first opened these jeans, the "raw hem" was not super noticeable. After a single wash, the amount of fraying at the hem did not bode well for the longevity of these jeans. I suspect each wash will get a heavier and heavier amount of fraying. If you like a cleaner look, you can trim them up again. I intend to wear them with sandals and the strings tickle my feet, so I will trim them up. They are marketed as cropped jeans, but at 5'3" with short legs, they are really just regular jeans for me. They fit well and are comfortable. The large flat pockets on the back are not the most flattering as they make your bottom look droopy. I sized up from what the listing recommended. I usually wear a 4 or 6, but do not like my jeans tight. I am happy that I did. I have a bit of a gap at the back around the waist, but these fit appropriately through the hips and thighs. Overall, I like the fit, but the quality is questionable.

I washed them two times already on cold and hung them to dry (per instructions) and they still look great. For reference, I am 5’4” and 130lbs and I bought size S. I hope they will last, because God knows I will wear the heck out of them.

When I ordered this skirt I was skeptical about the length as it is shown as a mini on the young model. I am a short 5ft senior and it is a perfect little casual skirt for me. Very comfortable fit being mostly cotton and spandex. Just washed in cold and hung to dry.

When I placed the order, the size 4 long was not available and I just ordered the four regular thinking the length would be long enough on me. I’m 5‘7“ tall they fit great around the waist… I love wide leg jeans, but the length was really short on me. They feel soft and lovely. I am sure some people prefer the look of tight leggings/ jeans, but the flowyness of these has me feeling unbelievably sexy. Tights are more awkward on my slender body. When I put these on I loved them. Super soft, very comfortable. I sized up to an XL even though L was "recommended" because I prefer to look like the jeans are bigger on me, than stuffing into them and being uncomfortable. For reference I'm 5'4" about 175/180lbs, waist 35". XL was perfect. Fits just like my comfy linen pants.

when I received them I put them on immediately and will probably wear them for the rest of the week! I am 5’ 2 and a half, and the small fits perfectly. Notice that they fall below the knee and I could even cuff them. Love the neutral color. They are a real rich tan. So glad I purchased them. They fit better than the ones sold on the shopping networks—-at half the price!

When I saw these jeans they reminded me of a pair I had back in my day as a teen, I am 56 years old and I still love fashion so I had to have this pair. I am so glad I got them...these jeans are true to size and they are well made. I love this darker color (they come in different colors), the pockets are very cool being different of either side, the front and back pockets are nicely sized and the waist is high, very comfortable and I love the flare cut which is perfect for any sandals, boots, heels or booties. I can't rave enough about these jeans. I also know how to sew, I can tell you, the craftsmanship of these jeans are superior. It is reinforced at the double stitching with felt and perfectly sewn. These jeans are my new favorite pair and frankly the best pair of Jeans in my closet at the moment. 10 OUT OF 10!!!

When I say this jacket is gorgeous, it is gorgeous! My expectations weren't that high because I've never really ordered clothing from Amazon and there weren't any photos, but WOW this denim jacket looks expensive. I ordered a large, and it fits like a medium. I am 5'7" and the jacket sits right at my waist, shorter than I would like but it still looks great (I was going for the oversized look). The material is not a super thick denim, but is not thin and cheap either ...it's right in between, which is great for a "chilly" day/night. I would definitely recommend!

When I say you need these, I mean it!!! A great FP look alike. I wasn't sure about the barrel jean trend but these absolutely changed my mind. They're a little long but they look so cute rolled up and with heels. They don't have a lot of stretch but the denim is great quality and fits so nice. Wearing a 6 5'2" 140ish lbs 27" waist 42"hip

When it arrived, the material was soft, like well worn denim. The fit was great, just roomy enough, not so tight that you can’t bend over. Quite a bit too long, but at 5’2”, I’m used to that. (The picture is before washing.) Then I washed them. Instructions said ‘cold water, do NOT tumble dry’, so that’s what I did. Yikes. I’d say they shrank somewhere between 1/2 to a full size. They ended up extremely wrinkled and the material became super stiff and rough, like the denim my Grandpa used to wear. I will try washing again and this time putting in the dryer; will update if they come out any better. Or worse.

When it comes to clothes, its hard to know exactly what you will get if its not brands that you regularly buy, so I got these jeans with a small amount of hesitation. I was so wrong to worry, they are fantastic. I love the fit, they have some stretch to them, but not the kind that makes them look sloppy or too big, these are very fitted in a good way. The length is perfect for me and the rise is good. I normally only buy Lucky or Banana Republic jeans, so to get these was a risk, but honestly these are great. for reference, I am 5'4", 125lbs and normally wear a small 6 or roomy 4. I got these in a 4 because the description said they are stretchy and they fit perfectly.

When my husband and I sold everything we owned & moved to Mexico, I packed on almost 30 lbs. We overindulged in all the delicious food here, and stayed in Airbnbs for months with no access to a gym. As a result, none of my clothes fit anymore, so I needed something I could wear that was at least as flattering as possible given the current state of my body. Since my size 10 jeans were too tight, I decided to get a 12 in these. In the photos, I weighed about 180 lbs, 37 waist , 42.5 hips and they were the tiniest bit snug, but the spandex in the denim allowed me to confirm to my body instead of giving me muffin top. Since I'm 5'7" with long legs, I ordered the 32 inch inseam. The length is perfect for a low wedge heel on me. I love that these jeans are lightweight with some stretch. So much better than the stiff denim from the old days (I was born in the 70s, raised in the 80s). The denim back then was thick and so stiff if you gained an ounce jeans weren't wearable anymore, and even if you could squeeze into them, they dug into your skin and left indentions and red marks. This more modern, stretch denim is so much more comfortable to wear, and the lighter weight fabric is more bearable in hot climates like Mexico.

When ordering these for my daughter, I didn't even realize that they had these really cute tie detail at the back . After receiving them, they are even cuter than anticipated and my daughter loves them. For reference, she is 5'0, so I wouldn't think they would work for taller people, but they are perfect for her. I wouldn't hesitate to order them again.

When reading the reviews, I was a little confused by the sizing, but thanks to the reviews and pics with similar body types to mine, I found the perfect size! These are actually junior sized. For reference, I am 5’7” 136 lbs and I ordered a size 7. I am a size 4 in womens shorts. They fit great and have a nice stretch! I’ll be ordering more colors! Hope this review helps someone!

While I like the style and fabric, sadly these jeans are more for a pear-shaped woman and I am apple shaped! They have a very generous fit through the thigh and hip area and they are too long for me. I am 5'3-1/2" and weigh 79kg. Size 22 Plus Short was way too large!

While I really do like this set and the quality was not an issue, it just didn’t fit my frame/body very well. I’m 5’8” tall and 125 lbs. the pants were the biggest problem. They weren’t long enough and the crotch was way, way too long. Even rolling down the waistband they were still too long in the crotch and became much too short in the overall length. I just don’t think this set was designed for taller, thinner gals. It’s a shame because I’d love to have kept it but had to return.

While I'll show my age by telling you I used to get 501s for 20$ back in the day, I've always loved them and these cute ones didn't disappoint. At 5'4" 123 I got a 28 regular and they fit well. Slightly loose but after washing 100% cotton I'm sure they'll be perfect. Life's short, buy the jeans :)

While Inread the reviews and most people have issues with the gems coming off, I do not. My issue is with the length. They are so long you can’t even fashionably roll them up. Now I’m very short (5’1) so unless I wear a platform shoe, these are too long by a solid 5”. If you have longer legs it may not be an issue for you. I’m 5’1 195 typically size 12 these are a large and fit comfortably

While they are very comfortable, great material and stretch, once they are washed they lose length. I'm only 5'4 and they were too short for me after one wash. I'm glad I waited before buying more like I initially wanted.
While they were long at first, I threw them in dryer for one cycle on low heat and now they’re the perfect length (I’m 5’1)

White pair Little lose but so comfortable, I weigh 169 and 5’5. I freakin love these. I will most definitely be ordering more. Fav for sure! They are high waisted witch I like because I have a mommy tummy. Y’all seriously these are worth it. The Jean ones are my all time fav they fit great obsessed with them there so flattering. I am definitely not disappointed so satisfied.

WHO LIKES SWANK JEANS??? These are the same! The fit, color, material. I bought navy blue in XL and wore them a few times over a month. I then ordered 4 more pairs in the following sizes and colors... black and olive in XL. I also tried the burgundy and red in the XL PLUS since they were only $10 bucks at the time. I'm 5'4 and currently 175 with an authentic round shaped peach 🍑, thick. My weight does fluctuate down to 160 at times. I see no difference AT ALL in the XL and XL plus, exact measurements, IMO. I prefer that my pants hug my thighs, but I do not like the button and zipper to fit tight to the point that it's squeezing my midsection & I feel uncomfortable. These are a perfect fit around the waist area. I'll get a large as my weight continues to drop back down. Update: The photo is of me in gray pants because my sister couldn't fit what she orders in XL- plus so she gave them to me.

Who would have thought—Lee makes great black work slacks!! I am 175lb and 5’6” and the 14 Medium fit great! They are a perfect length to wear with my clogs. I ordered about 10 different pairs of “wide leg black womens pants with pockets” and for some reason, all you get are “yoga work pants” which are too thin and too casual for this traditional gal… I want comfy pants but I also want them to be more like slacks, and not hug my butt so much!! (All the wide-leg “yoga pants” are too tight around the butt…) These are a little on the tight side but I think they will stretch out as I wear them. Winners!!!

Wide leg jeans are back in style! I love the color and stretch of these jeans. The back pockets are placed in a good location. The zipper and button are durable. I accidentally ordered these jeans two sizes smaller than usual. I normally wear a size 14 jeans. I weigh 215 pounds. When I ordered JB jeans, I always order one size down because of the stretch. My hips are 44” and accidentally ordered two sizes down, a size 10 instead of size 12. I was able to get these jeans on and since I’ve lost over 35 pounds this year, I will save these for my next goal weight, when I will fit into size 12 clothes at 195lbs. The inseam length is rather long and you can see I have on 3” platform shoes to compensate. You could raw cut the hems or actually sew a hem if your inseam is short like me at 29”. These jeans are cute and can’t wait to wear them more.

Wife here. I have never been so disappointed in a pair of pants. I’m tall so I was really excited about the length…they are not as long as I was lead to believe. I ordered based on the chart, but as the pictures show….way too small. I will not be wearing these pants, they make me very self conscious about myself. For reference, I am 5’11" and 175 lbs. So very disappointed.

Wife is 165cm or about 5ft 5 inches and weighs 66.70kg or 147lbs. camera mode is normal (not .5). Fabric and style: my wife likes it, as it can be trendy and formal depends on your top and shoes. The fabric is comfortable, lightweight, and doesnt need ironing (we just sprayed it with water and lay it on the bed for a few hours and hang it nicely). The thickness is just right too, not too thick and not the one that will get thin in just a few washes. stretchyness is not too much as a denim jean should. Size: the sizing is right when it comes to lenght and just a little small on waist. Wife's upper waist size is 36 and the demin holds her tummy nicely (with a little tuck or tummy in 😝) Price: we got a deal and with this brand, it's worth it as I use my shorts and pants from this brand for years.
Wife is 5'1" weights 102. Extra small fit perfect. PS not bad for 56 years old.

Wife is a size 8, 29" waist, 40" hips, 5'5", 150lbs. These pants are awesome. They look professional but the material is super stretchy and easy to wear. It's not quite the same material as leggings and definitely feels more like business wear, but the stretchiness is next level! Very flattering for the figure and still easy to wear every day.

Wife’s review: Wow! I'm absolutely thrilled with my new pants! The material is fantastic, offering a lot of stretch and some tummy control. What truly astonishes me is how well these pants cater to those of us with long legs. For reference, I'm 5'5" and weigh 184 lbs. As you can see in the photos, I have really long legs but a shorter torso (the struggle is real, right? 🤣). I always face challenges finding pants that are long enough for my liking, but these pants are the answer to my quest! 🙌🏾 I wholeheartedly recommend! 🥰
Wish they were a little longer. Size 2 m fits great I’m 5’3” long legs. Good quality

I appreciate how broad the legs are. It's soft and smooth. I appreciate how it has two open front pockets, but it would be wonderful to have two open back pockets.

Could have been from consuming so much food tho. They worked great for what I needed and will probably try to wear them again in the future. For reference I’m about 140lbs, 5’4” and pear shaped.

I gave 4 stars instead of 5 bc there were loose strings on the pants when I received them that needed to be trimmed off in quite a few places. Otherwise great pair of pants!

Wow, I was really surprised at how amazing these fit and how comfortable they are. I got the size Medium/35 inseam I’m 6.11 and have a little extra baby weight still on me so nothing fits right at the moment. They are a bit tight around my thighs, not in a bad way but in a very “yoga pants” way. I highly recommend them.

Wow, these jeans fit me perfect. From the moment I put them on I knew they’d be right for me, I am 5’10” 160 lbs. I love the five button look in the front. The cut is comfortable and the style will be great for the warmer months this spring and summer.

Wow, these palazzo pants over exceeded my expectations! They’re simply amazing. For reference I’m 6’2 (very tall) and 155lbs. These hug the waist and make the booty look big. These also come down to my ankles — so they’re super long!

Wow, where have these been my winter life? I am just finding out about this style. I'm living in a snowy and windy location, regular jeans with tights weren't helping, but these perfect pants do. Super comfortable, stretchy, and soft warm lining. The boot cut style is great for my boots selection, and I enjoy the looks I get in these pants. I'm 5'6 140lbs and I wear a medium, true to size. I love the black and dark blue colors. Now, I can travel, hike, shop, and enjoy the outdoors without freezing my behind. My new favorite fall and winter jeans.

Wow! I kept hearing all the hype and initially ordered these in the lighter color(Crakleton). I am a curvy 5’ 7”, 190 pounds, size 14. I felt they were a little to snug for comfort. I was offered an exchange to my delight, and got the darker Blue Laguna-Waterless color. Great customer service. As we all know different washes/colors make a difference in the fit of denim.These are living up to the hype and are all they claim to be! Perfect length, perfect fit! If you are on the fence, just try them. All for under $30. Who could ask for more?

Wow! I just got these today and I LOVE them! I am 5’7, 138 lbs, 41 years young for reference. I have a small waist but a big booty. Ordered them in a small and they fit great. The fabric is soooo soft!

Wow! These leggings are fantastic! So silky smooth and comfy, I'm in love! Made out of 81%nylon and 19% Elastane. Slide right on and feel so light and silky, you will hardly realize they are there! Not heavy like leather but have the look. I have leather pants, and they feel too heavy and hot for my liking. Your tunic top will slide with these pants! I chose the size small, as I am 119 lbs. and size 4. I am also 5'6. As you can see from my photo, they sit at about slightly above my ankle. The only thing that I would have preferred is one half inch, to one inch longer for me. At my height, as I am rather long legged but short waisted, this is not uncommon for my body type. I make it work usually. I have some sandals that have ankle straps that will work well and look cute with these. Even heels with ankle straps will look fine too. I would buy more if other colors were available! Love the look and fit! Bendable, stretchable, perfect!

Wow. Best amazon clothing purchase I’ve made thus far! Pleasantly surprised. Wore it almost everyday of my vacation! Very comfy and love the stretch! I got the medium and it was perfect. I’m 5”4, pear shaped and weigh 165. I usually wear Medium shirts and Large pants (or XL in Juniors). This hits right above the hip, so it’s slimming for us “hippy” ladies. Yea.... I can see how these would make one feel like MC Hammer. These are definitely ultimate lounge pants. I measure 32-24-36 and ordered the xs which is my normal size. The waistband is indeed very tight, it only fits best way up on my waist. The crotch is super super long. Don't even bother rolling these bad boys down either because you will have created one huge spare tire around your hips. Big enough to keep people out of your personal bubble though, so maybe that's a good thing. The material is very thick and warm which I absolutely love because I am always cold. Its soft on the inside. The pockets are nice as usual. After seeing how big these pants were when I opened the package I though maybe I could use them for period week pants, but because the waistband is so tight, I don't honestly know if that would give me the relief I'd be looking for. These feel pretty sturdy though and as long as I don't gain any inches right below my ribs I should be able to wear them for a long time.
